faqs.question: Can I get into NIIT University with 70%?
faqs.answer:
NIIT University is a private university located in Neemrana, Rajasthan, India. The eligibility criteria for admission to NIIT University varies depending on the course. Here are some relevant points from the search results:
For undergraduate courses, candidates should have passed their 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognised board with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks in Class 10th and passed Class 12th in the Science stream to be eligible for NIIT University B.Tech admission.
Applicants must have a four-year bachelor's degree in Engineering (any stream) or professionals with a three-year bachelor's degree must have adequate IT training.
For PhD admissions, the entrance exam carries 70% weightage and comprises multiple choice questions and/or short answer-based questions

faqs.question: Which BTech branch has the best placement record at NIIT University?
faqs.answer: The NIIT University average package offer to data Science students should at Indian rupees 6.67 Lacs per annum where as the NIIT university average package offer to cyber security students should at 5.2 8 Lacs per annum the top recruiters of NIT University included Airtel Amazon Cisco HCL IBM TCS tech Mahindra etc.

college_info.intro:
NIIT University popular programmes are BTech and BBA. BTech and BBA students are placed in top companies at top positions such as KPMG, Concentrix, Maruti Suzuki, Mercer, etc. The highest package received by the BTech and BBA students during the placements is INR 19.02 LPA. There are various labs available in the university like Science Labs, Educational Technology Lab, and others. BTech students can become Engineers, Scientists, or can go for various other job profiles. The following are the USPs of the NIIT University:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NIIT University programmes range from the bachelors to doctoral levels in Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics & Communication, Biotechnology, Geographical Information Systems, Educational Technology & Management Sciences. At the UG level, the university offers BTech programmes to students. BTech is available in various specialisations such as Biotechnology, Computer Science & Engineering, Cyber Security, and others, BBA, and Dual Degree Integrated MBA. At the PG level, the available programmes are MTech, integrated MBA, and others. The below are the and their respective eligibility and fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for NIIT University is INR 5.7 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students opting for hostel facility have to pay other fee components such as hostel rent, mess bill, establishment charges, etc. Students need to pay the fee only in the online mode.

faqs.answer: A:    NIIT University conducts NUAT for admission. NIIT University Aptitude Test is a MCQ-based online test of 50 minutes. The test includes Logical Reasoning, Data Interpretation, Quantitative Techniques and English Comprehension.
faqs.question: Does NIIT University conducts entrance exam?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied because of the faculty members, and the good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: I am a part of the 2022-2026 batch (B.Tech CSE), and overall, the placement support of my specific course is good. The majority of students get placed, and we receive a lot of help from the placement team regarding the same. We also received guidance from the best teachers.
review_content.Infrastructure: NIIT has a really good infrastructure with good Wi-Fi, great hostel rooms, and well-equipped classrooms. It has developed labs with a decent library. There are multiple sports facilities, such as a football field, tennis court, basketball court, a pool room, and a chess room. The food served is decent in a mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college and I am very satisfied.

review_content.Placements: The placement record is very good. Every student with an above 6 CGPA is placed. The average package is around 7-8 LPA, and the highest this year was around 35-40 LPA. Almost every student gets an internship and also industry practice. There are many top companies recruiting every year.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi in the room and also on campus, and we also have very good library labs, and the canteen food is also good, but sometimes it's not. Medical facilities are good, there is a doctor 24/7 present, and there are many sports available like basketball, table tennis, cricket, football, badminton, shooting, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The scenery is good. Placement and management are below average students have to do everything.

review_content.Placements: Real placement is around 96% in our college, while 100% is shown, and that too is after fulfilling the minimum criteria. The highest package is 27 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is around 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Morgan Stanley, IBM, and others.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is almost useless, and the only library that has good Wi-Fi is very small and has limited content. Classrooms are average, and there is no air conditioning. Labs are pretty average, providing only necessary equipment and resources. Food is like others and health care is below average and sports and games are not promoted enough.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Overview of NIIT University.

review_content.Placements: College has great placement rate. 100% is the placement rate. Average package is 12 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies are Amazon and IBM. Everyone has the opportunity to get an internship/industry practice in their 4th year, either for 1 year or 6 months.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are above average. Hostels are usually neat and clean. The rooms are spacious. Wi-Fi in the hostel is decent. Labs have appropriate equipment and are managed well by teachers. Mess food is better than other colleges. Medical facilities are also sufficient. Multiple sports and games are available to play, for example volleyball court, cricket nets and ground, football ground, pool and chess room, lawn tennis court, basketball court and a half court, 3 badminton courts, 3 gyms, and a shooting range.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements and hostel for 2025.

review_content.Placements: They have a great placement record and give 100% placement, and also give a 1-year internship. Companies that came are TCS, Wipro, etc. After that, 99% of people from my batch are placed in companies with a developer or manager role.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel and academic block both have Wi-Fi enabled in them with the classrooms with natural air from EAT. Hostel is good, and same for the mess food, they give us lots of variety so that everyone can eat easily. They also give us some fruits or some sweets.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the faculty. Placements are average. Infrastructure and facilities are just fine.

review_content.Placements: Almost all the students are placed as there are a very less number of students in the course. The highest package was 23 LPA, and the lowest was 4-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Microsoft and IBM. Almost all students got internships and placements. Top roles that are offered can be Data Science Engineer, Software Engineer, and Full Stack Developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in the classroom are pretty good. There is Wi-Fi in labs, classrooms, and library as well, but Wi-Fi hardly works in the hostel. Facilities in the hostel are just average, and the quality of mess food is below average. Medical facilities and sports are fine.

faqs.question: Q: When will CUET UG take place for NIIT University MBA course?

faqs.answer: NIIT University is famous for its undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs in Computer Science, Electronics and Communications, Biotechnology, and Management. However, the most famous course at NIIT University is B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering. The university also offers Integrated MBA and Post Graduate Diploma in Banking and Finance with ICICI Bank.
faqs.question: Q: Which course is NIIT University famous for?

faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to the four-year, integrated BSc programme offered at NIIT University must appear for an entrance examination. They must have to appear for CUET UG/ SAT India. Therefore, Class 12 marks are not enough for NIIT University BSc admission. It is the minimum eligibility criteria.

course_faqs.question: Does NIIT University provides scholarships to BSc students?
course_faqs.answer: Students who are pursuing BSc at NIIT University can avail various scholarships. These NIIT University BSc scholarships can be availed by top performers and meritorious students who meet the minimum eligibility requirements in the qualifying and entrance examinations. The scholarships are being offered in the form of tuition fee waiver.

course_faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy for BSc at NIIT University?
course_faqs.answer: NIIT University will refund the fee deposited by candidates during admission if they withdraw their admission from the integrated BSc programme offered at NIIT University within a stipulated time period. The University follows the fee refund policy defined by UGC.

course_faqs.question: Who can avail BSc scholarships at NIIT University?
course_faqs.answer: NIIT University BSc scholarships can be availed by students who fall under various categories subject to meeting the minimum eligibility criteria. The University provides scholarships in the form of the full waiver on their tuition fees. The following category of students can avail NIIT University BSc scholarships:Meritorious Students Students with excellent performance in any co-curricular activitySiblings of NIIT University current students and alumniChildren of current/ ex-employees of NIIT L

course_faqs.question: What are the various scholarships offered to the BSc students at NIIT University?
course_faqs.answer: NIIT University BSc scholarships are offered mainly in four categories to candidates who meet the eligibility requirements. Depending on the candidate’s academic performance, the University even provides a full waiver on their tuition fees. The scholarship of up to INR 2 Lacs is provided under the following categories:NIIT University Scholar Search ProgrammeSpecial ScholarshipSpecial fee waiverScholarship for Co-curricular Excellence

admission_overview.description: NIIT University admissions are entrance-based for most of the courses. The university considers scores in JEE Main, SAT, CUET, etc. for admission to specific courses. The university also conducts NIIT University Aptitude Test (NUAT). NIIT University offers several UG, PG and PhD level courses like BTech, BBA, MTech, etc. Candidates have to meet the criteria of the university. The application process at NIIT University is conducted online.

paragraphs: NIIT University 2026 Admissions Open:Apply Now

NIIT University course admissions for its campus courses are entirely entrance-based. Candidates are selected based on either the NIIT entrance exam or other state/national-level entrance exams. Eligible candidates can register online.
1- NIIT University Application Process 2026

For NIIT University course admissions, the first step is to fill out an online application form. Candidates are required to visit the official website of NIIT University to apply for the course of their choice. They also have to pay an application fee before submitting the application form. A duly completed admissions application form must be submitted by the specified date decided by the college, with all necessary documents and an application fee of INR 1,500.
2- Selection Process

Admission to all courses at NIIT University is entrance-based. The university conducts NUAT followed by a personal interaction round for admission. Candidates with a valid score in JEE Main, CUET, SAT, etc. are exempted from appearing for NUAT.
3- Final Seat Allotment
The university will release the list of selected candidates. Such candidates will be required to pay theNIIT University feesto confirm their seats within a stipulated deadline.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to various courses at NIIT University without appearing in any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, candidates cannot join NIIT University without an entrance exam.  The university offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. The university also offers doctorate courses besides the UG and PG courses. The university also accepts national-level entrance exams like JEE Main, GATE, CUET, BITSAT etc. for admission to specific courses such as BTech, BBA, MTech, MBA among other.

faqs.question: Is admission open for NIIT University courses?
faqs.answer: NIIT University admissions are currently open for various courses. The university offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. The university also offers doctorate courses besides the UG and PG courses. To get admitted to NIIT University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. You can go to the website for more information.

faqs.question: How do I get admission in NIIT University for various courses?
faqs.answer: The university offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. The university also offers doctorate level courses besides the UG and PG courses. Admission to courses is based on university or national-level entrance exam scores. The university accepts scores in CUET, NUAT, SAT, IBSAT, etc.

faqs.question: Is Class 12 marks enough for admission to BSc at NIIT University?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to the four-year, integrated BSc programme offered at NIIT University must appear for an entrance examination. They must have to appear for CUET UG/ SAT India. Therefore, Class 12 marks are not enough for NIIT University BSc admission. It is the minimum eligibility criteria.

placement_report.college_name: NIIT University Placements 2025: Highest, Average Salary Package & Top Companies

placement_data.title: NIIT University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: NIIT University has a record of providing 100% placements since inception to its students who are eligible and opted for placements. This year, 93% students of the batch 2025 got their aspired roles in reputed companies. T he highest package offered during NIIT University placements 2025 stood at INR 19.02 LPA. The average package offered to the top 25% of the 2025 batch stood at INR 10.91 LPA . Some of the top recruiters of NIIT University include IBM, WNS, EY, Morgan Stanley, Volkswagen, S&P Global, Kantar, KPMG, Concentrix, Maruti Suzuki, Mercer , etc.

To provide relevant industry experience to the students, the University also conducts summer internships every year. These programmes are for two to three months. The students gets the exposure to work closely with the professionals of their stream.

In an exclusive interaction with Shiksha.com, the President of NIIT University Dr Prabhu Aggarwal talks at length about the placements at NIIT University. He elaborates on the process of helping students become industry-ready, which includes a mandatory internship programme where students are mentored by both industry experts and faculty. Despite the global pandemic situation, the University can report 100% placements with a significant hike in maximum CTC as compared to last year.

hostel_campus.college_name: NIIT University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel of NU has well-furnished rooms with required furniture and with earth-air cooling, laundry facility and house-keeping services. Each room is positioned to provide a beautiful view of the surrounding Aravalli Hills. There are common rooms on each floor of the hostels with TV. Coffee/tea/soup vending machines are provided in hostels. The entire hostel is Wi-Fi enabled. The hostel has Yoga Centre, Forest Walk, Music Room, Dance Centre, Art and Craft Centre, Theatre Club, Photography Club, Adventure Club and Debating Society.

library.description: Library and Information Resource Centre of NIIT University is well stocked with books which support learning, teaching, research and general needs across varied disciplines. It has subscribed McGraw-Hill – access engineering package which provides access to more than 742 e-books on Biomedical, Business Skills, Communications Engineering, Electrical and Electronics, Environmental Sustainability, Industrial Engineering, Operations Management, Chemistry, Microbiology, Physics, Mathematics and Computer Science. The Library provides access to 15793 National and International journals/e-journals. It has also subscribed video lectures of the National Program on Technology Enhanced Learning (NPTEL) and also has access of National Digital Library. The library is an Associate Member of INFLIBNET. It has got membership of DELNET which provides Inter-Library Loan Service.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Athletics Ground, Hockey Ground, Volleyball Court, Pool, Table Tennis

It has also subscribed video lectures of the National Program on Technology Enhanced Learning (NPTEL) and also has access of National Digital Library. The library is an Associate Member of INFLIBNET. It has got membership of DELNET which provides Inter-Library Loan Service.

cafeteria.description: The NU has three spacious and airy dining halls where students and faculty have their food together. Breakfast, lunch, a high tea and dinner are served here. Food served is primarily vegetarian with eggs being served on some days. The menu is decided by the mess committee comprising mainly of students and a few faculty members. Parents and invited guests too have their meals here.

Each room is positioned to provide a beautiful view of the surrounding Aravalli Hills. There are common rooms on each floor of the hostels with TV. Coffee/tea/soup vending machines are provided in hostels. The entire hostel is Wi-Fi enabled. The hostel has Yoga Centre, Forest Walk, Music Room, Dance Centre, Art and Craft Centre, Theatre Club, Photography Club, Adventure Club and Debating Society.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Athletics Ground, Hockey Ground, Volleyball Court, Pool, Table Tennis

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty members, and the good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: NIIT has a really good infrastructure with good Wi-Fi, great hostel rooms, and well-equipped classrooms. It has developed labs with a decent library. There are multiple sports facilities, such as a football field, tennis court, basketball court, a pool room, and a chess room. The food served is decent in a mess.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college and I am very satisfied.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi in the room and also on campus, and we also have very good library labs, and the canteen food is also good, but sometimes it's not. Medical facilities are good, there is a doctor 24/7 present, and there are many sports available like basketball, table tennis, cricket, football, badminton, shooting, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The scenery is good. Placement and management are below average students have to do everything.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is almost useless, and the only library that has good Wi-Fi is very small and has limited content. Classrooms are average, and there is no air conditioning. Labs are pretty average, providing only necessary equipment and resources. Food is like others and health care is below average and sports and games are not promoted enough.

reviews.review_heading: Overview of NIIT University.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are above average. Hostels are usually neat and clean. The rooms are spacious. Wi-Fi in the hostel is decent. Labs have appropriate equipment and are managed well by teachers. Mess food is better than other colleges. Medical facilities are also sufficient. Multiple sports and games are available to play, for example volleyball court, cricket nets and ground, football ground, pool and chess room, lawn tennis court, basketball court and a half court, 3 badminton courts, 3 gyms, and a sh...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and hostel for 2025.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and academic block both have Wi-Fi enabled in them with the classrooms with natural air from EAT. Hostel is good, and same for the mess food, they give us lots of variety so that everyone can eat easily. They also give us some fruits or some sweets.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty. Placements are average. Infrastructure and facilities are just fine.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the classroom are pretty good. There is Wi-Fi in labs, classrooms, and library as well, but Wi-Fi hardly works in the hostel. Facilities in the hostel are just average, and the quality of mess food is below average. Medical facilities and sports are fine.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, average placements in 2024, and okish infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is fine, but in summers, the hostel rooms are so hot because there is no option for air conditioning. Here, you get the Earth Air Tunnel System, which is not at all useful. Mess food is fine. You have to buy equipment for your projects; they don't get it for you.

reviews.review_heading: NIIT University: A Fusion of Academic Excellence and Industry-Driven Innovation.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel are pretty good compared to other private universities. The college has 2 hostels for girls and 2 for boys. The whole college is equipped with good Wi-Fi service, and the mobile network is also strong, with 5G working on most of the campus. We have digital labs, classrooms, lecture halls, a library, and rooms for table tennis, music, dance, meetings, and an auditorium. The boys' hostel has triple, double, and single rooms. Choosing a single seater requires a higher ...

reviews.review_heading: The University of the Future, Niit University, Neemrana.
reviews.review_text: Talking about infrastructure, the university has a giant aqueous system, which is all-natural. The whole campus follows the go-green slogan. The food in the mess is average, but a student can get good food in restaurants and cafes at the university that tastes amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing and supportive faculty, wonderful opportunities and a chance at growth.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge and still under expansion. We have extremely high-quality labs and professional equipment for better hands-on experience. The campus is located at the foot of the Aravalli hills, with lots of greenery and beautiful sights. However, sometimes there are issues regarding connectivity. The Wi-Fi will sometimes not work and will take a long time (<2hrs) to get fixed. It would be better if you have an MD plan of your own. The mess food is hygienic and actually tastes good. The menu ...

reviews.review_heading: Our university has good placements and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is very unreliable. Classrooms are well maintained but have no air-conditioners. There is an underground air-cooling solution called the EAT. Food is average. Medical facilities are nice and can get most of the items from the tuck shop.

reviews.review_heading: This college is not worthy, so I would recommend Amity instead.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the food is hygienic in the kotak hostel. This college provides a physics laboratory, chemistry laboratory, biology laboratory, and electronic laboratory. There are grounds for games, but they are not well-maintained. The football ground has many holes in it.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIIT University.
reviews.review_text: The aim of our college is to provide a welcoming and intellectually vibrant environment for the university's students, faculty, and staff. Nestled in the Aravalli Hills, NU's 100-acre campus pays homage to nature by incorporating wide open spaces and ample greenery. The plastic and litter-free campus with pollution-free air, enhanced by a unique sustainable cooling mechanism, makes the campus the ideal place for students embarking on their journeys of self-discovery. Considering that infrastruct...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: College is spread across 100 acres of land. There are 4 hostels, 2 for girls and 2 for boys. There are 2 academic blocks, one is a library along with a badminton court and table tennis room. There are 3 mess and 3 food outlets for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Owe my personality development to NU.
reviews.review_text: The laboratory is one of the most important biotechnology courses, which are well maintained at NIIT University. There are multiple types of equipment,  2 labs, and temperature-controlled rooms, for the hands-on experience. The hostel is well maintained with all the facilities. We have options of multiple food points like Nescafe, Apno gaon, etc.,

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Sinhgad College of Engineering:

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.answer: A:    As per Shiksha verified reviews, Sinhgad College of Engineering has an impressive review rating of 3.37 by 419 students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Sinhgad College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Graduating with an MBA from Sinhgad College of Engineering can open up a variety of job opportunities across different sectors. Here are some potential career paths and job roles that graduates might consider: Management Roles: Graduates can pursue managerial positions in various industries, overseeing teams and operations. Marketing: Roles such as Marketing Manager, Brand Manager, or Digital Marketing Specialist are common, focusing on promoting products and services.
faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing MBA from Sinhgad College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    After completing a B.Tech. from Universal Group of Institutions, graduates have a range of job opportunities in sectors like IT, manufacturing, and engineering services. The college's placement cell assists students in securing positions at companies such as Infosys, TCS, and Wipro. Students can also explore roles in software development, quality assurance, and network engineering. Core engineering disciplines may lead to jobs in mechanical, civil, and electrical fields. reviews_list.review_title: Good placements & infrastructure, but poor faculty made my overall college experience frustrating.

review_content.Placements: Around 60 to 70% of students were placed. Approximately 50% of students secured internships, and overall placement seemed strong. The highest package offered was 14 LPA, with the lowest at 3.6 LPA. The average stood around 4 LPA. Companies included PubMatic, HSBC, Eqtech, Accenture, Cognizant, BNY Mellon, PTC, NVIDIA, Capgemini, and many more visit our college. Around 50% of students received internships at NVIDIA, Accenture, Cognizant, PubMatic, and BNY Mellon. The most common role offered was software developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides well-equipped classrooms, labs, and a large campus with active student clubs. Hostels are available, including a secured girls' hostel within the college premises. The food quality in the mess is average, while hostel security is good. There is also a big cricket ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Amazing college life with events like Sinhgad Carnival, Springfest.

content.Placements: Placements are average and the same as the other colleges like Sinhgad in Pune, but the college has a student training program that teaches students placement-oriented skills that lead to cracking the best placements. The placement team is well-experienced.
content.Infrastructure: Average hostel because the Wi-Fi range is too poor. The infrastructure is quite old, but it gives the typical hostel vibes, and the hostel life is amazing. The college gym has well-equipped facilities and sports options like table tennis, chess, carrom, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: If this college is allotted to you, take a pause and read and think.

content.Placements: Placement statistics are decent, with 60 to 70% of students placed in tech fields such as CS, IT, electronics, and telecommunication. Core branches receive comparatively fewer offers, so actively participating in clubs and having a reasonable CGPA are very important. With dedicated efforts, top packages of 15-20 LPA can be achieved.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is good. College campus is huge, you will find a rare campus in Pune of this type. Medical facilities are good if you need an ambulance, the hostel will provide you with 24-hour medical facilities and a gym, a sports room inside it. College has multiple grounds.

faqs.answer: Admission to the Universal Group of Institutions (UGI) is not much of a procedure; it follows the merit criterion. Application can be submitted through online means as well as offline with the form, but entrance exams for most of the courses are strictly competitive. The minimum aggregate score required will be Class 12 in undergraduate courses and a recognized bachelor's degree for postgraduate courses. The admissions cell guides the prospecting student into selecting the right course so that admission and support can be easily provided.

hostel.description:
Separate wing for the foreign student in both boys and girls hostels with additional facilities for cooking and washing
Hostels have fully furnished rooms, TV, secured Wi-Fi, dining hall, sufficient number of toilets, furniture and recreation area

Library's reading hall has good facilities. I honestly recommend others to take admission here. Every year, students are given the opportunity to participate in international sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and average placements.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and library are provided on our college premises for free of cost and at any time. There is no Wi-Fi available in the college. Hostel is good with its own canteen. Quality and quantity are good for food. No such environment for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: The best for college events.
reviews.review_text: Lab equipment is average, a little bit old and rusty equipment. Hostel facilities for first-year students are good, but after it's pretty average. Mess food is the worst thing in this college.

reviews.review_heading: About 80% of students get placed. Top companies like Infosys and TCS visited with decent packages.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is decent. Our department has well-equipped labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, and smart classrooms. The library has all the necessary books and peaceful study zones. The hostel is well-maintained. The mess food is average but hygienic. There are also indoor games and medical facilities for students. Classrooms are clean and spacious with projectors. Labs have the latest PCs. Hostel rooms are shared with adequate facilities. The canteen food is okay with a balanced diet. Sports g...

reviews.review_heading: A decent college, nothing is extraordinary.
reviews.review_text: The college is built on a mountain, the buildings are old but decent, not very aesthetic, but good enough for studying. Labs are not very up-to-date, and the Wi-Fi is very poor. The food quality in the mess also varies because there are a lot of messes, but overall, the taste and quality are decent.

reviews.review_heading: Wonderful college for the overall development of students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is outstanding and is best in Pune. Department buildings are well structured and some labs are essential for students technological progress. The infrastructure is of IIT level. The college infrastructure is surrounded by nature.

reviews.review_heading: Please review your decision before making admission.
reviews.review_text: The campus of the college is very big, but it includes several other colleges of the Sinhgad Institute like the MBA college, medical college, and other engineering colleges. The campus is spacious, and hostels are quite decent, but the mess food quality is literally poor. Students generally don't like to eat in the hostel mess, so most of them avoid taking hostel admission.

reviews.review_heading: It has a strong infrastructure and decent placements. There is a scope for academic improvement.
reviews.review_text: Sinhgad College of Engineering in Pune is renowned for its expensive and well-equipped campus. The college offers a variety of facilities, including a central library enriched with approximately 46,500 books across various engineering, management, and science disciplines. The campus also houses amenities like milk parlors, a bank, Xerox centers, a stationary shop, a snacks center, and a suspicious library equipped with a lift, drinking water facilities, good Wi-Fi, a power outlet, and a study ar...

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Sinhgad College of Engineering

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Accenture, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Mindtree, Cognizant, Infosys, Vodafone, etc., visit our campus for placements.
The college focuses on mass placements, Although if you have a decent GPA, you get ample opportunities in product based companies and startups.

likes.text: All the facilities given by the college are good like a library, computer labs, etc.
Quality of food in the canteens for hostels is average but many more food places and canteens are available nearby.

likes.text: They are well qualified, and some of the teachers have completed their PhD in the subjects and also have deep knowledge about their respective subject.
Our college is affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University, so the entire course curriculum designed by that university is quite decent.

likes.text: The college has a large and beautiful campus, huge parking facility, lots of canteens and cafeterias, general and medical stores.

faqs.answer: A:    VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent. OR Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.M.E./M.TechSponsored candidate must have minimum of two years of full time work experience in a registered firm/ company/ industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed minimum three year Bachelor's Degree in any discipline or its equivalent with above mentioned marks (45% in case of candidates of backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from any of the Universities recognized by UGC or AIU.

review_summary.college_name: VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Everyone in college is really supportive.

content.Placements: The 2025 batch got placements in TCS and Capgemini with a package range from 4-5 from my branch. Other branch placements are really good, but as it is a biomedical it is exhausting and a new branch, and not that much-opening so many people preferred to go for higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is not there, but the college campus is really good. Wi-Fi is available for all students. Labs are really good, and classrooms have a smartboard and air-conditioners. The library is also good with a pleasant environment, so it is good for studying. There are even CC labs if a student does not have a laptop, they get access.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college everything, placement, crowd, faculty everything is top-notch.

content.Placements: Currently, I am in my second year of college, so I am not the one who is getting placed. But, I know some of my seniors who told me that placements are declining due to the increasing demand for computer/IT jobs and also the lack of skills. Recently, many companies have visited our campus for recruitment, and they rejected almost everyone as no one have skills they were looking for. The highest package is 12 LPA, so you get the overview of this college. Companies like Cognizant, TCS, and Wipro visit the campus for mass recruitment but recruit a very less number of students.

content.Placements: According to the college website, 100% of students get placed. The highest package is 38 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, Amazon, Infosys, etc. Students who get above 8 CGPA get internships in the above-mentioned companies and more. paragraphs: Vidyalankar Institute of Technology has yet to release its 2025 placement report. Earlier in 2024, in all 423 students secured placements. The highest package recorded in the recent years was INR 37.5 LPA. Furthermore, the second highest package was INR 35 LPA. Many notable companies were a part of Vidyalankar Institute of Technology placements 2025, some of them are Capgemini, Infosys, TCS, Barclays, Purple, etc.

faqs.question: What is the median package offered at VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology during placements?
faqs.answer: VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology offers median package range of INR 344,750 during in-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance program and has been rated 3.9 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.

faqs.question: What is the median package of B.E. / B.Tech course that is offered by VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: As per the data available, Median package of B.E. / B.Tech course is around INR 350,000.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: As per Shiksha verified reviews, VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology has an impressive review rating of 3.75 by 348 students.

description: VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 49730 and 184814 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 49730, B.Tech in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 41025.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 49730.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.
During the VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology BTech 2023, B.E. in Computer Engineering became the most competitive specialisation.

This year, the Round 1 and the Last Round closing scores for B.E. in Computer Engineering were 97.15 and 96.84, respectively for the General Home State category students. To check out the VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology branch-wise cutoff 2023, refer to the table given below:

During VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology cutoff 2023, the last round closing score was 95.38 for B.E. in Computer Engineering course. In 2022 and 2021, the last round closing scores stood at 96.3 and 96.84, respectively for B.E. in Computer Engineering. Considering the Round 3 closing scores for B.E. in Computer Engineering over the past three years, VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology has witnessed a declining trend.
Some of the important dates related to MHT CET are given below for VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology BTech admission:

The VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MBA/PGDM admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 89.93. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 92.21 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology was 89.93. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 91.93 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 90.45.

Maharashtra Common Entrance Test (MAH CET) is a state level management entrance test for admission to MBA/MMS courses. The MAH MBA CET 2025 cutoff has been released for all rounds and categories. Students can view other important dates for MAH MBA CET 2026 in the table below:

Analysing MAH MBA CET cutoff trends provides invaluable insights to students into how admission dynamics and competitiveness for different courses change over time. Students can download year-wise cutoff lists from the table given below to have a better idea of the cutoff percentile changes over the years.

hostel_campus.college_name: VIT - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

library.description:
A well stocked central library with the collection of 20000+ books on technical and management subjects, journals and e-journals and it also provides material in the electronic form. The library is Wi-Fi enabled and reading room facility is also there. A coffee kiosk in the library provides invigorating refreshment to library users. 
The library has also membership with British Council Library, and an institutional subscription to IEEE Xplore Digital Library, NPTEL etc.

reviews.review_heading: Everyone in college is really supportive.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not there, but the college campus is really good. Wi-Fi is available for all students. Labs are really good, and classrooms have a smartboard and air-conditioners. The library is also good with a pleasant environment, so it is good for studying. There are even CC labs if a student does not have a laptop, they get access.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college everything, placement, crowd, faculty everything is top-notch.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are top-notch, and the infrastructure is also top-notch. We have a lot of computers on campus, some of which are equipped with RTX 4090. The mess food is okayish, I won’t say it's good or bad, it’s just manageable. For sports purposes, we don't have a big ground, so sports facilities are average, as we have to take permission to play on the ground. There are two grounds at VIT, which are also used by other college students like VIIEE, VP, and VSIT. Every class ...

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are air-conditioned. All machines work perfectly. College has purchase many software like cadence, Turnitin, and many more. There is a huge library. Our college doesn't have hostel facility but there are a lot of PGs available near the college. Canteen food is healthy, affordable, and tasty. There are facilities like video game, pool table, and many games available.

reviews.review_heading: It has average faculty members, good infrastructure, and average placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good with one of the best college auditoriums in Mumbai. There are facilities like open Wi-Fi, a library, and a game spot. There are multiple food outlets. The food of the canteen is average. There is a Nescafe and CCD also.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied due to facilities and opportunities provided.
reviews.review_text: Every student has their own internet via Internet autonomy for creative work. There are labs with computers in good condition. We also have an Apple lab. Classrooms are good, with AC and digital boards for teaching, and the library is peaceful. We have sports every year. There are sports for girls in many types to encourage girls. We also have cultural celebrations, food, dance, DJ nights, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good in my college like the availability of Wi-Fi and labs like the Chemistry lab, Physics lab, innovation lab, practical lab, mechanics lab, computer lab, information technology lab, digital lab, digital electronics lab, graphic lab, and professional skills lab.

reviews.review_heading: Vidyalankar Institute of Technology Mumbai: A place to learn and win life.
reviews.review_text: Campus life at Vidyalankar Institute of Technology is very good. It has multiple clubs for the students to boost their winning talents. It has a big library with thousands of books to help students with their academics and studies. Unfortunately, there is no hostel service available.

reviews.review_heading: Vidyalankar at a glimpse.
reviews.review_text: The campus life at the Vidyalankar Institute of Technology was great. It has many clubs for students to develop their talents and a large library with thousands of books to support their academics. However, the Wi-Fi is very poor and hardly works, so it's of no use.

reviews.review_heading: Welcome to VIT. Not VJTI! But you can get the joy.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is one of the best in Mumbai. Free Wi-Fi and well-equipped labs are provided. The library is also quite large. The food made in the canteen is very good and affordable. There are also two cafes, Nescafe and Cafe Coffee Day, and a Ribbons & Balloons shop where you get a variety of puffs and sweets. The college also organizes various fests and sports tournaments. There are two gymkhanas, one even with a PS5, and they include various indoor games such as carrom, che...

reviews.review_heading: "Exploring Opportunities at Vidyalankar Institute of Technology".
reviews.review_text: Vidyalankar Institute of Technology offers a vibrant campus life for students to blend their academics with social life, cultural, and various extracurricular activities. VIT’s classrooms are well-equipped with smartboards, projectors, and Wi-Fi, creating an innovative environment. There are also 3-4 well air-conditioned classrooms. For VIT, there is no hostel available, so if students are coming from other cities, they are used to finding their own stay near Wadala or Dadar.

reviews.review_heading: Education and Facilities at VIT Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: I like the library where you will get numerous books of your field which helps you in academics as well as increase your practical knowledge. The Wi-Fi is free inside the campus, and all classrooms have projectors. There is a place for playing indoor games, PC games, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing college life at VIT.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is the best part of my college because it has the best infrastructure compared to other colleges. It has AC classrooms. It has the facility of V-refer, in which all the lectures are recorded and uploaded there, which helps students to study topics or revise them.

reviews.review_heading: One should definitely consider this college for admission.
reviews.review_text:
College infrastructure is very good. Classrooms are clean. Computer labs are outdated, it consist of old dual-core PCs, but each PC has Wi-Fi. College also has a library which contains many book and a seating area for practice and studying. Canteen food is good but little expensive for hostellers.
college canteen food is good but little expensive for hostellers.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review from an upcoming engineer.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is outstanding. Every classroom has air conditioning and smart boards for faculty members to teach. Our college has Wi-Fi. Labs and the library are good. Overall the campus has a vibrant feeling all around. There are multiple cafeterias and canteen which serve good food.

reviews.review_heading: Student life at Vidyalankar Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is much better compared to what someone gets at other colleges at the same percentile. Canteen food is also very healthy and of good quality, but it's slightly on the pricier side. Every class in the college is provided with air conditioners and a digital board. There is also a library that offers books based on the relevant curriculum. Wi-Fi is also publicly available to students, but there are some areas in the college where we can't access it. Two grounds are av...

Efforts taken by placement cell are really commendable as companies like Amul, Britanian, ITC have participated in our campus recruitment.

VIT Business School MBA course admission is entrance exam-based. VITBS offers good placement opportunities. During VIT MBA placements 2023, more than 150 recruiters visited the campus. VIT MBA the highest and average packages stood at INR 15 LPA and INR 9.68 LPA, respectively.

The entire cost of tuition for the Vidyalankar Institute of Technology (VIT) in Mumbai's Master of Management Studies (MMS) programme is INR 2.7 lakhs. faqs.answer: A:    To get admission to a two-year M.Tech course at MIT AOE, the minimum eligibility criteria is to pass a Bachelor’s Degree in the relevant stream of Engineering and Technology with at least 50% marks in aggregate. Admission to this course is entirely entrance-based. Candidates are selected based on their valid scores obtained in GATE entrance exam.
faqs.question: What is eligibility for M.Tech at MIT AOE?

faqs.answer: A:    MIT Academy of Engineering M.Tech is a two-year programme offered in the full-time mode. Admission to the programme is based on the applicants' entrance exam scores, subject to the fulfillment of the preset eligibility criteria. As per the eligibility criteria specified by the college, aspirants must have completed their Graduation from a recognised university/institution in a relevant field to be eligible for admission. Further, they must present all the necessary documents pertaining to their eligibility at the time of admission.

review_content.Placements: MIT Academy of Engineering (MITAOE), Alandi, Pune, has an active and well structured placement cell. It plays a vital role in guiding students toward successful careers. The Training and Placement Department at MITAOE works continuously to bridge the gap between academic learning and industry requirements. It provides training in aptitude, communication skills, technical knowledge, and interview preparation. It makes students industry-ready.
review_content.Infrastructure: Here’s a short and clear overview of infrastructure for course and hostel facilities at MIT Academy of Engineering (MITAOE), Alandi, useful for exams, reports, or placements. MITAOE, Alandi, offers modern and well equipped infrastructure for engineering and management courses, with smart classrooms, advanced laboratories, computer centers, and a digital library. It access to online journals and e-books. Each department has labs and research centers supporting hands-on learning. The college provides Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus, an innovation center, and industry collaboration labs that help students gain practical experience.

faqs.answer: Maharashtra Academy of Engineering Alandi Pune (also known as MIT AOE Alandi Pune) is an autonomous private institution. MITAOE is stablished in 1999 and is only the third institute in Pune that has been bestowed with 'academic autonomy' by the University Grants Commission (UGC). It is affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU) and has been accredited by the NAAC with Grade 'A'. Additionally, MIT AOE Alandi Pune is approved by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA). At the undergraduate level, the MIT AOE Alandi Pune offers BTech courses to students. BTech students from Maharashtra Academy of Engineering secure positions in top companies. Therefore, pursuing a BTech degree at MIT AOE Alandi Pune is a valuable option.

course_faqs.question: How much does BTech at MIT Academy of Engineering cost?

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing BTech at MIT AOE Alandi Pune?
overview_faqs.answer: Maharashtra Academy of Engineering Alandi Pune (also known as MIT AOE Alandi Pune) is an autonomous private institution. MITAOE is stablished in 1999 and is only the third institute in Pune that has been bestowed with 'academic autonomy' by the University Grants Commission (UGC). It is affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU) and has been accredited by the NAAC with Grade 'A'. Additionally, MIT AOE Alandi Pune is approved by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA). At the undergraduate level, the MIT AOE Alandi Pune offers BTech courses to students. BTech students from Maharashtra Academy of Engineering secure positions in top companies. Therefore, pursuing a BTech degree at MIT AOE Alandi Pune is a valuable option.

overview_faqs.question: How costly is College of Engineering Pune?
overview_faqs.answer: The College of Engineering (COEP) average course fee is around INR 75,000 for four years. M.Tech programme fee at MIT Academy of Engineering ranges from around INR 7.03 Lacs. Students can directly contact the admissions office at COEP or go to the official website for more information on the required fee.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering (Software Engineering) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review of MIT Academy of Engineering, MAEER.

content.Placements: The placement is very bad. The highest package is 28 LPA. Most students are placed in mass recruiters with a package of around 5 LPA. There are many companies visiting. The placement season is still ongoing. The college prepares students well for interviews.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is a major downside of the college. The campus is small. Construction work goes on all day with little progress. The main road was dug up two months ago and is still unfinished. Classrooms are also in bad condition.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, disciplined campus, supportive faculty, and decent placement opportunities.

content.Placements: 65 to 70 percent of students from course got placed through campus placements. The highest package offered is around 20LPA and average package was about 4 to 5LPA. Top Recruiting companies are TCS, Cisco, NICE, Phones Pay. Top roles offered are Software Engineer, System Engineer, and Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has well maintained, clean, and modern campus. Laboratories are well equipped, especially with projectors and all. There is no ground to play. Some hostels are really decent and clean but the fees are very high. Canteen is available and the food is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: MIT AOE is the best college for placement.

content.Placements: MIT Academy of Engineering (MITAOE), Alandi, Pune, has an active and well structured placement cell. It plays a vital role in guiding students toward successful careers. The Training and Placement Department at MITAOE works continuously to bridge the gap between academic learning and industry requirements. It provides training in aptitude, communication skills, technical knowledge, and interview preparation. It makes students industry-ready.
content.Infrastructure: Here’s a short and clear overview of infrastructure for course and hostel facilities at MIT Academy of Engineering (MITAOE), Alandi, useful for exams, reports, or placements. MITAOE, Alandi, offers modern and well equipped infrastructure for engineering and management courses, with smart classrooms, advanced laboratories, computer centers, and a digital library. It access to online journals and e-books. Each department has labs and research centers supporting hands-on learning. The college provides Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus, an innovation center, and industry collaboration labs that help students gain practical experience.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College is good. Decent environment.

content.Placements: I am a newbie and do not know much. I think it has the best average, which is updated on the webpage and all. It is good to see and very well managed. It led to an increase in the number of students in college, which shows the demand for the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent, and the hostel is good. Hostel is far from the college, which is the biggest demerit. The infrastructure is small but decent, as it has a block and lift facility, and also the best dome at opening, which makes it awesome too and good to see.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (AI and ML) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college is all about academics, which means the placement, your personal growth and skills.

content.Placements: Many Seniors and the local people I met told me that college is really good in academics and placement. One told me this year that PhonePe offered 23 LPA to a student. The placement percentage is almost 70% and the average placement is 7.5 LPA in my branch. MIT AOE has a good placement record, with overall placement rates between 70% and 90% and higher rates for Computer Science and IT. Reputable companies like TCS, Capgemini, and Infosys visit for mass recruitment, while companies such as Tata Motors and Mahindra recruit from other branches.

admission_overview.college_name: MITAOE Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility & Selection Process

admission_process.title: MIT Academy of Engineering, Alandi Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MIT Academy of Engineering, Alandi admission 2025is a blend of merit and entrance basis. Students can pursue several undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral levels. These programmes are offered in various fields of Engineering and Design. Also known asMIT AOE Alandi, students need to satisfy the preset admission criteria of the desired programme to be eligible for admission into the institute. The courses offered at the institute are provided in affiliation with Savitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU). The admission and application process for the institute generally commences online. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility, and other admission-related information for MIT Academy of Engineering, Alandi admission.

MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi course admissionto the UG, PG and PhD courses is based on course-specific entrance exams. MITAOE also offers lateral entry for second-year BTech programme Admission to MITAOE Alandi can be secured directly through CAP rounds or at institute level on merit basis and or during SPOT rounds. For PhD admissions, students must either provide valid score obtained in any of the accepted entrance tests, such as GATE/ SPPU-SET or appear for the institute-level test;MITAOE PET. The table below carries the eligibility and selection details for some of the popularMIT Academy of Engineering Alandi courses:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 or its equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 45% withPhysics, Chemistry andMathematicsas compulsory subjects
JEE Main/MHT CET
UG degree in BTech or its equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 50%

MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi's admission processincludes several steps.These include- application, selection, counselling and fee payment. The entire application process is in online mode. Below is the step-wise admission process of MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi:
1: Application Process
The admission process begins with registration of the candidates online on the official website of MITAOE. Candidates must fill out the form and pay the application fee.
2: Selection Process

Once the registration is done, the candidates will be shortlisted based on the marks obtained in the entrance exams for the respective courses they chose. MITAOE takes in account both academic merit and entrance exam scores to make a merit list of the eligible candidates for each course.
3: Counselling and Fee Payment

Once the candidates are shortlisted, they will be contacted by the university for counselling. The shortlisted candidates will have to pay the course fee and submit the required documents to confirm their seat in the college.

courses_data.description: Bachelor of Design (BDes) is a four-year undergraduate degree in the design field. MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi offers the students to learn through various Major and Minor programmes along with doing multiple courses simultaneously. MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi offers the BDes degree in several specialisations such as Product Design, User Experience Design and Communication Design.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BDes programme in MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi?
faqs.answer: The basic eligibility to get admission in Bachelor of Design programme in MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi is scoring a minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12 or its equivalent in any stream. Interested candidates also need to clear the MAH-B Design CET entrance exam which is conducted by Directorate of Arts, Maharashtra to get admission at MIT School of Design, MITAOE, Pune.

faqs.question: What are the specialisations provided at MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi for BDes programme?
faqs.answer: BDes stands for Bachelor of Design. It is a four-year undergraduate course and has several specialisations, offering students a diverse collection of interests in the field of design. MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi offers BDes programme in several disciplines such as BDes in Product Design, BDes in User Experience Design and BDes Communication Design.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake of MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi BDes programme?
faqs.answer: MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi provides a four-year undergraduate course for Bachelor of Design programme. The university offers three specialisations for the programme: BDes in Product Design, BDes in User Experience Design and BDes in Communication Design. There are a total of 90 seats available for the course.

courses_data.name: MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi MTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Master of Technology (MTech) is a two-year postgraduate degree in the field of engineering. MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi offers an MTech programme in two specialisations:MTech in Computer EngineeringandMTech in Mechanical Engineering. To get admission in MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi MTech course the basic eligibility is a Bachelor’s degree in the relevant field of Engineering and Technology with an aggregate of at least 50% (45% in case of candidates from Backward class categories and PWD belonging to Maharashtra State only). The selection for the MTech programme offered at MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi depends on the valid GATE score obtained by the applicants.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi MTech programme if I scored 60% in BTech?
faqs.answer: The eligibility of MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi MTech programme requires the candidates to score a minimum aggregate of 50% in Bachelor’s degree in the relevant field of Engineering and Technology (45% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and PWD belonging to Maharashtra State only). The selection however, depends on the GATE score.

faqs.question: What are the specialisations provided in M.Tech course in MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi?
faqs.answer: MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi offers a two-year postgraduate degree in Master of Engineering in two specialisations. Students can choose their desired specialisation between M.Tech in Computer Engineering and M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering. Interested students who fulfill the can visit the official website of MITAOE to fill the application form.

faqs.question: When can I apply for M.Tech admission at MITAOE Pune?
faqs.answer: MITAOE Pune is currently accepting regitsrations for M.Tech admissions. However, the admission is based on the GATE score of the candidates. Hence, candidates must timley apply and appear for GATE. The exam is usually conducted in February. The application process usually starts around May of the year preceding the admission year. Candidates must also stay updated on the MHTCET M.Tech counselling dates for seat allocation.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission into MIT Academy of Engineering for MTech?
faqs.answer: MTech admission at MIT Academy of Engineering is entrance-based. The institute accepts GATE scores to provide M.Tech admission to eligible applicants. Seats are allocated through the Common Admission Process (CAP) conducted by the MHT DTE. Candidates are required to clear the MITAOE Mtech cut-off to secure admission in addition to fulfilling the course-specific eligibility criteria. Hence, getting direct admission to the two-year M.Tech programme may not be possible. However, candidates can cont

faqs.question: Is MIT Academy of Engineering a private college?
faqs.answer: MIT Academic of Engineering, Alandi is an Empowered Autonomous Engineering college. The college is affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU). Students looking to get into any of the courses offered at the college need to satisfy the preset admission criteria of the same. Interested students can learn more about the college and its courses by visiting the official website of MITAOE Alandi.

faqs.question: Is MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi admission entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Yes, MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi admission is mainly entrance-based. The college accepts applicants based on their performance in the accepted exams. Students looking to get admission into the BTech programme must either appear for the MHTCET or provide valid JEE Mains score. Similarly, M.Tech admissions are done based on GATE and MHTCET M.Tech scores. Candidates looking to get into the doctoral programme need to either appear for GATE/ SPPU PET or the institute-level test; MITAOE PET.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MIT Academy of Engineering, Alandi?
faqs.answer: If you want to get admission in MIT Academy of Engineering, you must meet the admission criteria of the preferred course. The academy shortlists students mainly on an entrance basis. You also need to register for the CAP process based on which admission offer is made. If you get selected, then you have to pay the admission fees to confirm your admission at MITAOE Alandi.

faqs.question: What are the entrance exams accepted for various courses at MIT Academy of Engineering Alandi?
faqs.answer: MIT Academy of Engineering (MITAOE) Alandi offers two undergraduate (BTech, BDes) and one post graduate programme (MTech) in several specialisations. Admission to all three programmes is based on the scores of relevant entrance exams. Here’s the list of the entrance exams for each course:BTech: JEE Main or MHT CETBDes: MAH AAC CETMTech: GATE

paragraphs: The placements are going on for the Class of 2025. The current report states that 213 students have been successfully placed in leading companies. The highest package offered during MITAOE placements 2025 stood at INR 23.2 LPA. Earlier, the participating recruiters placed 504 students of the batch 2024 with new-age job roles.

The Corporate Relations and Placement Cell at MIT Academy of Engineering arranges engaging sessions with industry experts. These sessions offer soft-skills training to prepare students for the corporate world. Additionally, the Placement Cell is dedicated to providing outstanding employment possibilities and helps in achieving student goals. Thereby, it is committed to developing students into future industrialists. The Cell focuses on developing students' personalities by conducting aptitude exams and also gives equal importance to education and training.

reviews.review_text: Here’s a short and clear overview of infrastructure for course and hostel facilities at MIT Academy of Engineering (MITAOE), Alandi, useful for exams, reports, or placements. MITAOE, Alandi, offers modern and well equipped infrastructure for engineering and management courses, with smart classrooms, advanced laboratories, computer centers, and a digital library. It access to online journals and e-books. Each department has labs and research centers supporting hands-on learning. The college provi...

reviews.review_heading: College is good. Decent environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent, and the hostel is good. Hostel is far from the college, which is the biggest demerit. The infrastructure is small but decent, as it has a block and lift facility, and also the best dome at opening, which makes it awesome too and good to see.

reviews.review_heading: The college is all about academics, which means the placement, your personal growth and skills.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, but the infrastructure of the college is just about interior, not the outside. Construction is going on, so there is also a little bit of noise and all. The college library is so good. Also, there is no proper ground for sports. MIT AOE's infrastructure is generally reviewed as very good, with positive comments on its peaceful and well-maintained campus, large and airy classrooms, and a blend of modern and traditional architecture. The college has separate buildings for diffe...

reviews.review_heading: Review of MIT Academy of Engineering, MAEER.
reviews.review_text: The campus looks a bit old and small, but all the necessary facilities are available. The campus is divided into wings labeled A-F. All wings have their own Wi-Fi, toilets, and drinking water filters. There is one big library with air conditioning.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with teaching but infrastructure and campus are not satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: Some buildings have Wi-Fi but some don't. Classrooms are okay and labs are also okay. All practicals in the lab are done properly. Canteen is also good and food available is fresh and healthy. Sports and games are not that much. College hostel is too much costly. College library is also satisfied.

reviews.review_heading: MIT Academy of Engineering, MAEER is not worth.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available only in the college library and the Internet section. MIT Academy of Engineering has built a new hostel this year, but many students cannot afford college housing. The food quality in the college canteen is fairly good, but the canteen is very small; at one time, only 70 to 80 students can be seated. There are no medical facilities available on campus, and sports activities are not provided.

reviews.review_heading: MITAOE Alandi Campus, infrastructure, curriculum overall review.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, and while the classrooms are decent overall, the desks need to be changed. MITAOE offers a well-developed infrastructure for engineering courses. The classrooms are spacious, well-lit, and equipped with projectors and whiteboards to support smart teaching methods. The college provides high-speed Wi-Fi in all academic blocks, which is particularly helpful for research and coding tasks. Each department has its dedicated laboratories with up-to-date equipme...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with some of the faculty, as they have a good level of knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is not good because it has no grounds for playing, and the labs lack proper facilities. The laptops and PCs are not functioning properly, and the ventilation system is inadequate; it feels very hot inside the lab. In the hostel, there are many problems: Wi-Fi is not working properly, and the facilities are lacking.

reviews.review_heading: The academics are very good and the placement record is also good.
reviews.review_text: I'm staying at the MIT hostel only. The infrastructure is good, and the facilities are also decent. I think that the only problem is that it is located in Alandi, which is not well developed. Also, faculty members are decent, they help you in many aspects.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive environment with decent infrastructure, needs improvement in faculty engagement.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are equipped with projectors and Wi-Fi. Labs for computer engineering are well-maintained, with decent systems and internet. However, some hardware is outdated and needs upgrades. The library is good with a wide range of technical books and a quiet study environment.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good but we have to work hard for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good but they are developing it for good. Classrooms are good but in the summer, we may have some problems as classrooms do not have any AC and only fans are available. Labs do have ACs and the library does not charge any fees for cards. Wi-Fi is available in every building, There are 2 canteens on our campus. The food quality is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good. If students want a big campus, then this college is not for them.
reviews.review_text: The hostel fee is so much overpriced, so they do not even justify the faculty members they are providing. Labs are very old. MIT Academy of Engineering (MITAOE) in Alandi, Pune, is generally well-regarded, particularly for its strong placement record and focus on practical learning. The institute's location in Alandi, away from the city bustle, is seen as a plus for those seeking a peaceful environment.

reviews.review_heading: Experience of college life.
reviews.review_text: The institute provides spacious lecture halls equipped with comfortable seating and necessary teaching aids. Laboratories are well-furnished with essential equipment to facilitate practical learning. Wi-Fi connectivity is available in some classrooms and the hostel areas.

review_content.General: The infrastructure is very well maintained on the campus. Every department has a different building with a library administration office and a canteen. My department has faculty rooms, labs, study rooms, and classrooms. Every building has Wi-Fi facilities throughout. Hostel accommodation is also really nice, and rooms are cleaned on alternate days. There is a clinic, an arena for indoor sports, a gym, football and cricket grounds, an outdoor gym, and basketball courts beside the hostel buildings. The mess food has an average taste, but they serve a variety. For now, there are 2 mess buildings.

review_content.Placements: The Manipal Bangalore campus is relatively new, having started 5 years ago, so only one batch has graduated so far. The number of students enrolled in the first batch was very small (just a few hundred), and approximately only 55% of them got placed. The highest CTC was reported to be 40 LPA. Companies like Nvidia, Wipro, Amazon, and others were recruiting.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college’s infrastructure is truly impressive. The hostels are very well maintained and include all housekeeping and cleaning facilities. The food provided is also very good. There's also an overnight delivery option available. The academic buildings are well maintained, and all classrooms and labs have good, well-functioning ACs along with comfortable tables and chairs.
