reviews.review_heading: Good exposure to lots of people from different states.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are so good. They are so spacious and the ventilation is also so good. Wi-Fi connection is also not bad but it gets disconnected sometimes.

reviews.review_heading: The Manipal experience.
reviews.review_text: Labs are pretty good. The Wi-Fi is average. Classrooms are great. The hostel is too good. They clean my room every single day so it is very hygienic. Mess food is also pretty great. We get chicken every alternate day and chicken biryani on Sunday.

reviews.review_heading: A short review of MIT Bengaluru.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided are very good. There is Wi-Fi all around the campus. Labs are available, classrooms have AC, good lighting, and an e-learning platform. The library also has multiple resources for your preparation. The hostel is also very good, with a whole block for indoor games and a gym called Marina Complex. Two messes are available for your choice, both offering good food. There Is also a clinic in our hostel for emergencies and an ambulance available 24/7. Multiple canteens and general ...

reviews.review_heading: Manipal Institute of Technology, Bengaluru.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent with campus area being very huge. Mess is available in hostels and separate hostels for both girls and boys are available. Wi-Fi facility are available in hostels. Fields for sports and courts are also available in campus area.

reviews.review_heading: Overall a good college with all facilities and with a good placement and internship chance.
reviews.review_text: New updated course and infrastructure are top quality, being a new college and of Manipal. Wi-Fi is spread all over the campus, and you would receive good enough speed to get your work done. Hostels are good, room cleaning is done every 2-3 days. Mess food is better than most colleges in India. Manipal has its own hospital, so medical facilities are great. All the sports facilities are available; outdoor ones are free, for indoor you have to take a subscription, costing 24,000 yearly. This inclu...

reviews.review_heading: Fee is high - but worth it!
reviews.review_text: The rooms of the hostel look nothing less than a 3-star hotel. Every day room cleaners come and clean the room. The college infrastructure is so well built and maintained and some other blocks are yet to be constructed. The menu is good and we have opportunities to participate in sports events. There is a sick bay and the doctors there are well-qualified enough. WiFi is available for 24 hours with good speed.

reviews.review_heading: College life at Manipal Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are big and digitally equipped. We have two mess providers that offer hygienic food and a variety of options. For sports, there are grounds for cricket, football, tennis, and basketball. The sickbay is open 24 hours, and there is a hospital 10 km away that covers most costs for serious problems.

reviews.review_heading: Manipal Institute of Technology, Bengaluru
reviews.review_text: The academic block is very spacious, and for MIT, we have two blocks—one is fully constructed while the other is still half-built. We have two mess providers that offer hygienic food and a variety of options. For sports, we have different grounds, including cricket and football, as well as tennis courts and basketball courts.

reviews.review_heading: Campus of MIT Bengaluru.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are big and provide a good place for learning. The hostel has both three-sharing and two-sharing rooms for students. The mess is small, and students often have to wait in long lines to get food. For sports, there are cricket and football grounds, tennis courts, and basketball courts.

reviews.review_heading: Mit Bengaluru is good if you're rich.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and hostel rooms are really good and well built. The mess is big and can accommodate many students, and the food arrangements are hygienic. For sports, there’s a cricket ground, football ground, tennis courts, and basketball courts, plus a separate arena called Marena in the sports complex.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of IIIT Lucknow - Indian Institute of Information Technology.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good. Good companies visit the college for placements like Google, Zomato, DE Shaw, etc. Students who are good at studying get placements easily. In college, the highest package is 29.85 LPA, and the lowest package is around 26 LPA. Our college has a good environment for studying.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college does not have a good infrastructure. The Wi-Fi connection is good and working fine. Mess food is good as compared to other colleges. Sports facilities are not that good in our college. We have a gym which has a good number of equipment, and anyone can go to the gym.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Top tier in placements and coding culture.

review_content.Placements: Very good placement. Reason for our placements is our coding culture and updated syllabus. Our college average placement is around 30 LPA, which is good. Many top product-based companies visited our college like Google. Many placements are obtained from off-campus. So you need to work hard to obtain a good placement in this job market.
review_content.Infrastructure: A little bit of satisfaction in terms of hostel and infrastructure. For our batch, the hostel was given outside the college. So we need to travel daily. A bus was provided. Temporary hostel is not so good (no Wi-Fi). Hostel is not so clean. There are many insects and pests, including rats. But this is only for the first semester, so if you deal with it for some time (3-4 months), after you shift to college hostel, you will be okay. College hostel is relatively clean and has good Wi-Fi connection. Washing machines are provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Less college life, a small campus, and above-average placements.

content.Placements: Above 90% of people are placed every year. Every girl will be placed, as girls' opportunities are greater. The highest is above 1 crore approximately, the average is 33 lakhs, and the lowest is 12-15 lakhs. Top recruiters are Google, Zomato, GSOC, Meesho, Uber, Rubrik, ServiceNow, Blinkit, Amazon, and JP Morgan, mainly.
content.Infrastructure: Average infrastructure with average Wi-Fi facilities. Average quality of mess and canteen. The course structure is good comparatively because only computer science-related subjects will be taught here, unlike other colleges. A small canteen is available, but all deliveries are available, so no problem with the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of IIIT Lucknow - Indian Institute of Information Technology.

content.Placements: The placements at our college are good but they don't reveal a complete picture. Here it is a good college and the coding culture is amazing but the fact is you have to work hard for those dream packages. Other than that the course curriculum is good and the seniors are helpful. The placements are good. The average package is around 30 LPA and the median is also around 27 or something fabulous. Last year, Google also came to our college. For internships also some companies come to our college.
content.Infrastructure: The mess food is decent enough and the quality is I won't say good but it is certainly not bad. The medical facility is there for students most of the times. Wi-Fi and sports facilities are also fairly good. The hostels they can't accommodate all the students so the 1st year they stay outside the college.

individual_reviews.title: Very good placements, very average infrastructure.

admission_overview.title: IIIT Lucknow Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: IIIT Lucknow Admission 2025 is open. The candidates are selected through national-level examinations conducted by different authorities. IIT Lucknow is famous for its BTech in Computer Science & Engineering and BTech in Artificial Intelligence. IIIT Lucknow offers courses at the UG, PG, PGD, postgraduate diplomas, and Ph.D. levels. These prorgammes are offered across IT, CS, CSAI, Artificial Intelligence, and Machine Learning domains. IIIT Lucknow admissions are offered on the basis of the scores of the national-level exams such as JEE Main, GATE, IIT JAM, etc., followed by a counselling process. The candidates should take the JEE Main exam organised by NTA. Admission is done based on the JEE Main ranks through JoSAA counselling.

paragraphs: Find below the step-wise IIIT Lucknow admission process for all the UG and PG courses for 2025:
1. Qualify for the entrance exam

Students seeking admission to BTech must appear for the JEE Main 2025 exam by applying for the course. MTech and MSc candidates must apply for GATE and IIT Jam, respectively. Similarly, MBA candidates must apply for CUET PG. Check the eligibility criteria on the entrance exam's official website.
2. Counselling

Students have to participate in the counselling process for BTech, MTech, and MSc. Candidates must apply for the BTech via JoSAA counseling, for the MTech via CCMT counselling, and MSc via CCMN counsellingThe bodies.
3. Seat Allocation
JoSAA, CCMT, and CCMN will allocate seats according to the cutoffs for the programme. Candidates must qualify for the cutoff as per the exams.

IIIT Lucknow fees 2025 is betweenINR 1.4 lakh to INR 9.6 lakhfor all the UG, PG, and Diploma courses. The fees include- registration, Provisional Certificate Fee, Tuition Fee, etc. Students must pay a refundable Institute Caution Money ofINR 1000. As for the IIIT Lucknow seats, it offers a limited number of seats for its courses. The institute also offers seats for its reserved categories. Find below course-wise fee and seat details:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: What is the qualification for BTech in IIIT Lucknow?

Therefore, candidates belonging to the General AI category must aim to get a rank of below 1056 to get admission to the college.For more category-wise and branch-wise cutoff ranks, checkthis page.

courses_data.description: The Indian Institute of Information Technology, Lucknow offers two-year MTech course. Admission to the M.Tech course is completely entrance-based. Admission to this course depends on candidates' performance in GATE. Read on to know more about the IIIT Lucknow MTech programme:

faqs.question: Is IIIT Lucknow good for MTech?
faqs.answer: The Indian Institute of Information Technology, Lucknow offers a two-year full-time M.Tech course at the postgraduate level. IIIT Lucknow has successfully concluded 2021-22 placement process for its M.Tech course. IIIT Lucknow average package for the M.Tech course stood atINR 22.10 LPA.So, considering the placements of IIIT Lucknow, it is a decent option for students seeking admission to the M.Tech course. Refer toIIIT Lucknow Placement pagefor more detailed information.

faqs.question: What is the fees for M.Tech at IIIT Lucknow?
faqs.answer: IIIT Lucknow M.Tech fee is INR 4.8 lakh. The fee mentioned here is taken from an unofficial source and is the total tuition fee. Hence, is indicative. Apart from the total tuition fee, a one-time payment of INR 18,500 will also be charged. This one-time fee includes Institute Caution Money, Enrollment Fee, Identity Card Fee, Alumni fund and Institute Development and Maintenance Charges.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to IIIT Lucknow for MTech?
faqs.answer: The Indian Institute of Information Technology, Lucknow admission to the M.Tech course is completely entrance-based. Admission to this course depends on candidates' performance in theGraduate Aptitude Test in Engineering or GATEentrance test, followed byCCMTcounselling process. Interested students must visit the official website of GATE to register themselves.For more details regarding IIIT Lucknow M.Tech admission criteria, selection process, etc., click here.

faqs.question: Is JoSAA counselling fees refundable?
faqs.answer: Yes,   but only after deducting cancellation charges Rs. 1500. However, the refund policy of the counselling fee may differ in accordance with the institution and the specific circumstances related to the payment. For instance, if you do so after the 6th round of JOSAA and after the 5th round result declaration, you cannot get a refund. Please go through their official website or call their helpline for the latest available information as per their refund policy.

placement_data.title: IIIT Lucknow Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The highest and average package offered during IIIT Lucknow BTech placements 2025 was INR 145 LPA and INR 33.71 LPA . Further, the overall placement rate recorded during BTech and MTech courses was 94.1% and 56.2%. For MBA and MSc course, the placement percentage was 71.1% and 64.2% .The highest domestic package and average packages offered to MTech students in 2025 was INR 53 LPA and INR 25.1 LPA . The median package was INR 22 LPA. MTech placement rate was 56.2% .

Highest, average and median package secured by MBA students in 2025 was INR 15 LPA, INR 9.2 LPA and INR 8 LPA. Other than this, highest package in the MSc course was INR 48 LPA while the average package was INR 12.19 LPA.

faqs.question: How are the placements at IIIT Lucknow?
faqs.answer: The institute concluded the 2024 BTech placements with 91% of the batch placed. The overall the highest package stood at INR 62 LPA bagged by BTech students. faqs.question: What is the highest package offered during IIIT Lucknow placements?

faqs.question: What is the hostel fee at IIIT Lucknow?
faqs.answer: The hostel charges for IIIT Lucknow are unknown for the year 2025. According to unofficials sources, the hostel charges at IIIT Lucknow are INR 1.71 lakh. Hostel charges are subject to changes just like every other fee type at IIIT Lucknow. Candidates interested in BTech admissions at IIIT Lucknow are advised to contact its officials and confirm the tuition fees payable by them.

faqs.question: What is the fees for IIIT Lucknow for 2 years MSc course?
faqs.answer: IIIT Lucknow fees for two years MSc course is around INR 2 lakh . Candidates have to report to the allotted institute and get the hard copies of the documents verified and pay the requisite admission fees. The admission fees is inclusive of mutliple other components such as Caution Money, Enrollment Fee, Identity Card Fee, Alumni fund and Institute Development and Maintenance Charges. *This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Is JoSAA counselling fees refundable?
faqs.answer: Yes, but only after deducting cancellation charges Rs. 1500. However, the refund policy of the counselling fee may differ in accordance with the institution and the specific circumstances related to the payment. For instance, if you do so after the 6th round of JOSAA and after the 5th round result declaration, you cannot get a refund. Please go through their official website or call their helpline for the latest available information as per their refund policy.

faqs.question: What is the hostel fee for MBA students at IIIT Lucknow?
faqs.answer: At IIIT Lucknow, hostel charges are different for male and female students. For male students of MBA at IIIT Lucknow, the hostel charges are INR 84,960. For female students, the hostel charges amount to INR 52,000. The hostel charges have been divided into 4 instalments for both male and female students. The instalments cost INR 21,240 and INR 13,000 each for male and femal students respectively.

description: IIIT Lucknow cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIIT Lucknow JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last 8 years of IIIT Lucknow JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIIT Lucknow JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIIT Lucknow CSE cutoff 2025 was 9947 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the IIIT Lucknow B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 9947 and 13233 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 9947 and 10468, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence and B.Tech. in Computer science and Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIIT Lucknow. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIIT Lucknow to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of IIIT Lucknow. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisation was M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with last round cutoff score of 534, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff score was 534. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff score was 481 in the AI quota.
Comparing the cutoff range, the competition was higher for the General AI category students as compared to the OBC category students. For other categories' cutoff scores, use the provided filters.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at IIIT Lucknow - Indian Institute of Information Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

IIIT Lucknow CCMN cutoff 2026 is yet to be released for admission to the MSc/MSc Tech courses. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view the specialisation-wise 2025 cutoff details for the General AI category students. During the IIIT Lucknow MSc cutoff 2025, the last round closing ranks varied between 531 and 1056. Of all the specialisations, the one with the lowest cutoff rank of 531 was M.Sc. in Data Science in the General AI category. This indicates that this specialis

The maximum cutoff rank required for MSc admission was 1056 in the General AI quota. This indicates that students with a cutoff rank below the mentioned rank here have higher chances of getting admission to their desired specialisations. The cutoff ranks vary across different rounds, categories and specialisations.
Within the MSc course, the top two most competitive specialisations were M.Sc. in Data Science and M.Sc. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, with last round closing ranks

CCMN is the centralised platform for admissions to the MSc and MSc (Tech Programmes) at NITs, IIEST Shibpur, and some CFTI institutes that accept the IIT JAM scorecard. This year, CCMN counselling was conducted for three regular rounds and two special rounds for MSc admission across different participating institutes. Candidates preparing for IIIT Lucknow admission can refer to the table below to view or download the year- and round-wise CCMN cutoff list.

Considering the last round of IIIT Lucknow CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branche, including Computer Science and Engineering, witnessed highest cutoff for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

For the OBC category students under the AI quota, the GATE 2025 cutoff score was 481, with M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering being the most challenging for admission. Candidates can use the filters below to view the cutoff scores across different rounds, categories and quotas.

hostel_campus.college_name: IIIT Lucknow Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostels are available with Air-conditioned mess and common room facilities along with an experienced caretaker round the clock for any emergency situations. All kinds of recreational facilities including basketball, badminton court, table tennis and gymnasium have been provided in both the hostels. Night canteens within both the boys and girls hostel premises facilitate the dietary requirements of the students after the normal dining hours.
facilities: Students aspiring to take admission to the BTech programme are required to appear for the exam by filling out the JEE Main application form.
For admission to M.Tech at IIIT Lucknow, Students will have to register for GATE exam

The library has a capacity to accommodate up to 100 students at a time.

reviews.review_heading: Less college life, a small campus, and above-average placements.
reviews.review_text: Average infrastructure with average Wi-Fi facilities. Average quality of mess and canteen. The course structure is good comparatively because only computer science-related subjects will be taught here, unlike other colleges. A small canteen is available, but all deliveries are available, so no problem with the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIIT Lucknow - Indian Institute of Information Technology.
reviews.review_text: The mess food is decent enough and the quality is I won't say good but it is certainly not bad. The medical facility is there for students most of the times. Wi-Fi and sports facilities are also fairly good. The hostels they can't accommodate all the students so the 1st year they stay outside the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIIT Lucknow - Indian Institute of Information Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not have a good infrastructure. The Wi-Fi connection is good and working fine. Mess food is good as compared to other colleges. Sports facilities are not that good in our college. We have a gym which has a good number of equipment, and anyone can go to the gym.

reviews.review_heading: Top tier in placements and coding culture.
reviews.review_text: A little bit of satisfaction in terms of hostel and infrastructure. For our batch, the hostel was given outside the college. So we need to travel daily. A bus was provided. Temporary hostel is not so good (no Wi-Fi). Hostel is not so clean. There are many insects and pests, including rats. But this is only for the first semester, so if you deal with it for some time (3-4 months), after you shift to college hostel, you will be okay. College hostel is relatively clean and has good Wi-Fi connection...

reviews.review_heading: Very good placements, very average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi does not work properly. The infrastructure is bad. The library is not open throughout the complete day. Hostel facilities are very bad. The hostel is outside the campus. The mess is decent. Washrooms are bad. Water facility is bad. Drinking water is at its worst phase.

reviews.review_heading: IIIT Lucknow - The institute of national importance.
reviews.review_text: This institution provides every kind of modern facility, including Wi-Fi, computer labs, a fully equipped library, and air-conditioned digital classrooms. Hostels are available, but they are the only negative point. However, you will be provided with all the necessary equipment for your studies. There is also a dedicated mess for students, where the food is decent, although only vegetarian options are available.

reviews.review_heading: The faculties are highly qualified and replacement is also very high
reviews.review_text: The quality of food is very good whereas the canteen in our college is small. If you talk of the sports then there is carrom board, gymnastics, table tennis etc. There is a sports and yoga instructor in our college also. There is a medical room present in our college.

reviews.review_heading: If u are study oriented, you can join this college .
reviews.review_text: Overall the infrastructure is good. All the basic facilities are available in my college. The building is beautiful. Classrooms are big and awesome. Medical facilities are available too. Hostel is decent. We have Wi-Fi and electricity supply, which is also good but the  mess food is not very good .

reviews.review_heading: IIIT Lucknow- Placements are quite impressive.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available here are moderate. The hostel accommodation is quite dissatisfying for boys, as they have to live in rooms that are 10 or 12-seaters, which is a bane for introverts. The food quality given in the mess is decent. The classrooms are equipped with ACs, smart boards, and are a good place to study.

reviews.review_heading: College is worth it for placement and coding culture but not for a good college life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is a bit average. Wi-Fi speed is not up to par in every area of college. Labs are well maintained. Classrooms have comfortable chairs and sitting capacity. The quality of hostels is below average, which is not good for boys but better for girls.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for placement with a best coding culture.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is in developing condition. The college has sufficient Wi-Fi speed, approximately 400 Mbps. There are also labs available. As students are living in combined rooms, if they feel any disturbance, they can go to the lab or library. Classrooms are good, with a bench strength of up to 200 students. The food in the mess is not too good but okay. The canteen is open during the day and night until 2 AM. Medical facilities are not available at the moment. For sports, there is a footba...

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with the college .
reviews.review_text:
The campus is very nice, as there are two hostels on campus: a three-member room for girls and a dome-type hostel for boys. 
Hostel charges are minimal, around 3k–5k, depending on your choice of room. 
Fully AC classrooms and labs are there that are accessible 24*7. Medical facilities are very nice; a medical room with a medical staff is present in the college. Sports facilities are good, not excellent .

reviews.review_heading: B.Teach in Information technology course from the IIITL.
reviews.review_text: This college provides a good infrastructure for our course. For our course, all the required facilities are provided by the students. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, parking, sports etc. facilities were available for the students. All these facilities were of good quality and well maintained by the management.

reviews.review_heading: Things to know before taking admission into IIITL.
reviews.review_text: There is no proper hostel for boys, as girls and boy hostels are not separate. Girls occupy the 1st, 2nd, and 3rd floors, while boys are on the ground, 4th, and 5th floors. Boys are also placed in dormitories, with 12 boys in a single room. The medical facility is not up to the mark, but the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good. Mess is good. But hostels are like a hospital.
reviews.review_text: Hostels for the first year are away from the campus (boys and girls are accommodated on campus), approximately 1.5 km. Mess quality is good. The menu has diverse items. The menu is made in such a way that it covers items from all the regions, from south to north.

data.description: IIIT Lucknow has over 45+ faculty members and 13 non-faculty staff. Most of the faculty members have a doctoral-level degree from top IIT colleges. All these faculty members have excellent experience in their streams.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about IIIT Lucknow - Indian Institute of Information Technology

likes.text: Top recruiting companies here were prestigious companies like Amazon, Google, Microsoft, LinkedIn, Flipkart, Samsung, Paytm, TCL, Wipro and many more.
The placement cell of IIIT Lucknow is far better than any other college, even in a very less time.

The food served in the mess is average, but we have a subsidised night canteen which serves tasty food at low prices.

reviews_list.review_title: My overall college life experience.

review_content.Placements: The overall placement record of our college is decent, and it is improving with each upcoming batch. This year, the highest package for the B.Tech course is around 56 LPA, which is a pretty nice record. The college organizes pre-placement drives in the final year to make the students placement-ready and boost their performance. The median package record for my course is around 8 LPA-9 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure of the college and hostel is top-tier. The classrooms and labs are digitalized. The lectures are delivered through PPTs, and practical implementations are conducted in the smart labs. The hostel rooms are well furnished, and the overall facilities are much better. Sports, gym, and other facilities are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: BCA (AI & Data Science) with academic support of IBM & powered by Microsoft Certifications - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The review is that overall, good decision-making to study in this college.

review_content.Placements: About the placement, overall, 75 to 85 percent of the students are placed in or off campus. The highest package in this course is 56.6 LPA, the average is 7 LPA to 8 LPA, and the lowest is 3.5 LPA to 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Deloitte, etc. Roles offered are data analytics and AI engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good because it gives us a wide range of opportunities for a successful and bright future. Labs and classrooms are also given good facilities like a smart board, and Wi-Fi is the most important thing in any college to make a bright future for the student. Mess of our hostel is also good, canteens are well cleaned and well-maintained. The most important thing is hygiene, which is well judged. Sports facilities are very good, and a wide variety of games are available.

course_faqs.question: If I qualify for two BPharm scholarships at KRMU, which one will I get?
course_faqs.answer: Candidates pursuing a BPharm course at KR Mangalam University can apply for the various scholarships offered at the university. If a BPharm student secured 97% in his/her Class 12 and is also eligible for an alumni scholarship then, they will be entitled to only one award whichever is higher. That means the student will get awarded according to the one scholarship which provides a better amount, financial aid and financial concession over fees.

course_faqs.question: How can I get a BPharm scholarship at KR Mangalam University?
course_faqs.answer: The merit-based scholarships for BPharm prpogramme at KR Mangalam University are based on candidates' Class 12 examination marks. The scholarship percentage is determined by the Class 12 percentage, with 25% for 80% to less than 85%, 35% for 85% to less than 90%, and 100% for 90% and above. The scholarship amount is deducted from the semester fee at the time of registration, and additional instalments may be paid by cheque if the student fulfils specific criteria.Some basic eligibility criteria

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy of KR Mangalam University?
overview_faqs.answer: Students seeking cancellation of admission are eligible for refund of academic fee. Any notice of withdrawal prior to the date of commencement of classes (1st Day of Induction Program) is eligible for 100% refund. KR Mangalam University follow the below refund policy:ApplicationDeductionRefundWithin 15 days from the date ofcommencement of Classes (1st Day ofInduction Programme)75%100%After 15 days from the commencementof classes (1st Day of InductionProgramme)0% 0%

overview_faqs.question: What is the total fees for BSc courses at KR Mangal University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fees for the BSc programme at KR Mangalam University range between INR 2.7 lakh and 6 .5 lakh. The amount of tuition fee varies, depending on the specialisation selected by the student. In addition, the fee for the three-year BSc programme, and four-year BSc (Hons.) degree courses have different tuition fees. The hostel fee for BSc at KR Mangalam University is INR 5 lakh to INR 8.2 lakh annually. The amount of hostel fees are same for both boys and girls hostel. The fee mentioned is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: KR Mangalam University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) with academic support of IBM - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Approximately 50 percent of the students gets places with an average package of 6 LPA to 7 LPA. Major companies like Infosys, Microsoft, Google, etc., come on campus for placements. For my course major roles offered are Data Scientist, Data Analyst, DBA, etc. Course is designed to make students interview ready.
content.Infrastructure: College have really good infrastructure with some of the best labs like AI and robotics lab, printing lab, and multiple computer labs with good Wi-Fi and internet connection. After academics there is a big football turf and multiple sport facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) with academic support of IBM - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Most of the students got placed, with average package going up to 6LPA to 7 LPA, big companies are regular at campus and in my course. Most students got an excellent package in good companies with the support of the academic structure, which is designed to tackle interview-related questions and domain-specific ones, such as Data Scientist, Data analysis, DBA, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a good and efficient infrastructure with labs across every specialisation, such as robotics lab, printing lab, multiple computer labs with the latest technologies. Wi-Fi connectivity is excellent with coverage across campus. Apart from academics, we have a good football ground, cricket nets, and multiple sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) with academic support of IBM - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My overall college life experience.

content.Placements: The overall placement record of our college is decent, and it is improving with each upcoming batch. This year, the highest package for the B.Tech course is around 56 LPA, which is a pretty nice record. The college organizes pre-placement drives in the final year to make the students placement-ready and boost their performance. The median package record for my course is around 8 LPA-9 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure of the college and hostel is top-tier. The classrooms and labs are digitalized. The lectures are delivered through PPTs, and practical implementations are conducted in the smart labs. The hostel rooms are well furnished, and the overall facilities are much better. Sports, gym, and other facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: BCA (AI & Data Science) with academic support of IBM & powered by Microsoft Certifications - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The review is that overall, good decision-making to study in this college.

content.Placements: About the placement, overall, 75 to 85 percent of the students are placed in or off campus. The highest package in this course is 56.6 LPA, the average is 7 LPA to 8 LPA, and the lowest is 3.5 LPA to 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Deloitte, etc. Roles offered are data analytics and AI engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good because it gives us a wide range of opportunities for a successful and bright future. Labs and classrooms are also given good facilities like a smart board, and Wi-Fi is the most important thing in any college to make a bright future for the student. Mess of our hostel is also good, canteens are well cleaned and well-maintained. The most important thing is hygiene, which is well judged. Sports facilities are very good, and a wide variety of games are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotheraphy (BPT) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a great university to gain knowledge and experience.

content.Placements: The university has tie-ups with top healthcare companies such as CK Birla Hospital, Sarvodaya Hospital, Artemis Hospital, morengo asian hospital, Asian Hospital, Sports Authority of India, Max Healthcare Institute Ltd., and many others. The university also provides its students with paid internships.
content.Infrastructure: The university has specialized labs for practical learning. The campus has free Wi-Fi, is fully air-conditioned, has sports grounds, a parking lot, etc. I never had any problems related to ragging, the quality of food, etc. I like the campus, it's big and well-maintained.

admission_overview.title: KR Mangalam University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: K.R. Mangalam University (KRMU) admission 2026 is entrance based for most of the courses. The university conducts KR Mangalam Entrance Exam or KREE for admission to UG and PG courses. The university offers more than 100 courses at UG, PG, diploma, and PhD levels through its 12 schools. K.R. Mangalam University offers courses in Management, Commerce, Engineering, Computer Application, Education and other streams. The university offers courses in collaboration with organisations and universities like IBM, Xebia, Samatrix, the University of Florida, and the University of Houston.

paragraphs: KR Mangalam Universityadmission processincludes the application process, selection round, cutoff, merit list or counselling, and other steps. The university offers over 100 courses. Check below the KR Mangalam University admission process:

lists: Application Process:The mode of application is online for all courses. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 to apply for admission.

Selection Rounds:The university conducts KREE for admission to UG and PG courses. Apirants can also get admission based on their scores in CUET-UG, CUET-PG or any other accepted entrance exams. Selected candidates also need to pass the personal interview round,

Merit List & Counselling:The university releases a merit list after completion of all selection rounds. The shortlisted aspirants are called for counselling. After document verification, candidates need to pay theKR Mangalam University feesto confirm the allotted seat at the university.

courses_data.name: KR Mangalam University BTech Admission 2026
courses_data.description: KR Mangalam University offers BTech for four-years at the UG level. The course is divided into eight semesters. Aspirants need to complete Class 12 to apply for BTech. Admission to BTech programme is based on KREE/ CUET-UG scores of the aspirants. The university may also accept other entrance exams for admission to BTech programme. The university offers BTech in below specialisations: Find more information about the eligibility selection criteria, and fees for KR Mangalam University BE/BTech admission 2026 below:

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech at KR Mangalam University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must pass Class 12 with Physics & Mathematics as mandatory subjects with Chemistry/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ Information Technology/ Biology/ Informatics Practices/Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational subject/ Agriculture/Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship with a minimum of 50% aggregate to apply for BTech at KR Mangalam University.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at KR Mangalam University?
faqs.answer: KR Mangalam University offers a four-year BTech course divided into eight semesters. The university offers BTech programme in below specialisations:Computer ScienceComputer Science and Engineering (Robotics & AI) with Academic Support of IBM & powered by Microsoft CertificationsComputer Science and Engineering (AI & ML) with academic support of IBM & powered by Microsoft CertificationsCSE (Cybersecurity) with academic support of EC-Council & IBMCSE (Data Science) with academic support of IBMCSE

faqs.question: Who is the conducting authority of KREE?
faqs.answer: KREE is the gateway for getting admission to preferred undergraduate and postgraduate programmes offered by the University. The admission procedure includes appearing for entrance test and attending faculty-led entrance test.

courses_data.name: KR Mangalam MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: K.R. Mangalam University collaborates with IBM to offer a two-year MBA program spanning four semesters. Candidates must complete graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate to apply for MBA. The School of Management and Commerce provides MBA in below specialisations:

faqs.question: Is MBA available at KR Mangalam University?
faqs.answer: Yes, MBA is a two-year course offered in collaboration with IBM. The curriculum of MBA is divided into four semesters. KR Mangalam University offers MBA through the School of Management and Commerce. The university offers MBA in below specialisations:MBA (HR/ Marketing/ Finance/ IB/ Product Marketing/ Business Analytics/ IT/ Entrepreneurship/ Operations Management)MBA (Digital Marketing) with academic support of IIDEMBA (Fintech) with academic support of Ernst & Young (EY)

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for MBA admission at KR Mangalam University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must hold a valid CUET-PG or any other accepted entrance exam scores to apply for the MBA course. Aspirants who have not qualified any of the accepted entrance exam can appear for the KREE conducted by the university. Further, shortlisted candidates are required to come for PI round. After the completion of the selection rounds, aspirants need to attend the counselling and document verification round. Only after the payment of course fee, admission is confirmed in the university.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at KR Mangalam University?
faqs.answer: KR Mangalam University course admissions are primarily entrance-based. The university accepts several state and national-level exams for admission. It also conducts its entrance exam, known as  theKR Entrance Exam (KREE)for admission to its specific courses. Some of the other entrance exams accepted by the university include CUET UG, CUET PG, etc. Candidates willing to get admission to the university must apply online on its official website.

faqs.question: Is CUET exam registration open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Common University Entrance Test (CUET) 2026 registration commenced at cuet.nta.nic.in. NTA released the CUET 2026 notification on January 03 and reopened the window on February 23. Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, theCUET registration 2026process commenced online at the official website. Candidates willing to appear for the CUET 2026 exam must have completed complete the application form online. Additionally, before filling application form, candidates must make sure that they have fulfilled the prescribedCUET eligibility criteriato qualify for the entrance exam.

faqs.question: Does KR Mangalam University charge an application fee?
faqs.answer: Yes, KR Mangalam University does charge an application fee of INR 1,000 on each application. Applications are accepted strictly in the online mode and hence, payment of application fee must also be completed in the online mode.

faqs.question: Are applications at KR Mangalam University accepted online or offline?
faqs.answer: KR Mangalam University accepts applications strictly in the online mode. Apply by going to the official KR Mangalam University website. Offline applications are not entertained by the university. Ensure that the minimum eligibility for the preferred porgramme is met before applying for admission to the same. If not met, application will not be considered for admission.

The spaces across the hostel have been designed to promote bonds of friendship, community, and open interactions. Don’t worry about your child’s safety because our hostels are equipped with 24/7 security and surveillance gear, ensuring a perfectly secure perimeter for your child. The wardens and guards are serious about your child’s safety and have a responsive and supportive nature towards the students.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: College have really good infrastructure with some of the best labs like AI and robotics lab, printing lab, and multiple computer labs with good Wi-Fi and internet connection. After academics there is a big football turf and multiple sport facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good and efficient infrastructure with labs across every specialisation, such as robotics lab, printing lab, multiple computer labs with the latest technologies. Wi-Fi connectivity is excellent with coverage across campus. Apart from academics, we have a good football ground, cricket nets, and multiple sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: My overall college life experience.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the college and hostel is top-tier. The classrooms and labs are digitalized. The lectures are delivered through PPTs, and practical implementations are conducted in the smart labs. The hostel rooms are well furnished, and the overall facilities are much better. Sports, gym, and other facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The review is that overall, good decision-making to study in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good because it gives us a wide range of opportunities for a successful and bright future. Labs and classrooms are also given good facilities like a smart board, and Wi-Fi is the most important thing in any college to make a bright future for the student. Mess of our hostel is also good, canteens are well cleaned and well-maintained. The most important thing is hygiene, which is well judged. Sports facilities are very good, and a wide variety of games are ava...

reviews.review_heading: It is a great university to gain knowledge and experience.
reviews.review_text: The university has specialized labs for practical learning. The campus has free Wi-Fi, is fully air-conditioned, has sports grounds, a parking lot, etc. I never had any problems related to ragging, the quality of food, etc. I like the campus, it's big and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review from a journalism student.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides good food for one month at the start of the semester, and then the quality of the food deteriorates every week. The lunch and dinner in the mess are sometimes full of insects and hair. The canteen on the college campus is good and provides affordable and hygienic meals.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best place for higher education, with the best placement and the best campus.
reviews.review_text: Everything is perfect, everything is on time, the staff is good, the washrooms are clean, the food feels like home food, and it is also very tasty. Well-maintained and green campus. Overall, the hostel provides a safe and comfortable living environment for students.

reviews.review_heading: Life of a B.A. (JMC) student.
reviews.review_text: Good 4 blocks, one sunken ground, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library is very big and good. I used to believe we were burning round the edge of something beautiful, something beautiful. Say go through the darkest of days, heaven and heartbreak away; never let.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good and the faculty is also friendly.
reviews.review_text: The network is not so good in this campus for the Sun network and Wi-Fi too. Sometimes there is no network at all. Wi-Fi are to slow and the laboratories are good enough for the students to study and not all the equipments are present but there is enough equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college has nice Infrastructure, it has a huge ground, a big building with three blocks, A, B, C And D soon coming to join. Each block is designed for specific classes for specific batch like B.Tech, BPT Law and everything. A block is the Best in infrastructure. It has lift and everything working perfectly.

reviews.review_heading: I am very much satisfied and very good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well designed, with the best hardware PCs in place and fully Wi-Fi enabled labs. Classrooms are well designed with LED panels. The library is very well maintained, and all the materials are available.

reviews.review_heading: Strong academics, quality teaching, and brilliant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries are provided and are of the best quality. The quality of hostels is good and worth it. Security is high for safety purposes. Medical facilities are provided. Cricket ground, football ground, etc., are also available for sports.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at K. R. Mangalam University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The campus is lively. The library and labs are well-equipped. Many indoor and outdoor games are provided to make the campus life interesting. The mess and canteen serve good-quality food. Students are required to obtain permission to enter or leave the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Beautiful place. Must come.
reviews.review_text: Well-maintained infrastructure. AC rooms and labs are available. Clean environment.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good university, as here they believe in upgrading themselves so they can become better.
reviews.review_text: My course, when I started my course here, there was a library with Wi-Fi connection, classrooms without Wi-Fi, and good labs. Now they have upgraded everything in the university. The library with Wi-Fi, a computer lab with an Ethernet connection to do work or study. Also, classrooms now have projectors and Wi-Fi. The labs are the same as before; overall, the infrastructure is excellent now. I am from Jaipur, started my course in 2023, and have been living in the hostel since the start, the facil...

college_info.intro: Netaji Subhash Engineering College popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech students can make use of the well-equipped labs with sophisticated instruments and softwares such as Programmable Logic Controller (PLC), Digital Storage Oscilloscope, LABVIEW, NI DAQ, and others. Netaji Subhash Engineering College students are able to build themselves more industry ready and as the employable Engineers who can drive innovation and can also add value to the organisation they work for. NSEC Kolkata students are placed in top companies such as Amazon, Cognizant, and others. Below mentioned are some of the Netaji Subhash Engineering College courses and their respective eligibility and Netaji Subhash Engineering College fee:

Some of the specialisations include Applied Electronics & Instrumentation Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, and others. At the PG level, the college offers MTech, MBA, and others programmes to students. The college also offers diploma and other courses to students. reviews_list.review_title: I am very much convinced after choosing this college.

review_content.Placements: Around 80-85 percent of students have been placed in our college in recent years. The highest is around 60 LPA, and the average is around 6-7 LPA. Top companies that visit our campus are TCS, Wipro, Deloitte, Accenture, LTI, Mindtree, HP, and startups.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs and the class are bigger in size. Teachers are well qualified and have a great hands-on experience of teaching in a professional manner. There is no college hostel, you will have to search for a PG or a mess near the college, or a flat that you have to take.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Great placements and good faculty.

review_content.Placements: Placement of Netaji Subhash Engineering is very good. More than 90% of eligible students who have skills get easily placed in top companies like Amazon, Google, Wipro, TCS, LTMindTree, etc. The average package is around 7 LPA and the highest package is 64 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is not too big. The college has a well-equipped lab with all the facilities, such as modern instruments. The Wi-Fi connectivity has high-speed internet. Classrooms have AC. The college has a cafeteria and a canteen. There is a badminton court where students can play in their free time.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and hostel facilities.

review_content.Placements: Amazon, Google, Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Accenture, Deloitte, and Capgemini are among the top recruiters for this course. Placement record is quite strong with 90 percent of eligible students successfully placed. The highest package offered is 64 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are also well-maintained and provide a comfortable environment for students. Hostels have spacious rooms, hygienic mess facilities, recreation areas, reading rooms, and 24/7 security. The campus provide facilities like Wi-Fi connectivity.

individual_reviews.title: Average infrastructure, good faculty and the same old tier 3 placement records.

content.Placements: 70 percent students are placed and most are hired by mass hiring companies like TCS, Infosys, Cognizant etc. The highest package depends on the individual and it is due to off campus placement. 50 to 60 percent of students usually get internships during the course. In the end, it all comes down to your abilities.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms and library are pretty nice. Labs are well equipped. Classrooms are spacious with all classes having functioning lights and fans. Some are air conditioned not all. I am not a big fan of the female washrooms. The college is in a bad location and so it is always water logged and there. Too much convenience while traveling.

admission_overview.college_name: Netaji Subhash Engineering College Course Admissions 2025: Eligibility & Selection

paragraphs: Netaji Subhash Engineering College admissionis currently open. The college offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, MTech, MBA, MCA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the college also offers diploma courses. To get admission to Netaji Subhash Engineering College, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. Overall, the college offers more than 10 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Management, Computer Application, etc. The application process at NSEC Kolkata is conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutNetaji Subhash Engineering College course admission2025.

Netaji Subhash Engineering College (NSEC) admissionis completelyentrance-based. The college offers degree and diploma programmes at the Undergraduate(UG) and Postgraduate (PG) level under the affiliation ofMAKAUT. NSEC Kolkata admissions are primarily based on scores of various state/ national-level entrance exams such asWBJEE, JEE Main, CET, GATE, JEMAT, etc. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection forNetaji Subhash Engineering College courses:
NSEC admissions 2025 are entirely entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process to get admission. Find below the detailed process for NSEC admissions 2025:
Step 1: NSEC Application Process 2025

The NSEC application process is conducted in online as well as offline modes. Candidates must apply through the counselling bodies' websites of respective courses using basic details such as personal and educational qualifications. They also have to pay an application fee for the respective course. Students can also check detailedNSEC feestructure here.
Step 2: NSEC Selection Rounds 2025

After filling out the application form, candidates must appear for the respective entrance exam for NSEC course admissions. The shortlisted candidates have to appear for further counselling rounds for the respective courses. The institute might conduct a PI round for a few courses.
Step 3: NSEC Final Admission

After the completion of all the selection rounds, counselling will be conducted for the final seat allotment. The shortlisted candidates as per the merit lists will get admission to the respective courses. Students who get their names on the merit list are then requested to visit the institute for reporting, upload documents, and pay the admission fee to confirm their seats.

faqs.question: Is BTech available at Netaji Subhash Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Yes, BTech course is available at Netaji Subhash Engineering College. Netaji Subhash Engineering College offers a four-year BTech course at the UG level. To be eligible for the award of the degree, candidates shall complete the course in a maximum period of four years from the date of enrolment for the first semester of the course. Candidates must pass Class 12 to apply for the BTech course.

faqs.question: Does Netaji Subhash Engineering College  have an entrance exam for admission to BTech?
faqs.answer: Yes, for admission to BTech courses, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by Netaji Subhash Engineering College. The selection criteria for the course is WBJEE/ JEE Main + Counselling. The examinations through which candidates can get admission to the BTech programme are JEE Main (national level exam) & WBJEE (state level examination). JEE Main is managed by the NTA Board for providing admission to the BTech & BArch Courses.

faqs.question: Can I join Netaji Subhash Engineering College without Entrance Exam?
faqs.answer: No, candidates cannot join Netaji Subhash Engineering College without Entrance Exam as per the respective courses. Netaji Subhash Engineering College (NSEC) admission is completely entrance-based. The college offers degree and diploma programmes at the Undergraduate(UG) and Postgraduate (PG) level under the affiliation of MAKAUT.Aspirants can check list of course selection criteria from the table presented below:CoursesSelection CriteriaBTechWBJEE/ JEE Main + CounsellingMBAJEMATBScCETMTechPGET or GATE + CCMT/ University level counsellingBCACETMCAWBJEE JECA + CounsellingBBACET

faqs.question: What is the admission process at NSEC?
faqs.answer: For admission to NSEC, candidates need to apply through the official website. After application, all the selection rounds need to be completed by the candidates. The detailed admission process followed at NSEC is given below:Step 1: The NSEC application process is conducted in online as well as offline modes. Candidates have to apply through the counseling bodies' websites of respective courses by using basic details such as personal and educational qualifications. Along with that, they have to pay an application fee for the respective course.Step 2: After filling out the application form, candidates have to appear for the respective entrance exam for NSEC course admissions. The shortlisted candidates have to appear for further counseling rounds for the respective courses. The institute might conduct a PI round for a few courses.Step 3: After the completion of all the selection rounds, shortlisted candidates as per the merit lists will get admission to the respective courses. hostel_campus.college_name: Netaji Subhash Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Average infrastructure, good faculty and the same old tier 3 placement records.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms and library are pretty nice. Labs are well equipped. Classrooms are spacious with all classes having functioning lights and fans. Some are air conditioned not all. I am not a big fan of the female washrooms. The college is in a bad location and so it is always water logged and there. Too much convenience while traveling.

reviews.review_heading: The college needs to focus on the betterment of placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The best among the infrastructure of this college is the labs and library, which are well-equipped with resources. Other than that, the campus is well organised but very small. College has a center of a bit of greenery in the garden and a small fountain. Classrooms are well-equipped with projectors.

reviews.review_heading: I am very much convinced after choosing this college.
reviews.review_text: The labs and the class are bigger in size. Teachers are well qualified and have a great hands-on experience of teaching in a professional manner. There is no college hostel, you will have to search for a PG or a mess near the college, or a flat that you have to take.

reviews.review_heading: Great placements and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is not too big. The college has a well-equipped lab with all the facilities, such as modern instruments. The Wi-Fi connectivity has high-speed internet. Classrooms have AC. The college has a cafeteria and a canteen. There is a badminton court where students can play in their free time.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are also well-maintained and provide a comfortable environment for students. Hostels have spacious rooms, hygienic mess facilities, recreation areas, reading rooms, and 24/7 security. The campus provide facilities like Wi-Fi connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, faculty members are good and friendly. Infrastructure is average.
reviews.review_text: It's small yet facilities are provided as per need. There are rooms with AC for CSE and all such core department, and there are also grounds for sports, badminton court, and table tennis. There are no hostel. People are supposed to get PG nearby or maybe a flat.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and campus life, average faculty, and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The B.Teach department had well-maintained classrooms with projectors, high-speed Wi-Fi, and fully equipped labs for each specialisation. The library was spacious with a good collection of technical books and journals, and Hostel facilities were decent.

reviews.review_heading: Playground is green. The Guards are supportive.
reviews.review_text: Library is well maintained, the classrooms are good, there is a high speed Wi-Fi network, the infrastructure of the buildings is amazing, the facilities are all good, we understand their teaching well, the co workers are also sober mind and helpful, and the canteen provides us with good food.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, satisfied with all.
reviews.review_text: College has all the facilities like Wi-Fi, library, labs, and also has a good infrastructure. It does not have a hostel, but it has a canteen, and the food in the canteen is good, according to the price. College also has medical facilities. It has sports facilities, and some sports competitions are conducted at certain times.

reviews.review_heading: Netaji Subhash Engineering College review.
reviews.review_text: College size is very small, and during the monsoon, some labs get inoperable. There is no proper lab for new branches such as AIML, but they are working on it, for sports, you will get a badminton court, 1 cricket field, 1 volleyball court, 1 gym, and 1 canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, lab facilities, and good placement in 2023.
reviews.review_text: We have 5 sections in our department with 70+ students each. The intake is very good. Lab is quite good with all the facilities and centralized Wi-Fi. College has 2 hostels, both for boys and girls, but they are 2 minutes walking distance away from the college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a decent value for money college with good facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: The department has modern computer labs, high speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, seminar halls, and a well stocked library. AI/this labs are updated with the latest configurations required for machine learning and AI projects. The hostel facilities are decent with spacious rooms, study areas, and 24/7 Wi-Fi. The mess food is average but hygienic, and canteen options are available. Medical facilities and sports grounds for cricket, football, and indoor games are provided. Overall, the infrastructure ...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty, and active campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our department has modern classrooms, Wi-Fi enabled campus, well equipped computer labs, digital library access, and project labs. The infrastructure is updated regularly to match industry standards. The hostel facilities are good, with decent Wi-Fi, medical facilities, sports grounds, and common areas. The mess food is average, though the canteen offers better options. Sports facilities include a cricket ground, a badminton court, and a gym, which make campus life active.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my college because the return on investment is good.
reviews.review_text: A Wi-Fi-enabled campus, digital classroom, and central library are available here. Laboratory infrastructure is also good, a canteen is also available here, there are multiple coding and sports clubs, and many more clubs are available here, overall infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges to pursue your passion in engineering in Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good enough, and students can make the most out of their college life. The labs and classes are well-maintained, and all the facilities provided are up to the mark, including sports, canteen, and games.

college_info.intro:
Indus University Ahmedabad has various undergraduate, postgraduate & doctorate programs in Engineering, Pharmacy, Life and Basic Sciences, Agriculture, Business Management, Education, Law and Sciences & other fields. Some of prominent programs of university are BSc, BCom, BCom (Hons), BA LLB, BTech, MTech, MBA & several other programs in various specialisations including Aviation, Biomedical, Civil, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Cyber Security, Designing, and many more.
The BTech programme is one of the most popular offerings at Indus University. Indus University BTech programme here offers ten specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Computer Engineering, Information and Communication Technology (ICT), Metallurgical Engineering, Information Technology, and Mechanical Engineering. Also, the Indus University MBA programme here comes in many specialisations such as Integrated MBA, Dual Degree MBA (BBA + MBA), BBA, BCom (Honors) with ACCA UK, MBA, BBA in Aviation, and many more. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Indus University offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma courses in Engineering, Architecture, Design, Computer Application, Management, Bachelor of Science, Law, Aviation, Pharma, and other related disciplines. Some flagship programs offered by the university are BSc, BTech, MBA, and many more in various specialisations such as Aviation, Biomedical, Civil, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Cyber Security, Designing, and many more. Additionally Indus University also provides BSc in various specialisations like Clinical Research & Healthcare Management, Mathematics, Chemistry, Physics & many more. Below are and their eligibility criteria:

faqs.answer: A:    Indus University MBA admissions are entrance-based. Candidates are offered admission based on several national-level/ university level entrance exams. Candidates willing to get admission to MBA course at the Indus University can either qualify for CAT/ MAT/ CMAT or they can appear for Indus-MAT entrance exam.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Indus University accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    The eligibility critreia for BPharma course is class 12 with Physics, Chemistry & Biology/Mathematics as one of the subject. The Indus University BPharma is a four-year undergraduate course offered in full-time mode. The Bachelor of Pharmacy the curriculum is spread across eight semesters which includes all parts of healthcare related to creating medications and their use in accurate diagnosis. Pharmaceutical Technology, Industrial Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Phytopharmaceutical, Pharmacology, etc., are a few of the core subjects taught in the BPharma course.

overview_faqs.question: Is Indus University good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: With an emphasis on academics and excellent study resources, Indus University provides MBA students with a positive educational experience. The university's facilities and faculty are first-rate. But unlike some other universities, Indus University has a smaller campus community, and job placement rates are mediocre, with a median salary of $3–4 Lacs annually. The institution offers admission based on graduation results and, in the event that there are open seats, through management quota. To choose the specialisation that best fits their objectives, prospective students should think about their hobbies and career goals.

individual_reviews.title: The campus life is good, but if you want to study, you can opt for a better college.

content.Placements: Around 30 percent of students are placed. I don't know about the highest or lowest package offered. Bank of America is one of the many. Around 60–70 percent of students get internships who register themselves. Top roles I don't know, but there might be, mostly fresher-related roles.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are good, well-maintained, and air-conditioned, but there is no Wi-Fi which was promised at the time of joining. Canteen and mess are good. We also have sports facilities, but instruments are missing. I haven't used medical facilities.

paragraphs: Indus University admissions start with online registrations. Further, candidates must qualify for the respective entrance exam and fulfil the basic eligibility requirements as per the courses. Check below the detailed steps for the Indus University admission process:
Step 1: Indus University Application Process

Indus University's application process is conducted in an online mode. Aspirants can apply online on the official website of the university for their desired programme. While filling the application form, they must submit the supporting documents of previous qualifications and pay an application fee for the respective UG & PG courses.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to Indus University is both merit and entrance-based. For admission to courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA, BDes, etc., candidates must qualify for national/ university-level entrance exams. However, the university offers direct admission to courses such as BSc, BCA, BCom, MSc, etc. For some courses, candidates must also appear for the PI round.
Step 3: Final Admission

After the completion of all the selection rounds, the university releases the list of shortlisted candidates. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theIndus University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

The Indus University cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Indus University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 23100 and 50604 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Automobile Engineering. The first round cutoff rank for the sa

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Automobile Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 23100 for the general HS quota.
On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and with closing cutoff ranks of

Indus University accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Indus University can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Indus University JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Indus University.

Indus University GUJCET cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and for all categories and quotas in the form of opening and closing ranks. In 2025, Indus University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, ranged from 15086 to 50896 for students belonging to the General HS quota.

Among all the specialisations, B.Tech. in Information and Communication Technology and B.Tech. in Information Technology were the most competitive for admission in the General HS category. To view the first and last rounds' cuto

GUJCET 2025 cutoff ranks for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course range between 15086 to 50896 in the General HS category. B.Tech. in Information and Communication Technology emerged as the most competitive specialisation for admission, with a last round closing rank of 15086 under the HS quota.
