hostel_campus.college_name: Indus University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Separate hostels for boys and girls and also a separate block for international students in the hostel buildings. spacious, well-furnished rooms with 24x7 power supply, Wi-Fi connection, television, water purifier, water cooler and facilities for indoor and outdoor games, fitness center and gym with the latest equipment, first-aid facility and 120 kwh capacities solar power.

library.description: Indus University spread across 600 Sqm, has a well stocked library with collection of over 26000 volumes of books besides subscriptions for more than 250 National and International Journals. It also possesses Electronic Resources on books, journals, project reports along with CDs and DVDs on specific topics of interest. One can also find reprographic facilities in the library. The library has an Online Publication Access Catalogue (OPAC) and institutional membership with ADINET and DELNET providing online access to a large number of e-books and e-journals.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Playground

library.description: Indus University spread across 600 Sqm, has a well stocked library with collection of over 26000 volumes of books besides subscriptions for more than 250 National and International Journals. It also possesses Electronic Resources on books, journals, project reports along with CDs and DVDs on specific topics of interest. One can also find reprographic facilities in the library. The library has an Online Publication Access Catalogue (OPAC) and institutional membership with ADINET and DELNET providing online access to a large number of e-books and e-journals.

cafeteria.description: Canteen at Indus University considers the different tastes and preferences of students, faculty members and staff. Food Served at the canteen is examined regularly for its health and hygiene. The canteen can accommodate about 200 students at a time.

hostel.description: Separate hostels for boys and girls and also a separate block for international students in the hostel buildings. spacious, well-furnished rooms with 24x7 power supply, Wi-Fi connection, television, water purifier, water cooler and facilities for indoor and outdoor games, fitness center and gym with the latest equipment, first-aid facility and 120 kwh capacities solar power.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Playground

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Automobile Lab, Electrical and Electronics Engineering Lab, Electronics and Communication Lab, Aircraft Maintenance Lab, Instrumentation and Control Lab, Signal Processing Lab, Antenna Microwave Lab, Digital and Network Lab, Analog Electronics Lab

reviews.review_heading: The campus life is good, but if you want to study, you can opt for a better college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are good, well-maintained, and air-conditioned, but there is no Wi-Fi which was promised at the time of joining. Canteen and mess are good. We also have sports facilities, but instruments are missing. I haven't used medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I will recommend taking admission in Indus University.
reviews.review_text: They have the best facilities. They have the best hostel in their segment. The hostel provides gym facilities, hygienic food, and playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Ahmedabad with the best placement.
reviews.review_text: The university stands out not only for its placement record but also for its world class infrastructure, well designed courses, and comfortable hostel facilities. The campus is equipped with modern classrooms, digital libraries, well maintained laboratories, and advanced research centers that provide students with hands on learning experiences. Wi-Fi enabled zones, smart classrooms, and fully functional auditoriums make the academic environment engaging and interactive. Sports facilities, recrea...

reviews.review_heading: For education purposes, this is basically our Indus College.
reviews.review_text: We have a college in the Racharda area, and all people come from home, hostel, and also PG students here. They come to study from outside the city and country. They really love the college, and the hostel is too good. There are two or three sharing rooms in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure and very friendly faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure, the canteen, etc. The security is also awesome, and most importantly, there is no ragging at all. All students are very nice and humble. The atmosphere for freshers is very good and trustworthy.

reviews.review_heading: I am disappointed with the poor faculty, fake placements, and average facilities.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are nice and well-maintained. There is no Wi-Fi for personal use, and it has only limited access for official work. The library is also decent. Hostel rooms are average. Food in a mess is sometimes tasty and sometimes not. I never saw a medical room in my college, so I do not have an idea about it. Sports facilities are great.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty members, and a balanced campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our computer science department is well-equipped with modern labs. It has high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms and a central library with access to journals and e-resources. Hostel provides decent rooms with basic amenities, 24/7 water and electricity and Wi-Fi. Mess food is average but hygienic with a variety of vegetarian options. Campus also includes medical facilities with a visiting doctor. It also has good good sports infrastructure including cricket, football ground and indoor games like ta...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and facilities with active campus life.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, reliable Wi-Fi, and a good library are available. Hostels are clean with basic amenities. Mess food is average; canteens offer better variety. The medical room is active 24/7, and sports facilities like gym, playground, and courts are available.

reviews.review_heading: From campus to career: Life at Indus University
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at Indus University, especially for the B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering department, is quite robust and student-friendly. The department is equipped with state-of-the-art computer labs, high-speed Wi-Fi across the campus, and smart classrooms with projectors and modern seating arrangements. The hostel facilities at Indus University are satisfactory. The rooms are generally clean and furnished with basic amenities like a study table, chair, cupboard, and fans. The hostel bu...

reviews.review_heading: The college provides a balanced campus life with growing opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The college offers good infrastructure, with well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms, with basic amenities like laundry, security, and study areas are provided. The mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus life and placement opportunities in core sectors.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available for students Wi-Fi, full AC classrooms, library, etc. Best quality hostel facilities are provided to students, and the best quality of food is available in mess and canteen. They even provide medical facilities, and all types of sports and games are there.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements, supportive faculty, and a vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities at Indus University are satisfactory. It offers clean rooms, Wi-Fi, and 24x7 security. The mess provides hygienic vegetarian food, and the taste is average. The canteen offers snacks and fast food. Medical care is available on campus with doctors and emergency support. Sports like cricket, football, and badminton are encouraged, with regular tournaments and well-maintained grounds for students to stay active and healthy throughout their academic life.

reviews.review_heading: In 2025, the college is justifying with fee totally. It has the best return on investment so far.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good and facilities are also good. There are various labs and good infrastructure for overall practicals. The library is fine not that good and not that bad. Hostel rooms are okay, but the food is very delicious at affordable rates. Apart from this, Indus University has a very good infrastructure for sports. It has a basketball court, football ground, cricket ground, tennis court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B.Tech. in Cyber Security course at Indus University.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities like labs, canteen, and sports are pretty good. There are some negative points like there is not much place to sit around on campus during free lectures or lunch breaks. It is a small campus and the classrooms are also bearable.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and it is good for study.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is very huge. There are many aircraft on campus, one airplane at the campus, an entrance by helicopter, and JET planet behind the main building our parking slots are very huge. We have grounds to play activities like basketball and pickleball ground.

data.description: Mess food is sometimes good sometimes average, I would say learn cooking for one meal beacause maybe what they made for lunch or dinner you don't eat that or don't like that.  They serve food three times a day. The canteen also serves good food.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Indus University

likes.text: Companies like BYJU'S, Assar, Electrotherm, and many companies visited the campus to recruit students and offered them an expensive job.
I appreciate the placement cell of Indus University for putting the efforts to increase the number of placements.

SRMU offers UG, PG, diploma, and PhD programmes in various fields. The university offers courses in multiple streams such as Engineering, Pharmacy, Management, Computer Science/ IT, etc. The programmes are recognised by the concerned statutory bodies and government agencies. faqs.question: Q: How is SRMU Lucknow for MBA?

faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to the BCom or BCom (Hons) programmes offered at SRMU Lucknow can apply through both online and offline modes. Given below is the online application process:In the online application portal, candidates are required to fill out the application form. Additionally, candidates are required to upload scanned copies of relevant documents such as academic transcripts, certificates, and identification proof. Following the completion of the application form, candidates may need to pay the application fees.Step 1: Visit the university's website and click on the 'Online Admission Form'.Step 2: Fill out all mandatory fields and provide the correct mobile number. Click on Verify No. to get OTP.Step 3: Fill in basic, personal, and academic details.Step 4: Check all details filled in and proceed with the payment.Step 5: Select one of the payment options to pay the form fees of INR 1,000. Students can pay the fees online through Credit/ Debit Cards, Net Banking, UPI, and other digital payment methods.Offline Application ProcessStep 1:Candidates must visit the admission offices on the university campus, college campus, or city office. Ensure to carry all the educational documents along with a set of photocopies of the same and two passport-size photographs.Step 2: Approach the reception desk and provide personal details and programme preference.Step 3: Meet the assigned counsellor and take all the required details related to the academic and non-academic environment, programme, fees, payment plan.Step 4: Register in the desired programme, if eligible by filling out the admission form and making a payment of INR 1,000 towards form fees.
faqs.question: Q: What is the application process for B.Com AT SRMU Lucknow?

faqs.answer: To get admission in Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University, students have to check the eligibility first. Eligible students can then apply online. The university offers merit-based admissions mainly. Selected students have to report for verification of documents and pay the admission fees to complete the process.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission in Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University?

faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to SRMU Lucknow BCom and are applying for admission through the online mode must check all details filled in and proceed with the payment. If candidates want to lock/ book a seat, then tick the checkbox. Mention the amount of INR 10,000 or more and proceed with payment. Candidates must select one of the payment options to pay the form fees and/ or seat booking amount. They must pay a non-refundable SRMU Lucknow BCom application fee of INR 1,000. The application fees can be paid online through Credit/ Debit Cards, Net Banking, UPI, and other digital payment methods.

overview_faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to SRMU Lucknow MBA and are applying for admission through the online mode must check all details filled in and proceed with the payment. If candidates want to lock/ book a seat, then tick the checkbox. Mention the amount of INR 10,000 or more and proceed with payment. Candidates must select one of the payment options to pay the form fees and/ or seat booking amount. They must pay a non-refundable SRMU Lucknow MBA application fee of INR 1,000. The application fees can be paid online through Credit/ Debit Cards, Net Banking, UPI, and other digital payment methods.

overview_faqs.question: What is the B.Tech fees at SRMU?
overview_faqs.answer: SRMU B.Tech fees range between INR 2.90 lakh - INR 5.3 lakh. The duration of the course range from three to five years. Candidates who want B.Tech admissions also need to fulfill the eligibility criteria. The eligibility criteria for SRMU admissions is that candidate should have passed Class 12 with a minimum of 45-50 % aggregate. Additionally, the specialisations of B.Tech course include Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Data Science with IBM, Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology, Artificial Intelligence with IBM, Cloud Computing, Internet of Things (IOT) with IBM, and Big Data Analytics with IBM.

overview_faqs.question: How is SRMU Lucknow for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: According to the data available, the placement record for MBA students at SRMU Lucknow is not very good. However, SRMU is ranked as the best MBA college in Lucknow. The university also offers an MBA in Business Analytics. One Reddit user mentioned that the placement scene was not good for Mass Comm students, but college life was enjoyable. It is suggested to compare SRMU with other MBA colleges in Lucknow before making a decision.The SRMU university lucknow is the top university in India and the top university in uttar pradesh for the MBA course. It offers very good placement and package to the student in MBA course.

review_summary.college_name: SRMU Lucknow Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college placement section must be improved.

content.Placements: As a student of Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University, I would like to share that the college's percentage of students placed in my course department was about 20 to 30% every year. The highest package offered is around 16 LPA, and the lowest package offered is around 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: As a student of Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University, I would like to suggest that the facilities and infrastructure available in my course, B.Com (Hons), are very good, like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, etc. The quality of the facilities in my hostel, like the mess food, is edible and scheduled.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college placement section was good compared to other colleges.

content.Placements: As a student of Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University, Lucknow, I like to share that the highest package offered to students last year is about 16 lacs per annum. The lowest package offered to students is about 3 to 4 lacs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: As a student of Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University, Lucknow. I like to share that the facilities and infrastructure available for your course department, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, etc., are good enough according to the feedback taken from students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Most affordable courses are available at Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University.

content.Placements: SRMU Lucknow offers decent placements with 70-90% students placed. The highest package is 30 LPA, and the average is 4-4.5 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, HCL, and IBM. Roles include software, analyst, pharma and management jobs. My batch is B.Tech. Biotechnology.
content.Infrastructure: I didn't live in a hostel, so I can't tell much about it. But some of my friends are hostellers, and they are very comfortable. Wi-Fi is provided, and a gym is also there. Libraries are open for hostellers even after the classes on the campus. The food is also very good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, campus life, decent placements, and supportive faculty.

content.Placements: I am part of the 2023 - 2027 batch. I am pursuing my course at Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University. The program focuses on strong academics, practical learning, and skill development to prepare students for industry opportunities and market depth knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University offers modern infrastructure for my course, including well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a library. Hostels are secure and comfortable, with good food, WI-FI, and easy access to academic and recreational facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science and Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Top university in Uttar Pradesh.

content.Placements: Placement percentage typically between 65-90 percent, and in major courses like tech, management, and commerce. The placement percentage is above 85-90 percent in TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, HCL Tech, and the package varies based on the skills performed. The highest package is 16 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA to 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University is well-equipped with modern infrastructure, labs, and classrooms whole infrastructure makes it comfortable for students to live and study in an educational environment. Other than this, the university provides well-furnished hostel rooms, good mess facility, medical facilities, internet, sports, gym, and many more.

admission_overview.description:
Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University (SRMU) admission is open. The university offers more than 30 UG, PG, doctoral, and diploma programmes. These are offered in the field of Engineering, Management, Humanities, Natural Sciences, Commerce, Pharmacy, and more. Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University accepts applications in both online and offline modes. Admission to these courses is merit-based or entrance exam-based. Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University extends a range of scholarships to students based the merit and entrance exam. The university conducts SRMU Scholarship-cum-Entrance Test. faqs.question: What are the minimum marks required for MBA at SRMU Lucknow 2023?
faqs.answer: As per the eligibility criteria of SRMU Lucknow for the MBA course. Candidate must have passed Graduation or equivalent system in any discipline from any recognized University or AICTE recognized Institute/College with minimum aggregate marks of 50% or CGPA of 5.5 for Gen/OBC category and 45% marks or CGPA of 5.0 for SC/ST Category. Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University (SRMU) in Lucknow is known for its good placements and quality education.

faqs.question: Does SRMU Lucknow accept JEE score?
faqs.answer: Yes, SRMU Lucknow accepts JEE score. At SRMU Lucknow, if you score really well in the JEE Mains exam and get a rank up to 25000, you'll get a special 100% scholarship that covers your entire yearly tuition fee. If your rank is between 25001 and 50000, you'll still get a good 100% scholarship, but it will cover your semester tuition fee. For students with ranks between 50001 and 75000, there's a nice 50% scholarship on the semester tuition fee. Even if your rank is beyond 75001, you're not left out – you can still get a useful 30% scholarship on your semester tuition fee.

placement_report.college_name: SRMU Lucknow Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: SRMU Lucknow Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: SRMU Lucknow has released the details of the salaries offered to the batch 2025 of courses like BCA, BBA, MBA, etc. The highest package secured by MBA batch 2025 stood at INR 6.06 LPA.

The institute has concluded the placements for batch passed out in 2024 . The highest package offered during SRMU Lucknow placements in 2024 stood at INR 16 LPA. The participating recruiters presented 436 job offers to the Class of 2024 . The top recruiters of Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University in 2024 included Adani, Policy Bazaar, Capgemini, IBM, SAP, HDFC Bank, HCL, ICICI Bank, Axis Bank, iFortis, Agilsys , etc.
Earlier, SRMU Lucknow offered 620 job offers to the students of the 2023 batch. The highest package offered during SRMU Lucknow placements 2023 was INR 9 LPA .

The University has a Placement Cell that ensures placement assistance to every student. The institute invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises. The placement cell is also responsible for conducting on-campus placement drives and organises a wide range of activities such as industry visits, live projects, workshops, and specialized training sessions.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for B.Com at SRMU Lucknow?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to SRMU Lucknow BCom and are applying for admission through the online mode must check all details filled in and proceed with the payment. If candidates want to lock/ book a seat, then tick the checkbox. Mention the amount of INR 10,000 or more and proceed with payment. Candidates must select one of the payment options to pay the form fees and/ or seat booking amount. They must pay a non-refundable SRMU Lucknow BCom application fee of INR 1,000. The application fees can be paid online through Credit/ Debit Cards, Net Banking, UPI, and other digital payment methods.

reviews.review_heading: My college placement section must be improved.
reviews.review_text: As a student of Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University, I would like to suggest that the facilities and infrastructure available in my course, B.Com (Hons), are very good, like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, etc. The quality of the facilities in my hostel, like the mess food, is edible and scheduled.

reviews.review_heading: My college placement section was good compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: As a student of Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University, Lucknow. I like to share that the facilities and infrastructure available for your course department, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, etc., are good enough according to the feedback taken from students.

reviews.review_heading: Most affordable courses are available at Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University.
reviews.review_text: I didn't live in a hostel, so I can't tell much about it. But some of my friends are hostellers, and they are very comfortable. Wi-Fi is provided, and a gym is also there. Libraries are open for hostellers even after the classes on the campus. The food is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, campus life, decent placements, and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University offers modern infrastructure for my course, including well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a library. Hostels are secure and comfortable, with good food, WI-FI, and easy access to academic and recreational facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Top university in Uttar Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University is well-equipped with modern infrastructure, labs, and classrooms whole infrastructure makes it comfortable for students to live and study in an educational environment. Other than this, the university provides well-furnished hostel rooms, good mess facility, medical facilities, internet, sports, gym, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best universities in all of UP.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at SRMU University is developed for academic learning. Classrooms are spacious, and labs are properly equipped to support the course requirements. Hostel facilities are comfortable, secure and provide a student-friendly environment. Big-sized labs, and a park, also.

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching and supportive faculty, but average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is okay. Classrooms are normal and not very modern. The library is decent and useful for study. Hostel rooms are average, not too good and not too bad. The mess food is also fine. The only issue is that the campus is not always very clean, so cleanliness can be improved.

reviews.review_heading: If you are a college student, it is the best college in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average, and the food quality is good. Average classroom, and some have smart boards. Every Saturday, the hostel organizes the DJ nights, and sometimes the dal was not good in the hostel, but the wardens are very good, and cleaning is regularly done by staff.

reviews.review_heading: Outstanding academic culture.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a well structured and student-friendly infrastructure. It supports both academic and personal growth. The classrooms are spacious, clean, and well-maintained. The hostel is clean and well-maintained. It provides good food along with basic facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Great value for money: Qualified faculty and high placement confidence.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is perfectly fine and completely sufficient for the rigorous demands of a Mechanical Engineering programme. We have functional, well-maintained facilities and labs that are essential for practical learning. While it might not be flashy, everything is in place to ensure we can focus on our academics and hands-on projects.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty, and decent infrastructure for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good with well-equipped computer labs, Wi-Fi facilities, digital classrooms and decent library with updated books. Hostels are clean and provide good living conditions with proper medical facilities. The food in the mess and canteen is average but hygienic. There are sports grounds, indoor games and a gym facility which make student life active. The infrastructure is supportive of both academics and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements, supportive faculty, good infrastructure ,and a strong foundation.
reviews.review_text: SRMU has a modern campus with robust infrastructure. For B.Tech students, the facilities are designed to support both theoretical learning and practical application. The campus provides Wi-Fi connectivity throughout the academic buildings and hostels, ensuring students have access to online resources for their studies. The university has well-equipped laboratories for various departments, including specialized labs for Computer Science Engineering with advanced equipment. Hostels are generally d...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and average hostel life.
reviews.review_text: In my university, facilities are good but not too good, like some labs are extra advanced, but some of them are below the average, which means it's not too good. The college has decent infrastructure. Classrooms are okay, labs have the needed equipment, and Wi-Fi works fine most of the time. The library is good for regular study. The hostel is manageable. Rooms are basic, food is average (sometimes okay, sometimes not). We have some sports grounds too, but not very big.

reviews.review_heading: My college placement percentage is lower than that of the other colleges.
reviews.review_text: As a student of Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University pursuing a Bachelor's of Computer Application degree, I would like to share that the facilities and infrastructure available in my course department, such as Wi-Fi, lab, classroom, library, hotspot, etc., are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: My college is better than other private institutions.
reviews.review_text: As a student of Shri Ramswaroop Memorial University pursuing a Bachelor's of Computer Application degree, I would like to share that the facilities and infrastructure available in my course department were good, as were the fees taken from students every year. Hostel food is eatable.

data.description: SRMU University includes both boys and girls hostel. It has provisions for accommodating a large number of students from all states of India and abroad. It provides a comfortable, congenial and homely environment to the residents. The hostel is elegantly designed and surrounded by greenery, both the hostel has 6 floors and 12 wings consisting of 216 rooms. The hostel common room is fitted with LCD television and DTH connection for recreational activities and a reading room with library facilities. It has modern amenities such as 24-hour backup, medical aid, a Wi-Fi facility, a bank facility and others.

paragraphs: Candidates who get admission to SRMU Lucknow BSc (Hons) are required to pay the SRMU Lucknow BSc (Hons) fees according to the structure mentioned below:
Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

SRMU B.Tech fees range between INR 2.90 lakh - INR 5.3 lakh. The duration of the course range from three to five years. Candidates who want B.Tech admissions also need to fulfill the eligibility criteria. The eligibility criteria for SRMU admissions is that candidate should have passed Class 12 with a minimum of 45-50 % aggregate. Additionally, the specialisations of B.Tech course include Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Data Science with IBM, Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology, Artificial Intelligence with IBM, Cloud Computing, Internet of Things (IOT) with IBM, and Big Data Analytics with IBM.
Candidates who get admission to SRMU Lucknow BPharm are required to pay the SRMU BPharm fees of INR 3.9 lakh.
Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.answer: A:    No other entrance exam score apart from CUET-PG is accepted for admission in MA at BBAU. Candidates willing to be admitted to the MA programme at Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University (BBAU) must take the CUET-PG exam to get admission in MA at BBAU.Applicants, based on their CUET-PG score, will be selected for the counselling process, and after the completion of the counselling process, candidates will have to get their documents verified and pay the tuition fees in order to get their MA seat confirmed.
faqs.question: Is there any other entrance exam conducted for admission in MA at BBAU apart from CUET?

faqs.answer: A:    No other entrance exam score apart from CUET-UG is accepted for admission in BBA at BBAU. Candidates willing to be admitted to the BBA programme at Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University (BBAU) must take the CUET-UG exam to get admission in BBA at BBAU.Applicants, based on their CUET-UG score, will be selected for the counselling process, and after the completion of the counselling process, candidates will have to get their documents verified and pay the tuition fees in order to get their BBA seat confirmed.

reviews_list.review_title: Best university for M.Sc. in physics course.

review_content.Placements: Currently, the placements happening for us. In my senior batch, 90% of them were placed. Many companies come in looking for jobs, but most companies come in looking for employment and financial information. We had a great choice of dual specialisation, which made it easier for us to clarify what to do for the best placements. The roles offered were aeronautical engineer, laboratory technician, etc. Internships were offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel was nice and completely furnished with Wi-Fi and beds. The cuisine at the hostel was superb. The infrastructure of our lab was excellent. Our classrooms were tidy. Our college had digital classrooms. Hospital and eateries were beneficial. Our college promoted student participation in sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a nice place with 24/7 library access.

review_content.Placements: There are 100 students in my course. The highest package is 5 lacs, and the lowest is 3 lacs. Others included several NGOs, schools, and coaching centers. The teaching role involved an internship in a government school. All students completed their internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The department had a library and a smart classroom, which was helpful for micro-teaching and simulated teaching. Most girls stayed in the hostel, while about 70% of the boys had to stay outside the campus. The food in the hostel was good.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Life Sciences - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Professors are very helpful in nature. It is a good university.

review_content.Placements: The batch is very good, there are 32 students in my class. The college faculty members do not allow us to do internships. In the last semester, there was a training program held by the university. The training programme is held by ICAR in Nainital. But they take money for this, and we go on to study tour in Uttarakhand.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a very poor Wi-Fi connection, and the library is good. Classrooms do not have AC. In the hostel, the mess food is a disaster. The canteen is also not so good. Medical facilities are very fast but not so good. Sports and games are also available in this college. The central library is very good with full AC.

faqs.question: Q: Is direct admission possible to BBA at BBAU?

faqs.answer: Yes, a degree from Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Lucknow, is valid for government jobs. It is a central government university established by an Act of Parliament. As a centrally recognised university, its degrees are considered legitimate for government job applications across India. The university is recognised by the UGC and accredited by the NAAC Grade A+.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BBAU Lucknow degree valid for government jobs?

faqs.answer: No, there is no provision to get direct admission in MBA at BBAU. BBAU MBA admission is strictly based on the score obtained in the CAT exam. review_summary.college_name: Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Affordable education with good infrastructure and below-average placement support.

content.Placements: I belonged to the B.Com (Hons) batch at Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Lucknow. Placement opportunities are average. The highest package offered is around 4 LPA-5 LPA, the lowest package is about 1.8 LPA-2 LPA, and the average package stood at approximately 2.5 LPA-3 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies that visited the campus included TCS, Infosys (support roles), HDFC Bank, etc. About 40-50 percent of students managed to get internships mostly in banks. Many students also secured internships on their own through online platforms. The top roles offered are Accounts Executive, Junior Accountant, etc.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College was pretty fine, value for money, but average compared to good media colleges.

content.Placements: Hardly 10% of students got placed. The highest package was 3.6 LPA, and the lowest was 2.2 LPA. Only 5 out of 50 students got placement, that too on the professor's personal favors and relations. So, you have to prepare and place yourself by searching for a decent job on your own, otherwise, it is tough here.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and labs were available, but we rarely had lab visits. The hostels were nice with average food. There were many hostels, only students from outside Uttar Pradesh got a hostel here, so be prepared for hostel and mess expenses if you are from Uttar Pradesh itself.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best university for M.Sc. in physics course.

content.Placements: Currently, the placements happening for us. In my senior batch, 90% of them were placed. Many companies come in looking for jobs, but most companies come in looking for employment and financial information. We had a great choice of dual specialisation, which made it easier for us to clarify what to do for the best placements. The roles offered were aeronautical engineer, laboratory technician, etc. Internships were offered.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel was nice and completely furnished with Wi-Fi and beds. The cuisine at the hostel was superb. The infrastructure of our lab was excellent. Our classrooms were tidy. Our college had digital classrooms. Hospital and eateries were beneficial. Our college promoted student participation in sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a nice place with 24/7 library access.

content.Placements: There are 100 students in my course. The highest package is 5 lacs, and the lowest is 3 lacs. Others included several NGOs, schools, and coaching centers. The teaching role involved an internship in a government school. All students completed their internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The department had a library and a smart classroom, which was helpful for micro-teaching and simulated teaching. Most girls stayed in the hostel, while about 70% of the boys had to stay outside the campus. The food in the hostel was good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Life Sciences - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Professors are very helpful in nature. It is a good university.

content.Placements: The batch is very good, there are 32 students in my class. The college faculty members do not allow us to do internships. In the last semester, there was a training program held by the university. The training programme is held by ICAR in Nainital. But they take money for this, and we go on to study tour in Uttarakhand.
content.Infrastructure: There is a very poor Wi-Fi connection, and the library is good. Classrooms do not have AC. In the hostel, the mess food is a disaster. The canteen is also not so good. Medical facilities are very fast but not so good. Sports and games are also available in this college. The central library is very good with full AC.

BBAU Lucknow CUET UG Counselling Process 2026

After the declaration of CUET result, students can apply for admission to their desired courses at BBAU or Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University. Candidates who selected BBAU Lucknow during theCUET application formfilling and appeared for the exam are eligible for admission to the UG courses. A course-wisemerit listis released for the UG courses on the official website of the university.

CUET UG score is accepted for BTech, BSc, BCom, BVoc, BBA and other UG courses offered in main campus andAmethi campus. Shortlisted candidates who meet the course-specific eligibility criteria are further called for BBAU Lucknowcounselling process.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to BBAU Lucknow?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission at BBAU, aspirants need to meet the last educational qualification. The selection criteria for every course is through CUET. The selection criteria for various courses at the university, the students need to have a valid score of CUET-UG and CUET-PG. Students can check the table below to know the common eligibility and selection criteria for a few of the top courses offered at BBAU Lucknow:Course NameCommon EligibilityMBAGraduation with 50% aggregate (45% for ST/SC/PwD)BBAClass 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for ST/SC/PwD)BAClass 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for ST/SC/PwD)BScClass 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for ST/SC/PwD) PCB should be a compulsory subjectBTechClass 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for ST/SC/PwD) PCM should be a compulsory subject

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in BBAU?
faqs.answer: There is no other way around to get direct admission in any of the UG or PG courses at Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University (BBAU). The course admission is firmly based on the score of CUET conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA).Students who want to pursue any particular course must take the CUET exam, and if the candidate is able to get a good rank that is above the closing rank mentioned in the cut-off list released by Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University (BBAU), then the student can register for the counselling round followed by document verification along with the fee payment.

faqs.question: What is the admission policy of BBAU?
faqs.answer: As per admission policy 2023,  50% seats of total intake are reserved for SC/ST applicant. A total of 10% for EWS and 5% for PWDs. However, reservation is applicable as per existing rules and norms by BBAU. According to the BBAU admission policy, seats under SC/ST category shall be interchangable if candidates under a given category is/are not available.

faqs.question: When will the CUET admit card release?
faqs.answer: NTA will release the CUET admit card 2026 online in second week of May at cuet.nta.nic.in. Candidates will be able to download their admit cards online at cuet.nta.nic.in. The admit card will be available for download in PDF document and is a mandatory document to be carried to the exam centre. Prior to the release of the CUET UG admit card, NTA will release the advance intimation of exam city slip. It is not the admit card, but will inform candidates about the city. After downloading the CUET UG 2026 admit card, candidates will have to check all the details carefully and ensure that there is no mistake. In case of any error, they will have to contact NTA to get the necessary corrections done.

placement_data.title: BBAU Lucknow Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has not released the 2025 placement report yet. However, the NIRF report 2025 is out on the official website. According to the report, 151 UG 3-year students, 36 PG 1-year and 1,302 PG 2-year students were placed during BBAU placements 2022. The median package offered to UG 3-year courses during Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University placements 2024 stood at INR 11.85 LPA. For PG 1-year and PG 2-year, the median package offered was INR 6.92 LPA and INR 9.52 LPA, respectively.

tables.context: What is the highest placement package in BBAU?

faqs.question: What is the highest placement package in BBAU?
faqs.answer: The BBAU highest package details are yet to be released. However, the median package is released for a few courses. The highest median package offered during 2024 placements was INR 12.78 LPA and was made to MBA students. Take a look at the below table depicting the BBAU placement package details for reference: Course Median Package (2024) MBA INR 12.78 LPA LLM INR 7.54 LPA MPharma INR 8.52 LPA NOTE: The above salary data is fetched from the NIRF report 2025.

faqs.question: Does BBAU Lucknow provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University (BBAU) Lucknow provides placement facilities to the students. The university has a centralised placement cell that provides placement-related support to students. The placement centre at BBAU Lucknow also organises specialised lectures, workshops and job fairs. Many recruiters participate in the campus placement and offer the best packages to the students.

nirf.description:
BBAU Lucknow has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, BBAU Lucknow fell 11 ranks to #69 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. Throughout the preceding two years, the rank has oscillated but is currently stable.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, BBAU Lucknow fell 4 ranks to #37 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Management' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, BBAU Lucknow climbed 7 ranks to #79 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'Law' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, BBAU Lucknow fell 2 ranks to #12 rank in the 'Law' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Affordable education with good infrastructure and below-average placement support.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University is quite good and well spread across a large green campus. Classrooms for B.Com (Hons) are spacious and well-ventilated. The university has a central library with a good collection of commerce, management, and reference books along with reading halls. Wi-Fi facility is available on campus. Hostel facilities are decent with separate hostels for boys and girls. Rooms are clean and basic amenities like water and electricity are provided. T...

reviews.review_heading: College was pretty fine, value for money, but average compared to good media colleges.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and labs were available, but we rarely had lab visits. The hostels were nice with average food. There were many hostels, only students from outside Uttar Pradesh got a hostel here, so be prepared for hostel and mess expenses if you are from Uttar Pradesh itself.

reviews.review_heading: Best university for M.Sc. in physics course.
reviews.review_text: Hostel was nice and completely furnished with Wi-Fi and beds. The cuisine at the hostel was superb. The infrastructure of our lab was excellent. Our classrooms were tidy. Our college had digital classrooms. Hospital and eateries were beneficial. Our college promoted student participation in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: It is a nice place with 24/7 library access.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The department had a library and a smart classroom, which was helpful for micro-teaching and simulated teaching. Most girls stayed in the hostel, while about 70% of the boys had to stay outside the campus. The food in the hostel was good.

reviews.review_heading: Professors are very helpful in nature. It is a good university.
reviews.review_text: There is a very poor Wi-Fi connection, and the library is good. Classrooms do not have AC. In the hostel, the mess food is a disaster. The canteen is also not so good. Medical facilities are very fast but not so good. Sports and games are also available in this college. The central library is very good with full AC.

reviews.review_heading: Good lush green campus and well-equipped library.
reviews.review_text: We have fully ventilated and Wi-Fi enabled classroom, computer labs, and library with all the relevant books for study. As for the hostels, they are very good in condition. The food in canteen is average. We also have a medical facility available for us. We have playground with all types of sports and one sports center for indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great place for education. It has a good infrastructure, but there is a lack of placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus has a good infrastructure with pace and calmness. Every department has a Wi-Fi facility with good speed. All classrooms are also well-maintained and specially structured to prevent suffocation problems. It has good ventilation, a great library, etc.

reviews.review_heading: A college with attractive campus and helpful faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very excellent. Wi-Fi is also very good, and classrooms are fully AC. The library is also fully AC and Wi-Fi is available 24*7. Hostels are also very good, according to price. The mess and canteen food are far better than those at other colleges. There is a health centre in the university for students. Sports events are also organised at the university.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Central University, Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are nice and clean, but the only demerit is that most people don't get a hostel as there is not a sufficient number of hostels. The rooms are okay, but not very good. Overall, the hostel facilities and mess are good, and you can expect a hostel if you are not close to the college.

reviews.review_heading: I hope for betterment soon.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are still lacking because this course is very new at the university. Hostels are pretty good, and the quality of food is also nice. There are many opportunities for a person if he or she is into sports. There are many clubs, and the library is one of the best in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with 80% placements in 2024. It has good staff members and professors.
reviews.review_text: We will get accommodation facility in form of hostels which is generally 2-3 seaters. Water, Wi-Fi, and electricity facilities are available for free. There is a fee of around Rs. 2,600 per semester for the hostel. Few hostels have a gym and common room with AC to study. Guest rooms for parents are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Some departments have good management but some do not. The college life is fun here.
reviews.review_text: Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University (BBAU) in Lucknow has areas that could be improved. The positive aspects are it is beautiful and green. Wi-Fi is available at departments and hostels. Some Classrooms are equipped with smart boards in some departments.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good but placement and college life are not that good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of hostel is good. Wi-Fi is available all the time. Mostly books are available in library of our branch which are easily issued by students. Classroom conditions are good. Hostel food is also good and all sub-services are available in hostels. Lab equipment are not available in labs. Infrastructure is also not that good, it is below average.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed because of faculty and peer pressure of exams but satisfied with infrastructure 2025.
reviews.review_text: There is no such place which can be described as a lab. There is a dummy lab which contains a few computer systems, mainly used by professors, and most of them are faculty, so can't be used. The processors of computer systems can be compared with turtles. Hostels are fine enough to stay with the best facilities like geysers, water coolers, etc.

reviews.review_heading: A review about BBAU University from the Geology department.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi: All the departments and buildings of the campus are installed with free Wi-Fi networks that every student can access using their unique login code and password.
Labs: Labs are not well developed, generally lacking various major instruments and facilities that you may often find easily in other universities.
Classrooms: Classrooms are well furnished, but they are not air-conditioned. You may find it difficult during the summers as the temperature within the classrooms also reaches high.
Li...

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Somewhat disappointed due to hostel availability, I am happy to get a decent placement at just 95%.

review_content.Placements: I think 70 percent of students got placed last year, as I've heard from seniors. The highest on campus is 27 LPA, I think. Off campus, it is 35 LPA and maybe more than that. Placements are decent here according to the percentile. Median is 8 LPA according to seniors. Companies come for all sorts of roles, which can be expected from a college of this caliber.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good, but limited availability, so it kind of reduces the aura of the college. You've to be in the top 10 percent of your branch and category when you're taking admission through JEE. I don't know the exact states for every category. I don't know the exact states, but 15-16 from the general get permanent hostels, and 2 from the BC category.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Average in all aspects; the rest depends on the individual.

review_content.Placements: I am a student of the ECE department in UIET college, and looking at the placement of our senior batch 2021-2025, the placements went average with an average package of 8 LPA. There were companies for analytics roles, with the top company being ZS, but for the role of software engineer, the requirements of companies were very high and dynamic.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have one of the biggest libraries in North India, the AC Joshi Library. The labs are well-equipped and have ACs, but the classrooms don’t have AC. The college provides a password and username to access their Wi-Fi. Hostels are pretty average; the rooms are small, but they have a 24-hour canteen facility and one AC-fitted reading room. The mess food quality is just like any other hostel, nothing to expect much.

review_summary.college_name: UIET Chandigarh Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is top-notch choice if you want a balance of everything in life.

content.Placements: 89 percent of students were placed. The highest on-campus package is 21 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are ZS and Infosys. 80 percent got internships. Top roles were SDE and analyst. There were well-recognized companies that visited our campus, and the placements were fine.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well maintained, with a few having AC. Hostels are top-notch with all facilities and no restrictions. Hostel staff is also very good. The hostels are well maintained. There are too many hostels, and students have the choice to choose according to their needs.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Altogether a good option for a Tier-2/3 college in the growing phase.

content.Placements: In my course, around 80 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 22 LPA, and the lowest is 3.6 LPA. The average package is around 8- 9 LPA. Top companies include ZS Associate, AMEX, Deloitte, KPMG, GreyB, TCS, Infosys, Policy Bazar, and ProgDNA. Most of the roles offered are in Data Analytics, and a few are in Software Development roles.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are limited, and most of the students rent out flats or PG. The campus is lush green, and sporting facilities are available. Classrooms are big, and Wi-Fi is available 24/7 in hostels and colleges. Labs are fully air-conditioned and carry out DST-funded research and innovation. The library is also well maintained with a sufficient no of books, journals, and papers.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Somewhat disappointed due to hostel availability, I am happy to get a decent placement at just 95%.

content.Placements: I think 70 percent of students got placed last year, as I've heard from seniors. The highest on campus is 27 LPA, I think. Off campus, it is 35 LPA and maybe more than that. Placements are decent here according to the percentile. Median is 8 LPA according to seniors. Companies come for all sorts of roles, which can be expected from a college of this caliber.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good, but limited availability, so it kind of reduces the aura of the college. You've to be in the top 10 percent of your branch and category when you're taking admission through JEE. I don't know the exact states for every category. I don't know the exact states, but 15-16 from the general get permanent hostels, and 2 from the BC category.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Average in all aspects; the rest depends on the individual.

content.Placements: I am a student of the ECE department in UIET college, and looking at the placement of our senior batch 2021-2025, the placements went average with an average package of 8 LPA. There were companies for analytics roles, with the top company being ZS, but for the role of software engineer, the requirements of companies were very high and dynamic.
content.Infrastructure: We have one of the biggest libraries in North India, the AC Joshi Library. The labs are well-equipped and have ACs, but the classrooms don’t have AC. The college provides a password and username to access their Wi-Fi. Hostels are pretty average; the rooms are small, but they have a 24-hour canteen facility and one AC-fitted reading room. The mess food quality is just like any other hostel, nothing to expect much.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best government college for droppers.

content.Placements: In IT and CS, there is 90% placement, while in ECE and Mechanical, the placements are decent. The highest package is 42 LPA. Students get internships in IITs and nearby industries. The main companies that come are Wipro, TCS, Mahindra, Airtel, and many more with good offers.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and facilities are top-notch from different IITs and other good institutions. Classrooms are decent, and Wi-Fi is available across the campus 24/7 with full network connectivity. The library has good infrastructure and all types of books are available 24/7. The food is good. There are many sports facilities and many grounds to play on.

admission_overview.description: UIET Chandigarh admissions are primarily entrance-based. The institute accepts JEE Main score followed by JAC Counselling for the BE programme. UIET offers admission to the MTech courses based on the GATE or merit of the candidates. The institute conducts an entrance test for admission to PhD programme. UIET Chandigarh in affiliation with Panjab University offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in the Engineering stream. Candidates can apply online on the official website of the institute.

faqs.question: Is GATE accepted at UIET Chandigarh?

paragraphs: UIET Chandigarh admissioninvolves multiple-steps such as application, selection, counselling and seat allotment. Aspirants need to appear for an entrance exam to get a seat in the courses. Below is step-wise admission details for UIET:
1: UIET Chandigarh Application Process 2026

Candidates applying for BE have to first register for JEE Main followed by JAC Counselling. Aspirants also need to apply on the official website of UIET for BE and ME/ MTech programmes. The mode of application for all courses is online. Aspirants need to fill out the form for PhD on the institute's website.

The inter-se merit of the candidates for BE admission will be determined on the basis of All India Rank (AIR) obtained in JEE Main followed by JAC Counselling. For lateral entry,PULEETis conducted by the university for admission. UIET selects aspirants for ME/ MTech courses based on GATE score. Non-GATE candidates can also get admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The institute conducts an entrance test to shortlist candidates for PhD programme. Aspirants with GATE or UGC NET scores can also get admission in PhD programme.

Once selected, BE candidates are required to participate in JAC Counselling. For MTech, the institute releases a merit list. UIET releases the entrance test result on the institute's website. Selected aspirants are required to bring their documents for verification and pay the course fee to confirm their seat.

UIET Chandigarh fee varies course-wise. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat. The fee include multiple components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, etc. Find below the course-wiseUIET Chandigarh fees:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The total seat intake varies as per the specialisation selected by the candidates. 5% additional seats are available for meritorious students belonging to Economically Weaker Section. Out of the total intake, some seats are reserved for various categories. Below is UIET Chandigarh seat intake:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

UIET Chandigarh follows a reservation policy to reserve some seats for SC, ST and other category candidates. One must hold the documents supporting their claim for the seat. Below is category-wise reservation at UIET:

faqs.question: What is the admission process for the BTech programme at UIET?
faqs.answer: UIET Chandigarh admission to BTech is based on JEE Main score. The inter-se merit of the candidates for BE admission will be determined on the basis of All India Rank (AIR) obtained inJEE Mainonly, except in the Sports Category and the Defence Category. After completion of the selection rounds, BE candidates have to participate in JAC Counselling and provide their preferred institute. Once the seat is allotted, candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat.

courses_data.description: UIET Chandigarh offers two-year ME/ MTech courses divided into four semesters. The institute offers ME in seven specialisations and MTech in two specialisations. Candidates can apply for MTech course after completing graduation. The specialisations includeElectronics and Communication,Information Technology, etc. The selection for ME courses is based onGATEscore. Download:UIET Chandigarh ME Brochure

faqs.question: Which are the M.Tech specialisations at UIET Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: UIET Chandigarh offers two-year M.Tech and ME courses at the PG level. Candidates who have passed BTech/ BE degree in relevant subjects with at least 60% aggregate can apply for any of the M.Tech courses. Below is UIET Chandigarh M.Tech and ME specialisations:ME in Computer Science and EngineeringME in Computer Science & Engineering (Cyber Security)ME in Information TechnologyME in Electronics and Communication EngineeringME in Mechanical EngineeringME in Electrical and Electronics Engineering (

faqs.question: What is the fee for M.Tech at UIET Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees for ME/ M.Tech ranges betweenINR 38,800andINR 1 lakhat UIET Chandigarh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Aspirantsneed to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: How much percentile is required for UIET Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: Candidates are required to meet the eligibility requirement for the course they are applying for. Candidates can apply for UG courses after completing Class 12. Graduation is mandatory for aspirants applying for PG courses. Find below course-wise eligibility and selection criteria:Course NameCommon EligibilityBEClass 12 or equivalent with five subjects, namely Hindi, English, Punjabi or any other language andPhysics, Mathematics or any one of Biology/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational subjectsME/ MTechBTech/ BE degree in relevant subjects with at least 60% aggregatePhDMaster's or bachelor's degree in relevant subjects with at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC)

faqs.question: How can I get admission in UIET Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: Aspirants are first required to fill out the application form for the respective exam. The inter-se merit of the candidates for BE admission will be determined on the basis of All India Rank (AIR) obtained in JEE Main followed by JAC Counselling. For lateral entry, PULEET is conducted by the university for admission. UIET selects aspirants for ME/ M.Tech courses based on GATE score. Non-GATE candidates can also get admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses offered by UIET Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: UIET Chandigarh fee varies course-wise. Candidates are required to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat. The total tuition fee for BE isINR 3.4 lakh. The fee for ME is quite low than BE. It ranges betweenINR 38,800 and INR 1.1 lakh.Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: When will the JAC Delhi counselling process start?
faqs.answer: JAC Delhi 2026 counselling will start in May. The entire counselling schedule is hosted on the official website of JAC Delhi 2026. Joint Admission Counselling (JAC) process for undergraduate admissions in engineering programs in Delhi, is conducted by the participating institutes themselves. The details for JAC Delhi 2026 counselling institute will be announced soon. JAC Delhi is a collaborative effort of four engineering institutes in Delhi, namely Delhi Technological University (DTU), Indira Gandhi Delhi Technical University for Women (IGDTUW), Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology Delhi (IIIT-D), and the Netaji Subhas University of Technology (NSUT, formerly known as NSIT). These institutes collectively conduct the counselling process for admission to their undergraduate engineering programs.

placement_data.title: UIET Chandigarh Placement overview 2025
paragraphs: As per media reports, the highest and average package received during UIET Chandigarh placements 2025 was INR 24.73 LPA and INR 8.5 LPA . The overall placement rate recorded in 2025 was 78.4%.

Earlier, the highest and average package offered during UIET Chandigarh placements 2024 stood at INR 42 LPA and INR 9.11 LPA , respectively. Further, more than 50 companies visited the campus and 314 offers were made during University Institute of Engineering and Technology Chandigarh placements 2024. The top recruiters during UIET Chandigarh placements 2024 included CISCO, ServiceNow and ZS Associates .

description: UIET Chandigarh cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result. The institute accepts the JEE Main ranks, followed by the JAC Chandigarh counselling process for BTech and other courses. For detailed cutoff information, check out the exam-wise sections below.

UIET Chandigarh cutoff 2025 was released via JAC Chandigarh entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 54934 and 1143819 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 54934, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 35674.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 54934.

For the OBC category students, the JEE Main last round closing ranks varied between 58439 and 1164055 for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. Of all the BTech specialisations, the most competitive was B.E. / B.Tech. was the easiest grab for students with a least competitive cutoff rank o

The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

Observation can be made from the statistics that M.Tech. in CAD/CAM remains highly competitive, with the closing rank decreasing from 522 in 2021 to 387 in 2023. GATE Counselling 2023 was held for up to six rounds. This section shows the analysis of the last three years' trends for UIET Chandigarh MTech and Integrated MTech courses. UIET Chandigarh JAC Chandigarh cutoff 2025 was released up to multiple rounds for BTech admission. In the last round, the closing ranks for B.E. / B.Tech admission were between 54934 and 1143819 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Of all the B.E. / B.Tech specialisations, the one that turned out to be the most difficult for admission was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with a closing rank of 54934. hostel_campus.college_name: UIET Chandigarh Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college is top-notch choice if you want a balance of everything in life.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well maintained, with a few having AC. Hostels are top-notch with all facilities and no restrictions. Hostel staff is also very good. The hostels are well maintained. There are too many hostels, and students have the choice to choose according to their needs.

reviews.review_heading: Altogether a good option for a Tier-2/3 college in the growing phase.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are limited, and most of the students rent out flats or PG. The campus is lush green, and sporting facilities are available. Classrooms are big, and Wi-Fi is available 24/7 in hostels and colleges. Labs are fully air-conditioned and carry out DST-funded research and innovation. The library is also well maintained with a sufficient no of books, journals, and papers.

reviews.review_heading: Somewhat disappointed due to hostel availability, I am happy to get a decent placement at just 95%.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good, but limited availability, so it kind of reduces the aura of the college. You've to be in the top 10 percent of your branch and category when you're taking admission through JEE. I don't know the exact states for every category. I don't know the exact states, but 15-16 from the general get permanent hostels, and 2 from the BC category.

reviews.review_heading: Average in all aspects; the rest depends on the individual.
reviews.review_text: We have one of the biggest libraries in North India, the AC Joshi Library. The labs are well-equipped and have ACs, but the classrooms don’t have AC. The college provides a password and username to access their Wi-Fi. Hostels are pretty average; the rooms are small, but they have a 24-hour canteen facility and one AC-fitted reading room. The mess food quality is just like any other hostel, nothing to expect much.

reviews.review_heading: Best government college for droppers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and facilities are top-notch from different IITs and other good institutions. Classrooms are decent, and Wi-Fi is available across the campus 24/7 with full network connectivity. The library has good infrastructure and all types of books are available 24/7. The food is good. There are many sports facilities and many grounds to play on.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the environment of the center of the city of Chandigarh.
reviews.review_text: Everything is average as per a government college. The hostel food is not so good but average. There are 8 hostels for boys and 10 for girls. There is an international hostel. The facility in an international hostel is very good. The fee there is Rs. 10,000 per month where as in 8 boys and 10 girls hostels, it is Rs. 1,000 per month with decent or average facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the projects. During my course, placements are going well.
reviews.review_text: Talking about facilities available on the campus, we have Wi-Fi connection for every student. We have a library in every department. There is a separate library for combined universities, which is open 24X7 throughout the year. Hostels also have a reading/study room. Indoor gym and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money, and good placement opportunity.
reviews.review_text: The campus of Panjab University is completely accessible to UIET students; hence, we have a swimming pool, playground, shooting range, and many other facilities to name a few. Our entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. We have two libraries: one is 24 hours, called AC Joshi, and the other is specifically for UIET, open during college hours. Classrooms are moderately good with AC classes for CSE and IT departments.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money with great ROI .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good. There are labs for each branch, be it for any subject of electrical or computers. Wi-Fi facility is provided in the whole campus, which runs very smoothly. Classrooms are decent. The library is well maintained and one can study there peacefully during free time.

reviews.review_heading: A good college and has value for money.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi in our college is average, but Wi-Fi in the library and labs is good. Overall, the infrastructure of our college is average. Classrooms are average, but the library is good, and labs are very good. Facilities in our hostel are average. They provide free drinking water and washing machines for students. But, the mess in our hostel is below average, while the canteen is good. Sports facilities in our hostel are also good, and our hostel has a free gym.

reviews.review_heading: Full Enjoyment, but Stay Consistent.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are decent compared to the fees we are paying. The hostel fee is just 1k INR per month, and that too in Chandigarh. The sports facilities are very good. The campus is great, and there are many advantages of being related to Panjab University.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed review of UIET Chandigarh (Panjab University).
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is old school but beautiful at the same time, and that is because it's a very old university. Labs and workshops are having everything that a student would need in his/her learning phase. Hostels are very affordable, and the mess food follows the same trend.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good, infrastructure is average, campus life is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are average. The classrooms of our college are also average. The labs of our college are good compared to the classrooms, and the library is also good. There are no additional facilities provided in the hostel, only some basic facilities like water coolers, washing machines, and geysers. The quality of food in our mess is below average, but the quality of food in the canteen is good. The medical and sports facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: University provided good campus life with decent placements .
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure was average but the university shares campus with Panjab University. So overall, campus life was good. 
There is a shortage of hostels, so a very small amount of students get hostels on merit basics. 
Medical facilities are available on the Panjab University campus. 
Sports facilities were too good at Panjab University .

reviews.review_heading: College is good because of its location and placements are decent for higher branches.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not so good of UIET Sector 25 as it is so old; classrooms are not air-conditioned for 1st year students and are also so old; the library of college is good but it closes at 9 pm; labs are also air-conditioned; hostel infrastructure is good; and mess food is also okay. There is sports options for people who have interest.

data.description: Yes, summer training is a part of UIET BE Electronics and Communication curriculum. The institute conducts two weeks summer training. The students will undergo a mandatory “Summer Training” of two weeks in their respective  departments after their second semester exams. It will be non-credited mandatory course, the result of which (satisfactory/unsatisfactory) will be reflected in their second semester mark sheet.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Panjab University

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Samsung, Bharti Airtel, Goldman Sachs, Deloitte, KPMG, Mu Sigma, Infosys, Capgemini, etc., visit our college to hire students.
For CSE/IT students, there is a really good number of placement offers in top MNCs with handsome salary packages.

In the hostels and canteens, the food is both hygienic and tasty, hostel rooms are big and the students share a homely bond.

likes.text: The teaching quality is very good and teachers also provide useful study material and teaching methods include giving seminars and various workshops and smart teaching.
The course is accordingly designed in order to ensure timely completion of syllabus and understanding ability of the students.

likes.text: The best thing about our course is the placement but our college should work on its infra and fest management.
