overview_faqs.question: What is the hostel withdrawal refund policy at SRM University Andhra Pradesh?
overview_faqs.answer: To withdrawal the application from the hostel, candidates are required to fill out the refund request form. Below are the guidelines for requesting refunds for Hostel & Mess Fees:Full Hostel Fees will be refunded if the candidates withdraws before the commencement of the classes. Further, the administrative charges of INR 5000 will be deducted to the amount.No Hostel Fee Refund is provided after the commencement of the classes.Mess Fee will be refunded on a pro rata basis (rounded off to the full month). Administrative charges of INR 5000/- will be deductedIf the student is expelled from the Hostel on disciplinary grounds, no refund is permitted

overview_faqs.question: What are the documents to fill out the Refund request form at SRM University Andhra Pradesh?
overview_faqs.answer: The refund process will begin only upon receipt of the following original documents by courier or in person, by the Director of Admissions, Amaravati.All receipts towards the payment of feesCounseling Call LetterProvisional Allotment Letter (PAL)Cheque leaf (cancelled) of the bank to which transfer of money is to be done. (in case money needs to be refunded to some other account)Note: If all documents submitted for refund are in order, then the time taken to process and effect the transfer of refund money will be 30 working days.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2025, with really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Recently, the highest package is 65 LPA, and the average package is around 6 LPA. Top recruiters include Amazon, Microsoft, PayPal, Deloitte, and others. Around 60–70 percent of students get placed in companies such as Amazon, PayPal, Dell, and TCS. The roles offered include full-stack development, data analyst, and cloud engineering.
content.Infrastructure: The CSE department has high-speed Wi-Fi and multiple modern computer labs. Classrooms are smart, air-conditioned, and well-equipped. The library is large and access to digital resources such as IEEE, Springer, and NPTEL courses. Hostels are clean and provide Wi-Fi, AC and non-AC rooms, laundry facilities, and good security. Mess food is average, and a 24/7 medical facility is available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: SRM Andhra Pradesh has the best infrastructure in Andhra Pradesh.

content.Placements: The number of students who have joined this year is so high that the placements for the people may be fewer because of overcrowding. Companies only need a few hires, so the placements can be low this time, and also, we should focus on our skills, not on grades.
content.Infrastructure: Aunty is very good, and we have Wi-Fi labs, classrooms, and libraries. We can experience everything on campus, and we have a good food system in the hostel. After the holidays, we can have the best Wifi in our college, which can flow over the campus, and also we must use only Airtel on the campus.

admission_overview.college_name: SRM University AP Course Admissions 2025: Dates, Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: SRM University, (also known as SRM Amravati), Andhra Pradesh, offers a range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in various streams, such as BTech, MTech, BA, BSc, BCom, and MBA. Established in 2017, SRM University AP is a part of the SRM Group of Institutions. The mode of application at the university is online. SRM Andhra Pradesh admission to various courses is entrance exam-based.

SRM University Andhra Pradesh has two departments offering a variety of courses at the UG and PG level. The two departments include the School of Engineering and Applied Sciences (for BTech & MTech), School of Liberal Arts and Basic Sciences (for BA, BSc & BCom), and School of Management (for BBA Hons and MBA Banking and Financial Services). SRM AP has also recently launched MSc in Applied Data Science. Admissions are offered based on scores obtained in entrance exams conducted at the national/university level. The table below shows the admission-related highlights to SRM University Amravati courses:
Class 12 in the Science stream with 60% aggregate
Accepted entrance exam:SRMAPET/SRMJEEE(UG)/JEE Main/ SAT Subject Test
BE/ BTech or equivalent qualification with 50% aggregate
Accepted entrance exam:GATEorSRMJEEE (PG)
Bachelor's degree with 50% aggregate
Accepted entrance exam:CAT/MAT/XAT/GMAT/NMAT/CMATor SRMJEE
BSc/ BCA or equivalent qualification with 50% aggregate
Accepted entrance exam:SRM Future Skills Test + Personal Interview (PI)

placement_data.title: SRM University AP Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The placement rate recorded during SRM AP BTech CSE , BTech ECE, and BSc Computer Science placements 2023 was 100%. Further, the highest package and average package offered during SRM University AP BTech CSE placements 2023 stood at INR 50 LPA and INR 9.90 LPA , respectively. A total of 105 super dream offers and 11 International offers were received during placements 2023. Earlier, the highest package and average package offered during SRM University Andhra Pradesh MBA placements 2022 stood at INR 31 LPA and INR 7.75 LPA , respectively. The top recruiters during SRM AP placements 2023 included leading companies such as Amazon, TCS, IBM, Microsoft, TATA, etc.

faqs.question: What is the average package for MBA students at SRM University AP?
faqs.answer: The average package for an MBA at SRM University Andhra Pradesh was 7.75 LPA during the recent placement drive. Amazon, TCS, IBM, Microsoft, TATA, etc. were the top recruiters. The placement packages of this course are good. 7.75 LPA can be considered as a good package if we see the fee structure side-by-side, which is very reasonable. Students can get a good return on their fees invested in this course. Almost 90% of the students got placed. The average package of MBA is the second highest average package after B.Tech which is 9.90 LPA.

faqs.question: What are the fee policy of SRM University Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.answer: SRM University Andhra Pradesh's fee refund policy is based on UGC guidelines. Candidates get full refund at any time between the academic year of admission. To get the refund, candidates are required to bring an application form signed by the student and their parent and can be submitted in person or online. Candidates get refund to their bank provided in the refund request form. The refund will be processed by RTGS or NEFT.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered to for BSc at SRM University AP?
faqs.answer: As of now, the BSc average package has not been released by the SRM University yet. However, student reviews present on Shiksha provide students' opinions on the placement scenario at the university. As per that, the highest package bagged by the BCom students during the recent placement drive stood at INR 57 LPA .

faqs.question: What is the cost of studying in SRM University Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.answer: Hello Sandhya, Cost of Studying in SRM University Andhra Pradesh is considered (Medium level). I mean it's worth the fees you will be paying for Studying. For B.Tech the fees start from INR 1.5 LPA ends at INR 3.9 LPA (approximately. EAMCET students have way less fees [90,000-INR 1.2 LPA ] which is paid by Government itself). For Arts the fees start from 0rs ( Merit based) and ends at 1.7 LPA (approximately. ). For Entrepreneurship and Management the fees starts at 0 (Merit based) ends at 2.6LPA (approximately. ). For studying its Worth it. College will give you much more to learn. I hope this helped.

faqs.question: What is the average package for MBA students at SRM University AP?
faqs.answer: The average package for an MBA at SRM University Andhra Pradesh was 7.75 LPA during the recent placement drive. Amazon, TCS, IBM, Microsoft, TATA, etc. were the top recruiters. The placement packages of this course are good. 7.75 LPA can be considered as a good package if we see the fee structure side-by-side, which is very reasonable. hostel_campus.college_name: SRM University AP Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: University provides spacious hostels for 1500 students with both AC and non-AC accommodations with attached wash rooms.The rooms are in a 2/3/4 sharing format with many recreational facilities in the hostel.
facilities: Separate hostel for boys and girls

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball Ground, Throwball Ground, Table Tennis Ground, Foosball Ground, Athletic track

hostel.description: University provides spacious hostels for 1500 students with both AC and non-AC accommodations with attached wash rooms.The rooms are in a 2/3/4 sharing format with many recreational facilities in the hostel.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball Ground, Throwball Ground, Table Tennis Ground, Foosball Ground, Athletic track

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Next Tech Lab

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2025, with really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The CSE department has high-speed Wi-Fi and multiple modern computer labs. Classrooms are smart, air-conditioned, and well-equipped. The library is large and access to digital resources such as IEEE, Springer, and NPTEL courses. Hostels are clean and provide Wi-Fi, AC and non-AC rooms, laundry facilities, and good security. Mess food is average, and a 24/7 medical facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: SRM Andhra Pradesh has the best infrastructure in Andhra Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Aunty is very good, and we have Wi-Fi labs, classrooms, and libraries. We can experience everything on campus, and we have a good food system in the hostel. After the holidays, we can have the best Wifi in our college, which can flow over the campus, and also we must use only Airtel on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and the infrastructure are mind-blowing. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. Labs and classrooms are very neat and soundproof. The hostel and the mess are also good with tasty food. There is a college hospital nearby. There are also many grounds for several games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SRM University, Andhra Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is the only good thing in the college. Wi-Fi is available on campus 24/7, and the hostels are good. The best library resources are available in college. Classrooms are clear and air-conditioned. For sports and games, there is a separate ground for that. Medical facilities are available on campus 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SRM University, Andhra Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure has dam good Wi-Fi that works. 24/7 classrooms are good. We have a structured library. It is so comfortable to study. The quality of facilities in this hostel is good. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is very bad. No proper.

reviews.review_heading: Good learning environment and campus life. Placements and practical exposure need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure has damn good Wi-Fi that works 24/7. Classrooms are good. We have a structured library; it is so comfortable to study. The quality of facilities in the hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is somewhat bad. No proper medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Average college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is the only good thing in the college. Wi-Fi is available on campus 24/7, hostels are good. Best library resources are available in college. Classrooms are clear and air-conditioned. For sports and games, there is a separate ground for that. Medical facilities are available on campus 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our university has excellent infrastructure with good labs, 24/7 Wi-Fi access, and a library with a capacity of 2000 students. Our hostel has good facilities and a hygienic canteen and mess. We also have 24/7 medical support and a large playground.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely gorgeous college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent, but there is room for improvement in food quality. Fast Wi-Fi access, spacious rooms, classrooms, all sports grounds, pharmacy, hospital, and a spacious campus area are provided. Cleanliness is maintained in the hostel rooms with daily cleaning.

reviews.review_heading: I am sure that maximum students will be satisfied by the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is No.1. The most loved place for all students is the hostel. There is Wi-Fi available specially for students in both hostel and college. There are many indoor games in the hostel as well, and tournaments are conducted for them. There is also a sports fest organized regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Very good if you are focused from the beginning onwards. But mostly try through EAPCET.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course and the department are of very high quality, with Wi-Fi and good labs. The library is very huge, but most of the love birds are only in the library. Labs are very huge and classrooms are very comfortable for everyone, it has rotating chairs.

reviews.review_heading: Brief Information about SRM University, Andhra Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure is maintained. Very well cleaned, and good hygiene is maintained at all times. Wi-Fi is good. Classrooms are good. The library is very big and good enough to learn knowledge. Library timings vary depending on the exams, and on normal weekends, people actually like the college.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure available on the campus is the best and one of the best eco-friendly campuses.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are 90 to 100 percent. We have one of the best infrastructure campuses in Andhra Pradesh. The quality of the facilities in our hostel and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen are good for health.

reviews.review_heading: THE SRM-Andhra Pradesh, the University that Offers a Degree with a Life.
reviews.review_text: It has really good infrastructure compared to other colleges and universities. The campus has a lush green environment with pure air everywhere. Even the hostel and labs are fully Wi-Fi enabled. The campus library is a storehouse of books and experiences, which attracts the students to the books.

reviews.review_heading: Top infrastructure and quality of life with average placements and academics.
reviews.review_text: It has best infrastructure in whole India. SRM Andhra Pradesh campus has better infrastructure than SRM KTR too. Every building has centralized AC, and whole campus has modern infrastructure. The hostels are like hotels. They have used top quality materials for the hostels and college. The library is the best ever. They have all facilities, ACs in mess, and food is great. There are canteens in every building and block. Along with so many food outlets including Dominos, Subways, Baskin Robbins, H...

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about SRM University, Andhra Pradesh

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Amazon, PayPal, Anheuser-Busch, HealthRx, InBev, Walmart Labs, L&T Technology Services, Amdocs, Infosys, etc., visit our campus for placements.
Our college is better than many other institutions in bringing companies for placements.

college_info.intro:
The Central University of Haryana comprises more than 5 departments, including Humanities, Law, Science, Education, etc. The affiliated colleges & departments of the university gives numerous courses at the UG- undergraduate & PG - postgraduate levels, across various streams. Among these courses the MBA & BTech among the most popular programmes available at the university.
These courses are popular among students due to their placements and career paths in the case of BTech and MBA. Several placement opportunities are offered to the students. Interested students can check the other Central University of Haryana programmes below:

placements.overview: Central University of Haryana has not released the 2025 placement report or brochure. As per the NIRF report 2025, 64 UG (3-year), 76 UG (4-year), and 278 PG (2-year) students were placed during 2024 placements. The median package offered to UG (3-year) and UG (4-year) students were INR 2.75 LPA and INR 3.42 LPA, respectively Further, the median package offered to PG (2-year) students during Central University of Haryana placements 2024 was INR 3.66 LPA. faqs.answer: A:    When making the cutoff for the Central University of Hyderabad MBA course, the officials will take examination and admission aspects into consideration. The listed factors will be verified and taken into account by the authorities while deciding the cutoff for CUH MBA: cutoff trends of previous years, level of difficulty in the exam, number of qualified candidates, number of candidates applying for a particular course or institute, number of seats in the institute for admission, etc. After verifying all of these factors, the authorities will establish the CUH CUET PG cutoff for admission to the MBA programme.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: This is a good college in Haryana for an M.A. in Economics.

review_content.Placements: 95% of students got placed in India and abroad. The median placement was modest, around 2.8–4.89 lakhs per month, which was a prestigious salary for a student. The companies where students got placed were HDFC Bank, ICICI, TCS, IBM, Microsoft, and Infosys. Every year, these companies visit the college campus, and students get placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college had a big library and provided all study materials free of cost. All classrooms were smart classrooms and provided Wi-Fi 24/7 across the college campus. The college had an auditorium. The campus had college hostels. They were price-friendly. The campus also had a canteen, and they provided good-quality food.

reviews_list.review_title: Affordable fees, but the remote location is a significant drawback for an active social life.

review_content.Placements: Placements are definitely a mixed bag. While top students in core tech/commerce departments land solid packages, many courses lack consistent, high-quality on-campus recruitment opportunities, pushing students to find their own path or pursue higher studies. It's consistent at best.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is CUH's strong suit, modern AC classrooms, excellent labs, a massive library, and reliable Wi-Fi. Hostels are generally decent with good facilities, though the quality of mess food is a recurring complaint, and securing a boys' hostel spot can be very competitive due to demand.

Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.answer: Central University of Haryana accepts JEE Main entrance exam scores for admissio to BTech courses. During the Central University of Haryana JEE Mains cutoff 2024, the cutoff ranged between 87659 and 483320 wherein, CSE was the most competitive BTech specialisation. The easiest BTech course to get into CUH was BTech in Printing and Packaging Technology for the General AI category students. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the Central University of Haryana CSE cutoff 2024 for various categories: CategoryCSE Cutoff 2024General87659OBC109524SC268426ST322328EWS106325
faqs.question: Q: What is the cutoff for B.Tech at Central University of Haryana?

faqs.answer: The Central University of Haryana CUET PG cutoff 2024 has been released for MA, MBA, MSc, MCom, MCA, M.Lib.I.Sc, MTTM and PG Diploma courses. As per the CUH cuet cut off 2024, the scores ranged between 9 and 250 for the General AI category students. The most competitive course was MA in Psychology, followed by MA in Sociology with a cutoff score of 250 and 200, respectively. So, considering the CUET PG cutoff score, candidates seeking admission at the Central University of Haryana must secure upto 250 for the students belonging to the General AI category. For the OBC category students, the cutoff scores ranged between 26 and 244 under the AI quota. For this category, the toughest course to get into CUH was MA in Psychology. The easiest programme was MTech in Energy Systems and Management.

review_summary.college_name: Central University of Haryana Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Central University of Haryana and education.

content.Placements: About 70 percent of students got placed from my course. The highest package is 28 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are electrical companies that like RR cables, etc. About 28 percent of students got internships in companies like RR Cables and Tata Electric.
content.Infrastructure: In the infrastructure engineering development stage, the departments are very good. Wi-Fi labs and classrooms are very brilliant. The quality of education is very good the facilities in hostels are not so good. We have to take PG other than the hostel, thank you.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: My review of this college.

content.Placements: Around 50 percent of the students got placed in the course. The highest package was 17 LPA, and the lowest was around 3 LPA. The companies that visited the campus were Delloite, Wipro, TCS, Adani, etc. The college offered good placement opportunities for students interested in getting themselves employed. Most of the job descriptions were for the role of SDE, which consists of FTE + internship. Internships started in January in the last semester. As soon as the course was over, students joined for their full-time. Companies conducted interview sections for placement selection and for the package.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This is a good college in Haryana for an M.A. in Economics.

content.Placements: 95% of students got placed in India and abroad. The median placement was modest, around 2.8–4.89 lakhs per month, which was a prestigious salary for a student. The companies where students got placed were HDFC Bank, ICICI, TCS, IBM, Microsoft, and Infosys. Every year, these companies visit the college campus, and students get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The college had a big library and provided all study materials free of cost. All classrooms were smart classrooms and provided Wi-Fi 24/7 across the college campus. The college had an auditorium. The campus had college hostels. They were price-friendly. The campus also had a canteen, and they provided good-quality food.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Nutrition Biology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Affordable fees, but the remote location is a significant drawback for an active social life.

content.Placements: Placements are definitely a mixed bag. While top students in core tech/commerce departments land solid packages, many courses lack consistent, high-quality on-campus recruitment opportunities, pushing students to find their own path or pursue higher studies. It's consistent at best.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is CUH's strong suit, modern AC classrooms, excellent labs, a massive library, and reliable Wi-Fi. Hostels are generally decent with good facilities, though the quality of mess food is a recurring complaint, and securing a boys' hostel spot can be very competitive due to demand.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Sc.-M.Sc in Physics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Well, I would like to say that some of the departments are very good. Not all, so choose wisely.

content.Placements: My college took admission through a cutoff, and many students got good internships. The latest company, Lenskart, arrived in our college for placement, and student from B.com took seats in their company. Overall, I will say that it is quite good for placement, not too much better.
content.Infrastructure: Well, about Wi-Fi, I would say that it is good because it is present in the department as well as in the hostel. The hostels are also good. I would prefer the old hostel because there are 3 seats in a room for the old hostel, and there are 4 seats in a room for new students or in the new hostel.

admission_overview.college_name: Central University of Haryana Course Admissions 2025: Dates, CUET 2024, Cut off, Eligibility & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: Central University of Haryana admission to most UG & PG courses is entrance-based. The university offers various courses in the fields of Engineering, Arts, Science, and Commerce. For most of the courses, candidates are enrolled based on CUET scores at theCentral University of Haryana.Central University of Haryana (CUH) is a NAAC-accredited and UGC-approved university.

Admission to several UG and PG courses at CUH is done basis the CUCET exam. The major courses offered by the Central University of Haryana along with the admission status and eligibility criteria are presented below:
Eligibility
Class 12 pass in relevant stream with 50% aggregate
Class 12 pass in relevant stream with 45% aggregate
Bachelor’s degree in relevant stream with 50% aggregate
Bachelor’s degree in relevant stream with 50% aggregate
Bachelor’s degree in relevant stream with 50% aggregate
Bachelor’s degree in relevant stream with 50% aggregate
Check out the completeCUH Fee Structure

Central University of Haryana feeis a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually.

Coming to affordability is one of the strong reasons why many don't opt for a degree or a college. The availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible. However, the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Check below the total tuition fee and average package for the top Central University of Haryana
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

Central University of Haryana seat intake varies course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Below is the intake for the top Central University of Haryana courses:
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

Central University of Haryana accepts admission through various national-level & university-level entrance exams, such as CUET, CUET-PG, GPAT, and GATE. Candidates who meet the eligibility and selection criteria established by the university can apply by filling out the application form through the Central University of Haryana's official website. Given below is the Central University of Haryana admission process:
Step 1: Central University of Haryana Application Process 2025

For admission to any of the programmes at the Central University of Haryana, candidates are required to fill out the application form through the university’s official website by paying the required application fee for final submission.
Step 2: Central University of Haryana Selection Criteria 2025

Central University of Haryana admission is completely entrance exam-based. The university inducts candidates through various national-level & university-level entrance exams, such as CUET, CUET-PG, Candidates having valid scores in the aforementioned exams will be shortlisted for the counselling process.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment 2025

After the completion of the counselling process, candidates will be required to complete the final admission process, i.e. document verification andCentral University of Haryana feepayment for final seat allotment.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

placement_data.title: Central University of Haryana Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Central University of Haryana has not released the placement report for the Class of 2025. The University has released the NIRF report 2025 which has the placement data for batch 2024. According to the report, 64 UG 3 year students were placed out of the total 161 graduated students during Central University of Haryana placements 2024 with a median package of INR 2.75 LPA . In UG 4 year program, 76 students of the batch 2024 got placements with a median salary of INR 3.42 LPA.

In PG 1 year program , 3 students of batch 2024 were placed with a median salary of INR 1.5 LPA. Further, 278 students from the PG 2 year batch 2024 secured placements with the median salary of INR 3.66 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of Central University of Haryana in the recent past include Wipro, Infosys, TCS, etc.

faqs.question: What is the package offered at CUH?
faqs.answer: The University has disclosed the median package details for UG and PG courses. Over the past three years (2021 to 2023), a fluctuating trend was observed in the median package of BTech and PG (2-year) courses. The following table depicts the CUH placement package trends: Course Median Package (2021) Median Package (2022) Median Package (2023) BTech INR 3.24 LPA INR 3.15 LPA INR 4.69 LPA MTech N/A N/A INR 2.88 LPA PG (2-year) INR 2.85 LPA INR 2.80 LPA INR 3.55 LPA NOTE: The salary data mentioned above is gathered from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: How are BSc placements at Central University of Haryana - CUH?

Although 45% of students were placed and were offered in an average salary package of 2.5 LPA. So, by looking at these statistics we can say that the students from Central University of Haryana gets a descent placements opportunity provided by the University with an extensive salary packages.

faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses offered by Central University of Haryana - CUH?
faqs.answer: Since Central University of Haryana is a government/public university, the fees is affordable and less. The fees is different for various courses. Fees for Masters courses like M.Sc (2k-20k), MCA, MBA, MA (2k-12k), M.P.Ed, M.Com, M.Ed, M.Lib.I.Sc, MHMTT, MHMCT, M.Pharma range from 2k-10k. But M.Tech ahs the highest fees of 52k For Bachelors programme courses the fees range is 2k-10k . But for professional courses like B.Tech it goes up to 1.5lakh per year. The popularity of the course also affects the fees. Various scholarships are also offered and financial needs few of them are: Merit cum scholarship Post doctoral fellowship Swami Vivekananda single girl child scholarship. Promotion of Science education scholarship Haryana post matric scholarship.

faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities after completing BTech courses from CUH?
faqs.answer: Yes, there are government jobs available after the completion of a BTech degree from Central University of Haryana. Graduates can opt for different positions in different sectors, such as public sector undertakings (PSUs), government ministries, defense services, and other government organisations. Some of the government job prospects for BTech graduates are listed below: PSUs: Organisations such as BHEL, ONGC, NTPC, and GAIL hire BTech graduates through competitive exams such as GATE. Indian Engineering Services (IES): After finishing BTech, candidates can sit for the Engineering Services Examination (ESE) held by the UPSC, which provides coveted jobs in several government organisations. Defense Services: BTech holders are eligible to join the Indian Army, Navy, or Air Force via exams such as the Combined Defence Services (CDS) or Technical Entry Schemes (TES). Railway Jobs: Indian Railways hires engineers from the Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) for technical roles. State Public Service Commissions: State government states hold exams.

CUH JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the CUH CSE cutoff 2025 was 138590 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the CUH B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 138590 and 916399 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 138590 and 276044, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

reviews.review_heading: Central University of Haryana and education.
reviews.review_text: In the infrastructure engineering development stage, the departments are very good. Wi-Fi labs and classrooms are very brilliant. The quality of education is very good the facilities in hostels are not so good. We have to take PG other than the hostel, thank you.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility was available at a reasonable price with good quality food, and with rooms available with single or double sharing. There was a 24-hour water supply and Wi-Fi facility also available.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college in Haryana for an M.A. in Economics.
reviews.review_text: The college had a big library and provided all study materials free of cost. All classrooms were smart classrooms and provided Wi-Fi 24/7 across the college campus. The college had an auditorium. The campus had college hostels. They were price-friendly. The campus also had a canteen, and they provided good-quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Affordable fees, but the remote location is a significant drawback for an active social life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is CUH's strong suit, modern AC classrooms, excellent labs, a massive library, and reliable Wi-Fi. Hostels are generally decent with good facilities, though the quality of mess food is a recurring complaint, and securing a boys' hostel spot can be very competitive due to demand.

reviews.review_heading: Well, I would like to say that some of the departments are very good. Not all, so choose wisely.
reviews.review_text: Well, about Wi-Fi, I would say that it is good because it is present in the department as well as in the hostel. The hostels are also good. I would prefer the old hostel because there are 3 seats in a room for the old hostel, and there are 4 seats in a room for new students or in the new hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The mentorship provided by the lecturers is excellent.
reviews.review_text: All the equipment, tools, and apparatus required for facilitated laboratories are built within the departmental blocks. Also, small individual research areas are initiated for all the departments. The transport and other fees are charged in a fair way.

reviews.review_heading: It offers affordable education with supportive faculty. Placement and location need Improvement.
reviews.review_text: B.Tech Civil Engineering has well-equipped labs for transportation, concrete, soil mechanics, fluid mechanics, surveying, and environmental engineering. The campus has Wi-Fi and a central library. Hostels have basic facilities like shared rooms, beds, tables, and Wi-Fi. Mess food is vegetarian and generally considered average. The university has a health centre with basic medical services and a 24x7 ambulance. There is a large sports complex with facilities for various outdoor and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's the best university for the M.Com. course.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. We have a very good library on campus. There is great encouragement for sports and games. We have high-quality equipment in the labs. The college provides medical rooms, and in case of emergency, CBIT has an ambulance. Labs are always equipped with the latest technology.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and best faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided to students in hostel and on campus. All facilities, including the cafeteria, mess, dispensary, sports, and games are provided. Hostel fees and course fees are very affordable for students. University also provides scholarships for students from poor backgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: The college is underrated, but it is a high-potential course.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good. But the mess food is not the best. The hostel facilities are decent.

reviews.review_heading: Well infrastructure and facilities but lack of college placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-developed infrastructure. There is a separate library for students with free Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned. The quality of facilities is good, with full Wi-Fi and well-maintained hostels. The mess food is delicious, and there is a ground for students. The hostel also provides a gym for students. Free medical facilities are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: MBA is preety good here no restriction of over loads, calm soothing environment in campus and good.
reviews.review_text: All good, but the mess is not as good as expected. All the labs are good and have good surroundings. The facilities of Wi-Fi are in the academic block and also in a hostel, and the speed of Wi-Fi is also good. The mess food dissatisfied me. It's not good. Sometimes, I had food times.

reviews.review_heading: The behaviour of teachers towards students is very good.
reviews.review_text: My overall experience with campus life had been enriching and multifaceted encomposing both academic and social aspects The campus fosters a vibrant social environment and I had actively participated in several clubs and societies allowing me to connect with like minded individuals and pursue my interest outside academics. These clubs regularly organised events, workshops, and competitions contributing significantly to a lively campus atmosphere annual and technical festivals.

reviews.review_heading: It is a growing and developing institute.
reviews.review_text: Well-structured building is there and greenery is maintained. It has 24X7 Wi-Fi service on the whole campus. Mess is available but canteen inside hostel is not available. Though there are shops on the campus near hostels. Medical facility is available 24X7. Labs are good. There is a central library and has study environment.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Central University of Haryana.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. There are ACs installed in all classrooms. AC is installed in auditoriums with good infrastructure. We have good hostel facilities. There is a gym within the hostel. It also provides geysers, clean washrooms, study rooms, and AC in the summer.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Central University of Haryana

The training and placement cell also provides information on off-campus recruitment.

highlights.summary: MIT School of Computing admission 2026 are open. Students can apply directly through the official website.

college_info.intro:
MIT School of Computing popular programmes are BTech and MSc. The institute offers BTech programme for the duration of four-years in full time mode. The institute offers BTech specilisation in CSE, Cyber Security & Forensics, Blockchain Technology, Information Technology, Data Analytics, and others. BTech students can work in the Banking Sector, Software Firms, MNCs, and others. BTech students can work as Software Engineers, Data Scientists, and others. MIT School of Computing is one of the top colleges in India. A lot of BTech courses are provided in collaboration with various organisations such as TCSion, Intel, AWS, and others.
MIT SOC MSc students are taught Computer Science with specialisation - AIML. MIT School of Computing offers placement assistance to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the MIT School of Computing and their respective eligibility and MIT School of Computing fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    See the table to know the packages offered at MIT School of Computing placements given below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024)the highest Package INR 61 LPAAverage Package INR 7.5 LPAStudents Placed 419 Placement Rate 90.5%
faqs.question: What is the placement package at MIT SOC?

faqs.answer: A:    MIT School of Computing offers decent placements annually to its BTech, MTech and MSc students. In 2024, more than 600 recruiters visited the campus and presented over 1300 job offers to the batch 2024. The highest and average package offered to the batch 2024 was INR 61 LPA and INR 7.5 LPA.
faqs.question: How are the placements at MIT School of Computing?

faqs.answer: A:    The list of recruiters that presented the job offers to the 2024 passing out batch are mentioned below:MIT SOC Top RecruitersCapgeminiMahindra & MahindraAress SoftwareKPITJio Platforms LimitedTATA TechnologiesHexaviewSpring Computing TechnologiesNTT DataPalo AltoRockwell AutomationVodafone Intelligent System
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of MIT School of Computing?

faqs.answer: A:    MIT School of Computing has not released the placement report for the batch 2025. Earlier, in 2024, more than 600 recruiters visited the campus and presented over 1300 job offers to the students. Some of the top recruiters include Capgemini, LTI, Paloalto, TCS, Infosys, etc.
faqs.question: How many companies participated during the recent MIT School of Computing?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: MIT School of Computing offers UG, PG and PhD courses to students. These courses are provided across Engineering, Computing, and various other streams. At the UG level, the institute offers BTech courses to students. BTech is provided in 11 specialisations like Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) and Information Technology (IT). At the PG level, the college provides MTech, MSc, and other courses to students. Below mentioned are MIT School of Computing courses along with their eligibility criteria and MIT School of Computing fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fees for M.Tech at MIT School of Computing is INR 3.5 lakh. Aspirants must pay the fees to confirm their seat in the school. Candidates must pay the fees via the mode accepted by the school.
faqs.question: How much is the fees for M.Tech at MIT School of Computing?

faqs.answer: A:    MIT School of Computing offers BTech course in UG programme. Students must qualify Class 10+2 with the recognised board with 45% marks. The institute accepts national entrance exams like MH-CET, JEE Main, PERA CET, etc.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for UG programmes at MIT School of Computing?

faqs.answer: A:    MIT School of Computing offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses to students. These courses are provided across Engineering, Computing, and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers BTech courses to students. BTech is provided in 11 specialisations such as Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) and Information Technology (IT). At the PG level, the college offers MTech, MSc, and other courses to students.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered at MIT School of Computing?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, admission to integrated M.Tech course is based on PERA CET, JEE Main, MHT CET or Uni-GAUGE score. The school releases a merit list announcing the names of the shortlisted candidates. Shortlisted aspirants will recieve a mail for admission confirmation. Selected candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the school.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a decent college if we are not particularly looking for placements.

review_content.Placements: Less than 50% of students get placed. The highest package ranges from 52-55 LPA, but I doubt if it's legit, but that's what's on the papers. Companies like Infosys, TCS iON, etc., hire students from the college. Around 30-40% of students get internships at TCS, mostly because it's a tie-up. The top roles offered are data scientist, software engineer, and AI engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good, and we will get everything, such as Wi-Fi, decent labs, and classrooms that are pretty nice. Especially, the library is good. I would say hostels are not the best, especially because of the quality of food they serve here. Otherwise, sports facilities are good and the canteen is decent.

reviews_list.review_title: Very good college for B.Tech.

review_content.Placements: According to the previous year, more than 75% students got placed from our college. According to me, placements are very good. There are a lot of big companies like Amazon, etc., that are coming to SOC. There are a lot of students from SOC who are serving as the chief executive officer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is the best. We have separate classes for every division. There are computer labs with good internet. The library is also nice, and we can borrow books for a few days. The hostel is equipped with Wi-Fi and water coolers, and all the floors have separate Wi-Fi with good speed.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is the best. We have separate classes for every division. There are computer labs with good internet. The library is also nice, and we can borrow books for a few days. The hostel is equipped with Wi-Fi and water coolers, and all the floors have separate Wi-Fi with good speed up to 1 Gbps.

admission_overview.title: MIT School of Computing Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: MIT School of Computing, MIT-ADT admissions are entrance-based. The school accepts scores in JEE Main, MHT CET, PERA CET and other entrance exams. MIT School of Computing offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in affiliation with MIT-ADT University. The school offers programems in Computer Science, IT, Engineering, etc. BTech is one of the popular programmes offered at MITSC. Candidates can apply for the preferred course online.

eligibility_selection.title: MIT School of Computing Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: MIT School of Computing admission is entrance-based for most of the courses. Students need to pass the national-level/ state-level entrance exam for admission. Candidates also need to meet the eligibility to apply for a course. Check below MIT School of Computing courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria: Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics and/ or Technical Vocational Subjects and English with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for Backward class categories and Persons with Disability candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only)

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission in BTech at MIT School of Computing?

faqs.answer: Aspirants must pass BTech (CSE/ IT) with a minimum of 50% aggregate to apply for M.Tech programme at MIT School of Computing. Engineering graduates with two-years of IT/ Software Industry experience can also apply for MTech. Aspirants must also have PERA CET or GATE scores for admission.
faqs.question: Who can apply for M.Tech at MIT School of Computing?

faqs.answer: MIT School of Computing admissions are entrance-based. Hencefor courses such as BTech and MTech, admissions are completely entrance-based and direct admission may not be possible.
faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to MIT School of Computing?

faqs.answer: MIT School of Computing offers BTech course in UG programme. Students must qualify Class 10+2 with the recognised board with 45% marks. The institute accepts national entrance exams like MH-CET, JEE Main, PERA CET, etc.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for UG programmes at MIT School of Computing?

admission_process.title: MIT School of Computing Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: MIT School of Computing has amulti-step admission process. Starting with the application, students need to go through the course-specific entrance exam followed by other selection rounds. After the selection rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of the university, interested candidates can submit the fee and confirm their admission. Check below the steps to get a seat in MIT School of Computing:
lists: MIT School of Computing Application Process 2026Students must submit the online application form for all UG and PG courses. MIT School of Computing application process is conducted in online mode.

SelectionCandidates are offered admission based on their entrance exam scores. Aspirants with JEE Main, MHT CET, Uni-Gauge or any other state-level CET scores can get admission in BTech course. Admission to MSc and MTech courses is based on GATE or PERA CET scores of the candidates. The institute releases a course-wise merit list.
Admission ConfirmationCandidates with their names in the merit lists need to pay theMIT School of Computing fees.

courses_data.name: MIT School of Computing BTech Admission 2026
eligibility: Accepting Exams:Uni-GAUGE, PERA CET, MHT CET, JEE Main
courses_data.description: MIT School of Computing offers a four-year full-time BTech course at the UG level. The school offers BTech in Computer Science & Engineering and Information Technology. Admission to BTech programme is based on JEE Main, MHT CET, PERA CET, Uni-gauge scores of the candidates. Aspirants must complete Class 12 with relevant subjects with at least 45% aggregate to apply for BTech.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech course at MIT School of Computing, MIT-ADT?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MIT School of Computing BTech isINR 12.72 lakh. The total fee, includes tuition fee, development fee, university fee, medical insurance, etc. Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm seats. Students also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The application fee for BTech course is INR 1,800. Its payment can be done in an online mode.

faqs.question: Can I apply for BTech after Diploma at MIT School of Computing?
faqs.answer: Aspirants must pass Diploma in Engineering and Technology with a minimum of 45% aggregate to apply for BTech at MIT School of Computing. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for candidates belonging to backward class categories and Person with Disability belonging to Maharashtra only) to apply for BTech at MIT School of Computing.

courses_data.name: MIT School of Computing MTech Admission 2026
courses_data.description: MIT School of Computing offersMTech course in a full-time mode for two-years. The course is offered across two specialisations, namely Computer Science & Engineering - Intelligent Systems & Analytics and Information Technology-Cyber Security. Admission to MTech is based on GATE/ PERACET exam scores. More details aroundMIT School of Computing MTech admission 2025are as follows:

faqs.question: How to get admission to M.Tech course at MIT School of Computing, MIT-ADT?
faqs.answer: Admission to M.Tech course is based on PERA or GATE score. The school releases a merit list announcing the names of the shortlisted candidates. Shortlisted aspirants will recieve a mail for admission confirmation. Selected candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the school.

faqs.question: How much is the fees for M.Tech at MIT School of Computing?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees for M.Tech at MIT School of Computing isINR 3.5 lakh. Aspirants must pay the fees to confirm their seat in the school. Candidates must pay the fees via the mode accepted by the school.

faqs.question: How to get admission to MIT School of Computing?
faqs.answer: To get admission to MIT School of Computing, candidates need to go through a three-level admission process. It includes:Application Process:Candidates seeking for getting into MIT School of Engineering must submit the online application form for all UG and PG courses at mituniversity.ac.in/ as per their preferred course. MIT School of Engineering application process is completely conducted in online mode.Selection Rounds & Release of Merit List:After the applications are submitted, students are required to go through the course-specific entrance exam followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After the selection rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website (with the names of the shortlisted students) of the university.Admission Confirmation at MIT School of Engineering:Post the selection rounds, candidates who are shortlisted and have their names on the merit lists can submit the fee and confirm their admission to the relevant course at MIT Sch

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission at MIT School of Computing?
faqs.answer: MIT School of Computing accepts entrance exam scores for admission. The school considers PERA CET or GATE scores for admission to MTech/ MSc programmes. Admission to BTech is based on JEE Main, MHT CET, Uni-gauge and other state-level CET scores.

faqs.question: When will JEE Main 2026 Registration start?
faqs.answer: JEE Main Registration 2026 Session 2 registration has started at jeemain.nta.nic.in.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for integrated M.Tech course at MIT School of Computing, MIT-ADT?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics and/ or Technical Vocational Subjects and English with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) can apply for integrated M.Tech course. Candidates must prove their eligibility during the verification process to avoid rejection.

placement_report.college_name: MIT School of Computing Placements 2026: Average Package, Highest Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: MIT School of Computing Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: MIT School of Computing has not released the placement details for the batch 2026. The students of the batch 2024 secured over 1300 job offers from over 600 companies . The highest and average package offered to the batch 2024 was INR 61 LPA and INR 7.5 LPA. The institute has recorded 90.5% placements for its CSE and IT batch passed out in 2024. A total of 465 students registered of which 419 were placed in reputed companies. The participating recruiters presented 208 internship offers to the students of the CSE and IT batch 2024.

The SOC has also released the 2023 list of students placed along with the packages offered to them. A total of 525 students were placed . The highest package and lowest package stood at INR 58 LPA and INR 1 LPA , respectively. Xperi, Intellipaat, Whirlpool Corporation were among the top recruiters of MIT School of Computing placements 2023.

Anyone with health issues or a medical emergen...

reviews.review_heading: Overall campus review including course structure and extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The sports complex offers a variety of indoor and outdoor facilities, including a swimming pool, gym, cricket ground and various court sports. MIT ADT University has a large, lush green campus with modern buildings, parking and a cafeteria. Modern computer labs are available for students' use (Mac and Dell both). Wi-Fi coverage is all over the building for each branch and has excellent speed. Canteen food is good and the campus has several places to eat from where good quality food is served. A ...

reviews.review_heading: Good college if you get scholarship.
reviews.review_text: MIT ADT University offers campus-wide Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and bright classrooms. Hostel rooms are furnished, but mess food quality varies. A big plus is the on-campus Vishwaraj Hospital for all medical needs. Sports facilities are plentiful, with diverse indoor and outdoor options. The main challenge is its river proximity means heavy rains can cause campus flooding, sometimes leading to temporary locations and class cancellations for safety. Some development work is still going on in col...

reviews.review_heading: It has decent infrastructure but poor faculty support.
reviews.review_text: MIT ADT University offers excellent infrastructure with Wi Fi enabled classrooms well-equipped labs a vast library and creative studios. Hostels are clean and secure. It provides Wi Fi housekeeping and basic amenities. The mess serves hygienic food with vegetarian and non vegetarian options while multiple canteens offer varied cuisines. Medical facilities include an on campus clinic with a doctor and emergency support. The university promotes sports with facilities for cricket football basketbal...

reviews.review_heading: The campus is beautiful with great memories.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of MIT ADT University is very good. They have good labs, a library, and good classrooms. Right now, they don't have AC in any classroom. Other than that, everything is good. The quality of the hostel is also very good. The girls' hostel is very good and spacious, but in the boys' hostel, it's not spacious, but you can live and make memories. They provide you everything. The quality of the mess is also very good, neat, and clean.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, having a nice campus, average packages, friendly facilities, and students.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, unlimited Wi-Fi and electricity are available all day without load shedding, and water is available throughout the day. Labs are neat and maintained. Classrooms are well-maintained with projectors and smart boards. The mess food is average in taste, but it provides four meals a day, including breakfast and tea.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest students take admission to this college.

highlights.summary: RV University admissions 2026 are open for UG and PG programmes. Students can check and apply online for their desired programme through the official portal of the university.

RV University popular programmes are BTech & BSc. BTech students are given facilities like Data Analytics Lab etc. BTech students are taught the technical skills that are required for growth & development. The following are the RVU Bangalore popular programme USP:
International exchange programmes & collaborations
Option to choose electives from School of Liberal Arts & Sciences & School of Design
A unique research & action ecosystem
Experiential Learning — Internships
RV University students are placed in top companies at top positions such as TCS, Samsung, Infosys, and others. In the past, the university has been ranked 2 in the Emerging State Private University category by the Outlook 2025. The below are the courses and their respective fee and eligibility criteria:

review_summary.college_name: RV University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech (Hons) Computer Science and Engineering (Cloud computing) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college in Bangalore.

content.Placements: Almost 80 percent of students are placed, and the highest package is around 56 LPA, while I have no idea about the lowest. TCS, JP Morgan, and other such companies provide internship opportunities for students, as they have on-campus internship opportunities and good placement opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Good classrooms with AC, Wi-Fi, and library by Brigade Groups. Good infrastructure facilities with sports and games, and the canteen is well maintained and has lots of options. Dispensary is available with medications. Overall a good college to choose from.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (NOV 2025) B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is absolutely a waste of money, time, and energy.

content.Placements: Placements are not yet done for my course, as this course was started in 2022. I am in the 2023 batch of this course, and placements may start from next year. There is not much hope for placements, and placements here are an absolute scam. The college says they will place students properly, but so far, there is no sign of placements.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of Wi-Fi has improved recently, and before, it was quite poor. Labs are open to students now, and I do not have much information on labs. Classrooms are pretty decent. The library is pretty good, especially after the construction of the new library. The canteen is good, and the food is the worst. Sports are there just for the namesake. Medical facilities are pretty good.

individual_reviews.course: B. Tech (Hons) Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Decent enough college for studio guys with good campus life.

content.Placements: Some students are left in placement, with the highest being 22 LPA as heard and the lowest 2 LPA, and companies visiting include tech giants like Amazon, Microsoft, Cisco, Infosys, Wipro, Intel, consulting firms like Deloitte, KPMG, EY, finance companies like HDFC, ICICI, Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, and others like Flipkart, Titan, Tata Motors, and Mercedes-Benz.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. As it is a new college, infrastructure is also great. Wi-Fi is pretty decent. Classrooms are comfortable and library is the best part of college. Sports ground is shared with RVCE and in total it is worth as a place to chill and enjoy.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (NOV 2025) M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Life at RV University and the student life.

content.Placements: We have about 14 students, and our seniors are about 6 students, and out of that, 4 get placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest is 8 LPA. Recruiting companies are TISS, HP, and JP Morgan. All of us have internships in various companies and institutions. I got selected at TISS Mumbai as a research intern. Top roles offered are financial analyst, economic researcher, and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi in every corner of the campus. Labs are well-equipped. We have a top-class library. I don't know much about the hostel because I am from Bangalore. I have heard from my friends that the food is good in hostel. For sports and games, we have a proper ground.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (NOV 2025) Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I have a problem with attendance. Placements are the best.

content.Placements: B.Com (Hons) placement percentage is 30%. The highest package is 12 LPA and the average package is 7 LPA. The lowest package is 4 LPA. Top recruiters are Deloitte and KPMG. 60% of students got internships in roles like accountant, HR, and manager. I am in B.Com. For B.Tech (Hons) and engineering placements are good.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice but they are constructing more. Wi-Fi and classrooms are top-notch. They have a big library, which is good. The food in the canteen is good we have MM Foods, as well as both small and large Mingos. I don't know much about sports. Games are good, we play treasure hunts, escape rooms, and all events.

admission_overview.college_name: RV University Course Admission 2026: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_overview.title: RV University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: RV University Bangalore admission is based on both merit and entrance score depending on the programme. The university offers over 20 courses at UG and PG levels. These are offered through various schools, such as the School of Liberal Arts & Science, School of Design & Innovation, School of Computer Science Engineering, etc. Apart from the UG and PG courses, RV University Bangalore also offers PhD courses. The application process is conducted online. The university offers courses in multiple streams like Management, Science, Arts, Engineering, and Law etc. Interested students can go through the following sections to know more about the RV University Bangalore admissions.

eligibility_selection.title: RV University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: RV University course admission to the different courses is subject to the fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. The mode of study is full-time. Students have to submit scores of accepted national or state-level exams. Some of the accepted tests include KCET, CUET, UCEED, and more. Students may also appear for the university's entrance test/ selection rounds. The selection rounds may include RV Admission Test/ Interview/ Portfolio review, etc. Check below the eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popular RV University courses:

paragraphs: RV University admissionsare offered to eligible students who complete the admission stages. The first step is to check the eligibility. This is followed by application, RVU's selection process, and admission confirmation. TheRV University admission processis as given below.
RVU Application Process 2026

The application mode is online or offline. For admission to the various UG programmes, aspirants need to apply at https.//admissions.rvu.edu.in/. Students can fill and submit the form online at the official site of the university.
RVU Selection Process 2026

The university considers RVU’s Selection Process. Post selection rounds, students may have to go thorugh the counselling process. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection. For some courses, entrance tests, such as CUET, UCEED, etc are also considered.
Merit List & Admission Confirmation
Selected students whose names are displayed in the merit list have to pay the RV University fees to complete the process.

description: RV University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

RV University Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 2963 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 1676 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.
Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at RV University. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 2963 in the General category under the AI quota.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.

Classrooms are pretty decent. The library is pretty good, especially after the construction of the new library. The canteen is good, and the food is the worst. Sports are there just for the namesake. Medical facilities are pretty good.

reviews.review_heading: Decent enough college for studio guys with good campus life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. As it is a new college, infrastructure is also great. Wi-Fi is pretty decent. Classrooms are comfortable and library is the best part of college. Sports ground is shared with RVCE and in total it is worth as a place to chill and enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: Life at RV University and the student life.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi in every corner of the campus. Labs are well-equipped. We have a top-class library. I don't know much about the hostel because I am from Bangalore. I have heard from my friends that the food is good in hostel. For sports and games, we have a proper ground.

reviews.review_heading: I have a problem with attendance. Placements are the best.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice but they are constructing more. Wi-Fi and classrooms are top-notch. They have a big library, which is good. The food in the canteen is good we have MM Foods, as well as both small and large Mingos. I don't know much about sports. Games are good, we play treasure hunts, escape rooms, and all events.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with education like teaching, placements, and all over it's good.
reviews.review_text: We have good classroom. Wi-Fi connection and lab facilities are available. There is a hospital inside the college for any emergency. We have two good canteens for lunch. There are lots of clubs for individual fields like sports, dance, singing, etc. There is a good hostel facility with basic needs and all.

reviews.review_heading: Impressive but need more improvement .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for our course is really good, no issues with the Wi-Fi, labs are well-equipped, classrooms are clean, we have huge library in the campus which has been opened recently. When it comes to hostel facilities, Little improvement of food is required and other amenities like washing machines gym and all are provided there is a parking space for hostlers separately if they have vehicle.

reviews.review_heading: College is amazing. I recommend everyone to join this college.
reviews.review_text: College provides good Wi-Fi speed, and classrooms are well-maintained and hygienic. New library has opened recently in RVU is very fantastic. Hostel facilities are amazing, to be honest. The quality of the food is decent. Canteen food is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Pretty much not satisfied because of the timings and not fests and interactive things in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Our has good infrastructure and they are still building so many blocks for different departments. The newest thing is the rvu library it's one of the main monument of rvu. The facalties are very good and interactive with the students. The canteen has good food.

reviews.review_heading: RV University isn't too bad of place to join. It's really shaping up.
reviews.review_text: Each classroom has a smart board, and if no smart board, we have a smart projector. We recently got a new library, and I've never been so happy; it's absolutely massive, and we have privacy booths inside too. It's really nice. I'm not in the hostel, so I'm not sure, but I haven't heard great things from my friends.

reviews.review_heading: Yet to be satisfied with the greenery on campus.
reviews.review_text: If we come to the infrastructure of the college, it is an under-construction building as it is new. The management is now planning to build a variety of buildings for different courses separately, and there are Wi-Fi facilities, labs, and a beautiful library for us to read.

reviews.review_heading: RV University from the POV of a Student of RVU.
reviews.review_text: Well, some buildings for RVU are still under construction, but the ones that are done are extremely modern and cool. I'm not a part of the hostel, but I've heard from my friends who are that the rooms are really great, but the food quality is kind of okay-ish.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the RV University.
reviews.review_text: Half of the building is under construction, but classrooms are not bad, and they will be renovated later. There is Wi-Fi everywhere in the building. There was no vacancy in the hostel (150+ girls on the waiting list), so I had to look for PG accommodation. Canteen is a bit far from our course building, but the food is good. They have a health center on campus. The college has a ground, and they conduct sports day and encourage us to participate in student club activities as well.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and faculty are good, and students have to catch up on things along with it.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and everything are good. The library is small. The new building for the library will be soon available. There are 2-3 hostels. Some hostels' maintenance is good. The food is average. Some hostels' food is good. The maintenance is average. One hostel is good, but it is outside of the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The best place if you want to go to a college with a lot of facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have a top-class library, so accommodating and comfortable. The facilities are a 4/5 since there's more construction happening. The hostel medical facilities are great, and so is sports; we have one event happen every year. Most of the events are hosted by the clubs. It's very enjoyable and fun.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with almost everything - Good placements, pretty campus, healthy environment.

review_content.Placements: My seniors told me most of them have been placed by the university in prestigious companies like Cipla, Torrent Pharma, etc. The packages range from 2.5 LPA to 7.5 LPA. All the students got it from my batch. Professors are very helpful in this area. I am hoping for a job as a bioinformatics assistant or a clinical genetics lab assistant.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is freely available to the whole campus. There are various labs for various fields like biochemistry, microbiology, preparatory labs, etc. The food is average but the menu keeps changing so it offers a variety of food. A separate gym and indoor sports area are available. The outdoor games ground is something of an interesting sight. The hostel rooms are separate for each individual even when sharing you have your own wardrobe and a bed. There is a wellness center if you get sick. Library is the most beautiful and comfortable space in there. I personally love it.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The law campus of Amity University is the best, and the faculty is also very cooperative.

review_content.Placements: This year, the law batch will graduate, and placements are also provided for students from other departments. Many students were placed last year. You can visit the Amity University Punjab page on Instagram to see our university events. Students have won many prizes.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the hostel are average, and the rules at Amity University Punjab could be improved. The Wi-Fi quality is poor. Labs and classrooms are good, and the library is excellent. The friendly environment makes you feel at peace. Many students visit the library every day.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Clinical Psychology with Research - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Amity University, Punjab.

review_content.Placements: The campus is newly established therefore placements are limited. Only limited companies visit for campus recruitment. But still, you can expect an average salary package of around 10 LPA. The highest salary package offered in the last year was 30 LPA. There are no placements for psychology UG.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is not very large, but not very small also. I expected it to be slightly larger, but it's okay. Food courts are available. We have a sports ground, gym, and garden. If you are looking for something crazy, then it is not available. But if you are peace-loving, then welcome.
