review_summary.college_name: Amity University Mohali Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our campus is worth for money, small, and well-managed.

content.Placements: 70-80% of students got placed. Average package is approximately 6 LPA - 7 LPA. I don't know exactly about companies. Approximately 80-90% of students got internships. Top roles are offered. I don't know but toppers for moderately satisfied with the result but as college is new so its still exploring.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is best. Classrooms and campus have AC and are clean. I am not a hostel one but hostel mates always share positive reviews about it. But its too strict on the timings and food order. Mess is overall 2 rated not recommended from my side but other food options are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: In short, good reputed university in Punjab.

content.Placements: Currently, the placement records are limited as the course has only been running for a year. Top recruiters visit the campus regularly, and approximately 80 to 85 percent of students are placed each year. Those who do not secure a job placement typically secure internships instead.
content.Infrastructure: The building is very large, and Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus at every location. The labs are well-equipped with the latest technology and are among the best, featuring modern equipment. In my opinion, it has the best technology and modern equipment in labs in Punjab, especially among universities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Human Genetics and Molecular Medicine (Research) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with almost everything - Good placements, pretty campus, healthy environment.

content.Placements: My seniors told me most of them have been placed by the university in prestigious companies like Cipla, Torrent Pharma, etc. The packages range from 2.5 LPA to 7.5 LPA. All the students got it from my batch. Professors are very helpful in this area. I am hoping for a job as a bioinformatics assistant or a clinical genetics lab assistant.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is freely available to the whole campus. There are various labs for various fields like biochemistry, microbiology, preparatory labs, etc. The food is average but the menu keeps changing so it offers a variety of food. A separate gym and indoor sports area are available. The outdoor games ground is something of an interesting sight. The hostel rooms are separate for each individual even when sharing you have your own wardrobe and a bed. There is a wellness center if you get sick. Library is the most beautiful and comfortable space in there. I personally love it.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The law campus of Amity University is the best, and the faculty is also very cooperative.

content.Placements: This year, the law batch will graduate, and placements are also provided for students from other departments. Many students were placed last year. You can visit the Amity University Punjab page on Instagram to see our university events. Students have won many prizes.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the hostel are average, and the rules at Amity University Punjab could be improved. The Wi-Fi quality is poor. Labs and classrooms are good, and the library is excellent. The friendly environment makes you feel at peace. Many students visit the library every day.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Clinical Psychology with Research - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Amity University, Punjab.

content.Placements: The campus is newly established therefore placements are limited. Only limited companies visit for campus recruitment. But still, you can expect an average salary package of around 10 LPA. The highest salary package offered in the last year was 30 LPA. There are no placements for psychology UG.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is not very large, but not very small also. I expected it to be slightly larger, but it's okay. Food courts are available. We have a sports ground, gym, and garden. If you are looking for something crazy, then it is not available. But if you are peace-loving, then welcome.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to Amity University, Punjab?
faqs.answer: Admission to various UG and PG courses is both merit and entrance based. Aspirants need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place before applying for this course. For BTech course, the university conducts its in-house entrance exam, i.e., Amity Joint Entrance Exam. The university accepts various national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, CAT, XAT, MAT, etc. Other than that, for some UG and PG courses, students are selected based on their merit performance in the previous qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Can students get direct admission to various courses at Amity University Mohali?
faqs.answer: Direct admissions for UG courses are offered to candidates securing above 80% aggregate in Class 12. Such candidates are exempted from the selection process. Selection will be only based on the Amity application form. Direct admission based on class 12 percentage is not applicable for the programmes of Design /Architecture /Education /Fashion /Law /Physical Education. For complete information visit the official website of the university.

faqs.question: What is the required qualification to get into BSc in Forensic Science course of Amity Punjab?
faqs.answer: Amity University, Mohali admit candidates to its BSc Forensic Science course based on performance in Class 12 or equivalent examination. Students who are Class 12 or equivalent pass with at least 50% aggregate with PCM/ PCB can apply for admission. The pass certificates also have to be submitted for verification purposes.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amity University Mohali Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is worth for money, small, and well-managed.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is best. Classrooms and campus have AC and are clean. I am not a hostel one but hostel mates always share positive reviews about it. But its too strict on the timings and food order. Mess is overall 2 rated not recommended from my side but other food options are also available.

reviews.review_heading: In short, good reputed university in Punjab.
reviews.review_text: The building is very large, and Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus at every location. The labs are well-equipped with the latest technology and are among the best, featuring modern equipment. In my opinion, it has the best technology and modern equipment in labs in Punjab, especially among universities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with almost everything - Good placements, pretty campus, healthy environment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is freely available to the whole campus. There are various labs for various fields like biochemistry, microbiology, preparatory labs, etc. The food is average but the menu keeps changing so it offers a variety of food. A separate gym and indoor sports area are available. The outdoor games ground is something of an interesting sight. The hostel rooms are separate for each individual even when sharing you have your own wardrobe and a bed. There is a wellness center if you get sick. Library i...

reviews.review_heading: The law campus of Amity University is the best, and the faculty is also very cooperative.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the hostel are average, and the rules at Amity University Punjab could be improved. The Wi-Fi quality is poor. Labs and classrooms are good, and the library is excellent. The friendly environment makes you feel at peace. Many students visit the library every day.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amity University, Punjab.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not very large, but not very small also. I expected it to be slightly larger, but it's okay. Food courts are available. We have a sports ground, gym, and garden. If you are looking for something crazy, then it is not available. But if you are peace-loving, then welcome.

reviews.review_heading: Nice Crowd and good opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best infrastructure in terms of building, area, hygiene, and security. The building is huge and welcoming and the area is also spacious for each and every department and activity, including clubs.

reviews.review_heading: A Decent College if You Want to Study While Enjoying Your Life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for B.Tech and overall is great. We have computer labs, air-conditioned classrooms, and a library. Wi-Fi, however, is VERY slow, almost negligible, so that’s a disadvantage. However, the ethernet in labs has a good speed. Hostel’s infrastructure is also great, and all things are in good condition as the university is new. The downside is the mess and canteen are the same, and the food is not that good. Medical facilities are good; you can get the medicine you need for your problem...

reviews.review_heading: BCA from the Amity University, Punjab.
reviews.review_text: Amity University Punjab has really good infrastructure for the BCA course. For the coding practices of the students, the lab facility is available. Library, Wi-Fi, canteen, sports, medical, etc. Facilities were available for the students. The food in the college canteen was good. hostel facility was also available for the students. Multiple Sports facilities were given to the students.

reviews.review_heading: A good university is beneficial for students in terms of academics and extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text:
The campus offers high-speed Wi-Fi, modern classroom with smart boards, well-equipped computer labs and a comprehensive library with a vast collection of books and digital resources.
The hostels are well maintained, with clean and spacious rooms, 24/7 security and Wi-Fi access. There is an on-campus medical centre with qualified doctors, as well as emergency services.
The university has excellent sport facilities, including a gym, basketball and cricket fields and facilities for indoor games lik...

reviews.review_heading: MCA from the Amity University which offers good facilities and faculty to the students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for this MCA course at the Amity University was good. Students were getting computer labs for the programming practice. Necessary facilities like Wi-Fi, library, Canteen, sports, medical etc. Were available in the college campus. All these facilities were properly managed by the college management. Hostel facility was also available for the students. Multiple sports facility were given to the student. Food in the college canteen and hostel mess was good en...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our university is newly established. It is still under construction. Our university is beautiful. Labs are well-equipped. They have almost all the equipment. The library is well-built and peaceful. It has many books.

reviews.review_heading: Our college will be having a lot of potential in the next 3-4 years.
reviews.review_text: Classroom and Wi-Fi are good. Our college is still under construction and takes some time. Hostels are not too good. The mess facility is average. They do not provide many options.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good, but opportunity wise, this college is not worth it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good here, even hostels are good and nearby there are many PGs too, labs are built nicely. Classrooms are spacious and the library is really good to study as its really a vibe there. Indoor games are also available and you can spend time with your friends there.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University Punjab is a recently opened university and is still developing in many things.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is very nice. Everything, like Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and the library, is newly added, so their functioning is very good. The hostel is also very well developed. The quality of food in our cafeteria is good, but it is quite more expensive than outside.

reviews.review_heading: Your 2nd home, a new and adventurous chapter, is like a rollercoaster, boring, fun, and everything.
reviews.review_text: Every class has Wi-Fi with good connectivity, but it can be slow sometimes. It has projectors, mics, and ACs. Classrooms have sockets. Well-furnished libraries and labs, with all the equipped machines and needed materials. Medical rooms are available with good staff. The canteen food is hygienic, and there is another café shop on campus. Well-made grounds and 2-level parking with good security The overall security of the college is also great.

data.description: Amity University Mohali provides modern amenities with state-of-the-art infrastructure to its students. The university is spread across 40 acre of land. Amity University Mohali has a big library, conference halls, modern classrooms, a canteen, labs, faculty rooms, a cafeteria, book shops, and offers other facilities to students.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the course is good. Wi-Fi is available, and the lab infrastructure is also in good condition. review_summary.college_name: KGEC - Kalyani Government Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I find this college quite satisfactory, according to fees but there is space for improvement.

content.Placements: Training and placement cell looks over the placement of our college. The placements are decent this year. 2 students got offers from Google and Amazon. Infosys, TCS, and Wipro do mass recruitment from our college. Many students get internships as well.
content.Infrastructure: We have a well-equipped library, labs, and classrooms. Wi-Fi is available in labs. Projector in class and lab are available. Labs have AC. We have a sports ground, table tennis area, and gym in our college. Also meals are served in hostels. We have canteens in hostels and campus. The food is decent. Mostly 4 people live in a room. Overall, according to money it's fair enough.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall good infrastructure and is effective.

content.Placements: In ECE, around 53% of students got placed last year with the highest salary package of 86 LPA in J. P. Morgan. The average salary package offered is around 5 LPA - 6 LPA by various software as well as core companies. On and off-campus placements are good, so anyone can join.
content.Infrastructure: Our college (KGEC) has various buildings for various departments. Facilities are also good. There is good infrastructure in our college as well as hostels. The canteen and mess facilities are good. We have good facilities. Medical facilities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The campus is really good.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed from the Electrical Department is 85%. Top recruiting companies are TITAGARH Rail System Limited, TECHNO ELECTRIC & ENGINEERING CO. LTD., TDK, and WOOD. The roles offered to the students are GTE, ENGINEER, and Technician. The highest package from the course is 5 LPA, and the lowest package of this course is 2 LPA. The average package from the college is 3 LPA. 60% of students get internships in companies like TDK, CESC.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the course is good. Wi-Fi is available, and the lab infrastructure is also in good condition. There are various different equipment to perform experiments. Classes have modern projectors for lectures. There is a library with a large number of books in the collection. The facilities provided in the hostel include a canteen, mess, and indoor game equipment. The food quality in the hostel is moderate and totally hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good campus life and facilities.

content.Placements: The percent of students from the ECE department is about 80%. In KGEC, many companies come for on-campus hiring like DXCorr, LARSEN & TOUBRO, TATA Consultancy Services, Wipro, Infosys. Top roles offered in the ECE department are Project Engineer, Graduate Trainee Engineer, FTE, System Engineer. The highest package from our course is 6 Lacs per annum, and the average package is 5 Lacs per annum, while the lowest package is 2 Lacs per annum. The percentage of students who got internships is around 70%, in DXCorr, TCS, Wipro.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the ECE department course in KGEC is very good. There are Analog Communication Lab, CAD Lab, EMFT Lab, Digital Communication Lab, and others. The infrastructure of the lab is in very good condition, and there are enough pieces of equipment for performing the experiments in our course. The classrooms are also modern, and students are provided the opportunity to use both the blackboard and the projector. The college has a library with a large number of books. Hostel infrastructure is not in good condition, and all hostels are divided year-wise. Each hostel has canteen and mess facilities, as well as indoor game equipment like TT and carrom.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Loved the college campus life, with good faculty and good placement.

content.Placements: The placement here at Kalyani Government Engineering College is excellent, with tons of companies visiting the campus for recruitment. Prominent names include TCS, Cognizant, and Wipro, which are some mass recruiters at Kalyani Government Engineering College. Many startups are also wanting to collaborate with the college. In recent years, the track record has been very good, with students getting placed in Amazon, Microsoft, and other big companies. All in all, a good place to look for placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and the department is good, with large, spacious classrooms that can accommodate a lot of students. The windows are big and airy, creating a fresh environment for the classroom. The labs are equipped with the latest-gen computers and fast internet availability. The campus also features a large sports ground where various sports can be played, encouraging fitness. Overall, a good place.

reviews.review_heading: Loved the college campus life, with good faculty and good placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and the department is good, with large, spacious classrooms that can accommodate a lot of students. The windows are big and airy, creating a fresh environment for the classroom. The labs are equipped with the latest-gen computers and fast internet availability. The campus also features a large sports ground where various sports can be played, encouraging fitness. Overall, a good place.

reviews.review_heading: My review of KGEC College.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is good, the classes are clean, and teachers always come on time with no delays. You can go to the teachers in extra time, and they can help you solve your problems. There are computers in the lab, and teachers are also very intelligent. Many games are played in college, like football, cricket, volleyball, table tennis, badminton, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: The review of KGEC by Rudra.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure and facility of our department are good. Wi-Fi is available for studying.
Labs are well-equipped.
The library is there with good content of books.
The quality of facilities in our hostel is excellent.
The mess food is neat and clean.
The medical facilities are also available.
A ground is available for sports.

reviews.review_heading: A good experience in KGEC.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is not quite good. Wi-Fi is available. 
Lab instruments are needed more as they are less in number. 
Classrooms are good, and libraries are also good. 
I live in the hostel, Raja Ram Mohan Roy Hall, in Kalyani Government Engineering College. Hostel culture is rich in games, extracurricular activities, and other events. Food is also good, and the canteen is also available. The affordable hostel charges 2000 rs per month.

reviews.review_heading: Kalyani Government Engineering college is an option or not.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-equipped. Some classrooms are air-conditioned. The girls' hostel is very old due to which students will have to face problems. There is no gym facility in our college.

reviews.review_heading: All about KGEC in one review.
reviews.review_text: Our department has a separate building called Meghnad Saha Bhavan. All our facilities are well-maintained and the staff is well-educated. Our lab is also well-maintained, and we have good lab teachers. We enjoy our course, and our teachers are friendly. I prefer this.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best government colleges in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is average. Labs are almost well equipped. Classrooms are moderate. Ethernet is available in the labs. The library is little bit outdated, but we have digital library. 
Hostels are not good at all. The food is bad. 
We have different playgrounds to play games like football, cricket, badminton, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied here.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available are very good; all the labs have AC. The professors also help students with their studies and other curricular activities. The college has its own playground, and each hostel has its own volleyball court. The food here is great.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment is present .
reviews.review_text: Good classrooms and good faculty members are present in our department. All are very supportive teachers. In our hostel, good food is provided, and rooms are good. Sports are also present there. Canteens are too good. There are many clubs for extracurriculars, like music club, dance clubs, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college for learning and also for placement after 4 years of course.
reviews.review_text: Food is pretty good and the canteen is also very good, like talking about food quality and hygiene. The hostels are also clean and affordable for middle-class families. All the labs in the college are AC facilitated and the computers are also in good shape (for CSE and IT). And also, Wi-Fi connection is present. Nearby are good hospitals like JNM, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Know about KGEC in short.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories are well air conditioned; however, being a government college, you will see a lack of equipment and machines, or some are faulty machines and are not replaced. There are 6 different hostels, one for M.Tech, four boys hostels for each year, and one for girls hostel.

review_content.Placements: In my course, every year more than 90% of students get placed. The highest package is 32LPA by Flipkart and the lowest package is 4 LPA. review_summary.college_name: SIES Graduate School of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overview of SIES GST in seconds.

content.Placements: In my course, almost 90% of students got placed. The highest package offered is 9 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Media.Net, TCS, Aurionpro, and KPMG. Most offered roles are sales analyst, product analyst, marketing, etc. A very few students got internships from college. Most of them applied for off-campus and cracked one. Overall, if you grind yourself, it will give positive results.
content.Infrastructure: We have a very good infrastructure, the college has 4 floors and a huge cafeteria. It also has good labs and facilities. The only thing it lacks is a good sports facility, like a playground or turf. It does not have a playground for any sports. Also, the equipment provided by the college is of very poor quality. It does not provide hostel facility, in fact, students are not allowed in the college after 6 PM.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements throughout the college.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students are placed in EXTC courses. The highest package is 20 LPA, the lowest package is 3.5 LPA, and the average package is 9.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Ingram, Excel, etc. 90 percent of students got internships. The top roles are in the software development courses.
content.Infrastructure: Our college facilities are very good, and the infrastructure is also good. There is a good Wi-Fi connection, excellent classrooms, and good explanations through projectors. The library is also good. The hostel is near the college, and the food quality is extremely good, like home-cooked food. Overall, it is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Internet of Things and Cyber Security Including Block Chain Technology) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: If students do not get a good percentage in their MHT CET, then they can choose this option.

content.Placements: In my course, every year more than 90% of students get placed. The highest package is 32LPA by Flipkart and the lowest package is 4 LPA. TCS company hires more students from our college. Many companies like Wipro, nVent, etc. visited the college and they actually give a good package to students. Overall, placements are the best and companies do mass recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: My college campus is spread over 6.5 acres. There is no hostel facility and students have to take PG. The college helps students to get into PG. Classrooms are well-structured and the library is also available. Labs and Wi-Fi facilities are also available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My nice experience towards the future.

content.Placements: Around 75% of students got on-campus placements in college. The average package was around 6 LPA. Other students try for off-campus. Some students got 12 LPA in their respective fields. Companies like TCS, Infosys, etc., were recruiting companies. Many more companies were there in the pipeline process.
content.Infrastructure: Facilites were good.
content.Faculty: Course curriculum fulfills the demands of students and future job opportunities. Semester exams were quite difficult because it contained all new subjects and the topics were familiar to students. It required time to adopt the skills. The passing score was 32% and also we got the grades percentage. Some teachers were rude but their experience was very helpful for us. Their teaching skills were good. Students were free to ask any queries from teachers. There were 7 courses available in college namely CE, ECS, ENTC, AIML, AIDS, CE IOT, etc. There were enough staff to manage all the divisions.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My College Tour - In short.

content.Placements: Yes, the college offers placement opportunities. Companies like Capgemini, KPMG, nVent, TCS, Accenture, etc., are the various companies that visit the college for placements. The highest package was 30 LPA as I remember, and the average package is around 4 to 5 LPA. The percentage of students getting placed is 75%. Students become eligible at the end of the third year in the sixth semester.
content.Infrastructure: The campus life is absolutely great. We have an annual fest, TML, and our technical fest, Recognition. We also have many other festivals and occasion-based fests held in our college, and they are all amazing. The infrastructure for our course and department is top-notch. The Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are absolutely excellent. The food is a bit of a letdown in our canteen, and there is no hostel facility in our college, and the college closes at 5:30. The medical facilities are good, and the sports team of the college is fabulous.

SIES Graduate School of Technology cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 58140 and 98332 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. reviews.review_text: It's not a large campus compared to other facilities. The facilities are of an average type, not very well maintained, but sports and games are carried out at a good level. It was nice to watch Sports Week. All types of hygiene, messes, and canteen facilities are available. Classrooms and labs are of an average level.

reviews.review_heading: Overall a good experience and satisfactory facilities .
reviews.review_text: We have wi-fi facility, library, computer labs but the classrooms are quite school- like. There is AC in labs only. Comparatively infra is better. Hostel is good and disciplined and food is also good. I would honesty say we have minimalist sports facilities though, there is no proper playground, but we do have sports teams.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel facility in our college. Wi-Fi is available in labs. Mechanical engineering labs are outdated. Classrooms are average. Our canteen provides average food. There is no football playground. The infrastructure of our college is average. We have only a few classrooms. Often students are shifted to labs for lectures. Benches are crowded and comfortable for taller boys. Our college provides good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with faculty members of this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has spacious classrooms with modern facilities such as projectors and audio-visual equipment. Laboratories are well-equipped. There is a huge library in this college. It also provides excellent resources for students.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with placements of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Laboratories are well-equipped. Classrooms are better. All facilities are adapted with smart learning features.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college to learn.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides jammers in labs, so mobile data doesn't work. It doesn't provide open Wi-Fi. Students have to go to server rooms to connect their laptops. There are many labs for different departments. The best part about our college is its labs. It has a huge library to do self-study peacefully. Our college is under renovation as two floors are under construction. Classrooms are spacious but not air-conditioned. Labs and seminar halls are air-conditioned. Hostel is not available in our col...

reviews.review_heading: One of the top colleges in Mumbai with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The classes labs are well-equipped with the latest technologies. The college is not having hostel, but there are many college students who stay in nearby PGs and rented apartments. The rent and facilities provided in the PG are reasonable with good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: SIES Graduate School of Technology provides a good campus life as well as placements.
reviews.review_text: No Hostels. No public Wi-Fi mess and canteen is small and medical facilities are not very good. Sports grounds are not available but sports events are regularly conducted on public grounds and stadiums. Many games and events occur from time to time to keep you busy.

reviews.review_heading: Our college lacks in providing placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Labs are good. Canteen food is good but it doesn't serves non-vegetarian food items. Library is good with every book. The environment of our college is competitive. Wi-Fi is not available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in everything.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities. There are good laboratories and sports centers like cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, etc. This college is very clean. Hostels are clean and food served in the canteen is good.

highlights.summary:
Babu Banarasi Das University admissions 2026 are currently open for all courses. Interested candidates can go to the official website to apply to the desired course.

The CUET PG 2026 exam will be held till Mar 27, 2026 for admission to several PG courses.

college_info.intro:
Babu Banarasi Das University Lucknow consists of more than 10 schools, including the School of Engineering, the School of Management, the School of Legal Studies and the School of Computer Applications, among others. BBDU Lucknow offers various UG, PG, certificate, and PhD courses, across many streams such as management, technology, engineering sciences, legal studies, education, and humanities, among others.
The BTech programme is one of the most popular offerings at the university. Baba Banarasi Das University offers the BTech programme in several specialisations, such as Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and others. The popularity of the BTech programme offered at BBDU is attributed to its state-of-the-art engineering school equipped with both modern and traditional ways of learning and excellent faculty. The BTech graduates of BBD University Lucknow are placed in top-notch companies such as Infosys, Ola, TCS, Sony, Godrej, and many more.
Below mentioned are some of the most popular BBD University Lucknow courses, along with eligibility, selection criteria, and BBDU Lucknow fee:

faqs.answer: A:    BBD University offers good placements annually for courses like BTech, BCA, BBA and MBA, etc. The placement statistics for the Class of 2025 are yet to be released. faqs.answer: A:    Babu Banarasi Das University admissions are offered through merit and entrance. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as CLAT, CAT, etc., for admission to specific courses. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria to secure a seat at the University. The University considers exams such as MAT/ XAT/ CAT/CMAT/ATMA/GMAT and others. Candidates must meet the cutoff and get shortlisted for the final admission. For final admission, candidates must pay the fees and confirm

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure are excellent and on average for a college.

content.Placements: 5 to 10 percent of students are placed in college. The highest package of BBD is 48 LPA in Microsoft btech. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Top companies are Microsoft accenture google Flipkart, Cisco, Amazon, TCS etc. 20 to 30 percent of students got intership. The role of the course is to offer b tech and other courses.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good. Labs are nice and the best library is good. Classrooms are nice. Canteens are excellent like Nesscafé, Burger Singh and Dominoz franchise. Bbd college in large stadium for cricket and other activities basketball and tennis courts in the college

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placements are not good. The campus is good. The food is not good.

content.Placements: There are low placements, so we have to get placements on our own capabilities. Only relying on the university will not get us placed. We can expect students to get a package ranging from 2-3 LPA only. Companies that come for placements are HCL, Infosys, etc. We can get internships at IBM, but it's completely based on our skills.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is good with Wi-Fi and labs. Classrooms are like schools with no AC, but it's not a big deal, so I can consider them good. The library is decent and not fancy. There are lifts in the university building, but they are very slow. The campus is clean and feels good. Hostel food is bad. Facilities are good, like a gym, basketball court, and tennis court. There is also a stadium, which is big. I would rate 9 out of 10 for sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college in Lucknow.

content.Placements: 40 percent of students got placed. The highest is 12 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Very few got internships from my B.Tech CS course. Many groups offer their role in maintaining the extra curricular activities. You can take part in one of those groups to be a member of it and experience how the management works in different situations.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are awesome. Food and rooms in hostels are much more decent. Games are there. Tennis court, badminton, volleyball, and mainly a cricket stadium are available. Rather than games, the medical facilities are also very good. Library of the college is good, and the stock of books is also nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Every year, the college gives good placements and high packages.

content.Placements: Almost every year, 70-80 percent of students get placements. 23-24 LPA is the highest package, the average packages are 3 to 4 LPA, and the mean is 12 to 13 LPA. TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, etc. are the top companies and recruiters which come in the college for placements. On an average, 32-40% from my course got internships in companies like HCL and Cognizant. The top roles offered are assistant manager, project manager, data analyst, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi, libraries, and labs. Classes are well-equipped with modern design and devices, such as smart boards, and well-maintained furniture like tables and chairs. Generally, the food is good, and on any special occasion, they bring better food with deluxe parties. The sports facilities are well maintained with good opportunities, welcoming the students to show their talent.

admission_process.title: Babu Banarasi Das University  Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Babu Banaras Das University admission 2025is currently open. Admission to BBDU is based on merit and entrance. The university accepts national-level entrance exams like CLAT, CAT, etc., for admission to specific courses.BBD Universityoffers more than 25 courses through 11 schools at UG, PG, certificate and doctoral levels. The mode ofBabuBanarasi Das University course admissionsis primarilyonline.

Admission to BBDU is based on merit and entrance. The University offers courses such asBTech, BSc, BDS, BBA, LLB,etc. at theUG leveland theMBA, MTech, MSc, MCA programmes, etc. at thePG level. Candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses at BBDU. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria forBabuBanarasi Das University course admissions2025:
Graduation- 50% aggregate
MAT/XAT/CAT/CMAT/ATMA/GMAT
Class 12 or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate
Merit-based
Class 12 or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate
Merit-based
Class 12 with at least 50%-55% aggregate
Merit-based
Class 12 or equivalent with Physics and Mathematics along with Chemistry/ Computer Science with at least 50% aggregate
Merit-based

Merit-based
Class 12 or equivalent with Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry/ Statistics/ Geology/ Computer Science with at least 50% aggregate

Note:The relaxation in qualification and reservation is as per UGC and State Govt. norms.
To check out the admission process for other UG & PG courses,make your course selection here
Students can check the detailedBabuBanarasi Das University course admissions process:
1: BBDU Application Process

BBD University application process is conducted both online and offline modes. Candidates must fill in all necessary details and submit the form to confirm candidature. Students can check the detailedBBD University feestructure here.
2: Merit List Publication

Following the application period, the university releases a merit list indicating the minimum required scores for eligibility in various courses. Aspirants meeting or exceeding the cutoff marks proceed to the subsequent selection phase.
3: Counselling Session

After appearing for the respective entrance exams, candidates must appear for counselling round. After the counselling round, candidates will receive the confirmed seat after completing few more steps.
4: Admission Confirmation
For final admission, shortlisted candidates must pay the fees and confirm the seat. This step finalises the enrollment process at BBDU.

courses_data.description: The BBDU Lucknow BCA Course is a three-year course which consists of six semesters. BCA at BBDU Lucknow is offered in three specialisations under the School of Computer Applications.The requirements of the applicants for the BCA course are that they should have completed Class 12.The BCA program at BBDU can be gained by merit with a minimum of 50 per cent in Class 12, and hence it will ensure that students with a strong academic background are considered to undertake this program.

faqs.question: In how many specialisations BCA courses are offered at BBDU?
faqs.answer: BBDU Lucknow's BCA programme spans three years, encompassing six semesters, and is offered in three specializations under the School of CA. The BCA course is offered in three specialisations namely, BCA, BCA in Data Science and AI in Collaboration with IBM andBCA in Cyber Security & Forensics in Collaboration with IBM. paragraphs: The placement statistics for the Class of 2025 are yet to be released on the official website of BBDU Lucknow. Earlier, 202 companies participated during BBDU Lucknow placements 2024 and placed 779 students of batch 2024. The highest package secured by the batch 2024 was I NR 11.25 LPA . The average package achieved by top 5, 10 and 25 students was INR 9.90 LPA, 9.45 LPA and 8.68 LPA. The top recruiters of Babu Banarasi Das University during the recent past include Amazon, TCS, Infosys, HCL, Wipro , Deloitte , etc.

faqs: What is the BBDU NEET UG cutoff 2025?

description: BBDU cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

BBDU NEET UG cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the BDS course for various categories under the Home State quota. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks till 4 rounds.

For the General HS category, the BDS cutoff in the last round was 77788. This means that this is the maximum rank at which admissions are allowed. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff for the first and last rounds for the General HS quota.

As per the BBDU BDS cutoff 2025, the last round rank was 77788. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoff was 304455 and 1078764, respectively, for the General HS quota candidates. After analysing these ranks, we can conclude that the competition for this category for the BDS course has been fluctuating over the years.
To know the cutoff for other courses, categories, rounds, etc., use the filters in the table below.
Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the previous year's cutoff trends for the General All India category students:

BBDU accepts UPTAC cutoff ranks for admission to the BE/BTech course. Admission for the year 2025-26 is over. To know when the applications, exams, etc., for the next academic session start, check the table below.
Candidates can refer to the table given below to download the consolidated previous year's UPTAC Counselling Rounds for the General All India category students:

The BBDU BDS cutoff 2025 can be seen in the table below, along with the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023. Students needed to attain a rank of 77788 or lower to be able to gain admission at this university. This is the requirement for the students under the General HS quota. To know the maximum and minimum cutoff ranks for other rounds, categories and years, students can view the table below.

In this section, students can access the BBDU MDS cutoff 2025, 2024, as well as 2023. As per the first round, the most competitive course was MDS in Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, with a cutoff of 4356. On the other hand, the most popular course in the last round was MDS in Conservative Dentistry and Endodontics, with the cutoff being 6103.

hostel_campus.college_name: BBDU Lucknow Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostel facility for 2000+ boys and 1000+ girls respectively is available in the campus. The hostel accommodation is on twin / triple sharing basis. Each hostel has a recreation room with television and indoor games facility.

library.description: Babu Banarasi Das University library has rich & well-stocked central & school libraries with more than 2,00,000 Books, E-Library, E-Journals, Periodicals and Journals in print as well as in electronic form with online subscription of IEEE, INDEST, Science Direct, Bentham.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Cricket Ground, Table Tannis

library.description: Babu Banarasi Das University library has rich & well-stocked central & school libraries with more than 2,00,000 Books, E-Library, E-Journals, Periodicals and Journals in print as well as in electronic form with online subscription of IEEE, INDEST, Science Direct, Bentham.

hostel.description: Hostel facility for 2000+ boys and 1000+ girls respectively is available in the campus. The hostel accommodation is on twin / triple sharing basis. Each hostel has a recreation room with television and indoor games facility.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Cricket Ground, Table Tannis

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure are excellent and on average for a college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good. Labs are nice and the best library is good. Classrooms are nice. Canteens are excellent like Nesscafé, Burger Singh and Dominoz franchise. Bbd college in large stadium for cricket and other activities basketball and tennis courts in the college

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good. The campus is good. The food is not good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good with Wi-Fi and labs. Classrooms are like schools with no AC, but it's not a big deal, so I can consider them good. The library is decent and not fancy. There are lifts in the university building, but they are very slow. The campus is clean and feels good. Hostel food is bad. Facilities are good, like a gym, basketball court, and tennis court. There is also a stadium, which is big. I would rate 9 out of 10 for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in  Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Labs are awesome. Food and rooms in hostels are much more decent. Games are there. Tennis court, badminton, volleyball, and mainly a cricket stadium are available. Rather than games, the medical facilities are also very good. Library of the college is good, and the stock of books is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Good  college in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Labs are awesome. Food and rooms in hostels are much more decent. Games are there. Tennis court, badminton, volleyball, and mainly a cricket stadium are available. Rather than games, the medical facilities are also very good. Library of the college is good, and the stock of books is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Every year, the college gives good placements and high packages.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi, libraries, and labs. Classes are well-equipped with modern design and devices, such as smart boards, and well-maintained furniture like tables and chairs. Generally, the food is good, and on any special occasion, they bring better food with deluxe parties. The sports facilities are well maintained with good opportunities, welcoming the students to show their talent.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, average placements, and a large green campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is very good. Labs, classrooms and library are well maintained and properly equipped. As a first year student, our classes are on the 5th floor of 8 floor as well 2 ground floors building, and getting a lift at 9 a. m. is difficult, so we often use the stairs, which actually helps in staying fit. Hostels are in good condition, though not perfect. Mess food is sometimes good and sometimes average, while the canteen food is quite good. Medical facilities are av...

reviews.review_heading: The college is quite good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi works well, labs are fantastic, and classrooms are spacious and well-equipped. The library is big. Hostels are not very suitable for living. Mess food is so bad that people sometimes get sick. Facilities at BBD (Babu Banarasi Das) institutions in Lucknow generally receive mixed reviews, with hostels often rated average to poor (especially food quality), while medical and sports facilities are usually available. Wi-Fi, libraries, and labs are generally well-regarded.

reviews.review_heading: The college is decent in terms of placement, and the quality of study is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very good because the buildings are well-maintained, and a beautiful infrastructure is provided by the college. The internal structure of my building is very good. Classrooms are well-maintained, and a digital board is present in all classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: College is good only for rich people, and if anyone comes from middle class, then this is not good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. Everything is very much okay. But the hostel facilities are not good. The food in the mess is very poor quality. The hostel fees are also very high, they charge 80,000 per annum for three B. Ed rooms, and they don’t provide facilities like high-end amenities. They give only one almirah and one B. Ed with table and chair, and the rooms are very small, so it’s not good.

reviews.review_heading: Small talks about college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, not that bad. It's in working condition and maintained. It's okay working, but they upgraded their infrastructure last year, but it's not that good. They were updated from the last one we had before, so it’s okay, but not that okay. You can work with it.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college to take admission in.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Banarasi Das University is not that great. It has average infrastructure. It has a large library, and they also provide Wi-Fi to all the departments. The quality of the hostel is average, and the food was okay. This college also provided a mess.

reviews.review_heading: BBDU Lucknow offers great faculty, placements, and a lively campus for learning and growth.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in my course are very good. We get many seminars, we have labs and a classroom with video representation, a proper quiz, and fully AC, centralized AC, and many books related to our course. Our hostel is also good with full safety and security, and we have a proper medical area where students get proper treatment, and the quality of food is also good. There are many options on the menu that they cook regularly, and we also have a proper play area in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for low fees.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are well and good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is also average, but the food quality is very poor, making it not worth staying there. The course completion, the sports game facilities, medical facilities, and mess and canteen facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for low fees.
reviews.review_text: The college has facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The library is well and good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is also average, but the food quality is very poor, making it not worth staying there. However, during the course, the sports, game facilities, medical facilities, mess, and canteen facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for low-budget studies.
reviews.review_text: The college has facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The library is well and good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is also average, but the food quality is very poor and not worth staying there during the course completion. The sports, game facilities, medical facilities, and mess and canteen facilities are also good.

paragraphs: The total course fee for BBA ranges between INR 2.40 Lacs and INR 4.2 lakh. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to BBDU BBA course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must pass Class 12 with 50%-55% aggregate to apply for BBA course. The fee for BBA varies as per the specialisation. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode. The application fee is INR 500 for each course.

The total tuition fee for various course at Babu Banarasi Das University is different as per courses. Students can check the table below to know the total tuition fee for various courses at BBDU Lucknow:

Babu Banarasi Das University Lucknow provides several merit and need-based scholarships to students. Some of the scholarships offered at the university include Research Fellowship, Scholarship for SC/ST Category Students, Scholarship for OBC and Minority categories, etc.  The Research Fellowship is offered to PhD students in the form of financial assistance. The university also offers financial assistance to the students coming from the economically weaker sections of the society. The SC/ ST/ OBC scholarships are offered to students belonging to the respective minority community.
